name: Sherrod
subject: We’re about to be flooded with dark money and vicious attacks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Republicans have more dark money than we can imagine.
| Friend, it's Sherrod Brown.

_Cook Political Report_ just upgraded our race to a Toss Up:

**This new race rating proves we're running a winning campaign in Ohio._But it also puts a massive target on our backs..._**

Senate Republicans have already pledged to spend more in Ohio than _any_ other state in the country. I've been in this position before, and I can tell you this: We're about to be flooded with dark money and vicious attacks.

[Will you fight back with $10, split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107320?t=6&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107320?t=7&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7)
---
We've seen a huge surge of support this week – and it means the world to me. But the truth is, Republicans have more dark money than we can imagine. They could ramp up their spending any day now, and we need to be ready to respond when they do.

[My team set an urgent goal to raise an extra $250,000 before 11:59PM tonight, and it's within reach but we need a few more donations from your area to get us over the finish line. Will you rush a split $10 donation to ensure we have what it takes to respond?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107320?t=8&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107321?t=9&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7)

Thanks for all that you do.

Sherrod
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23753%2E878179%2EjDy6Q7).**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I'll tell you exactly what I told my team this morning.
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Virginians For Fair Maps
body:
Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history.
Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history.
| Patriot, Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history. And Hakeem Jeffries is spending $20 million to make sure it passes. For every $1 we have on the air showing Virginia voters the truth about this map, Hakeem Jeffries and George Soros have $10. Their ads are running in every media market in the state during every single commercial break, but we are still beating them. However, we need more resources ASAP. **Here's what I know: when Virginia voters learn the facts, they vote NO. ** **[What your contribution does today.](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=9bb248f57db04ec5900b54e225be410b&_e=SWZf4OTf-KrM0qMGpcNrsXNgW0PkZckzowOPJ0MvuGFBa5KaBGlUw6KV5rqJT_b_CXxt9LGnyzABCs_HR9R2HbYsYwrNguw2SHQL4T0RTSzs4lYQiCMnKY9HJmCULbEGDtvIkRWQN8YvZsBugOK6eKTKd0C6fYET3Z-P0aREwHqeU3ut8pe-ohKrdUS1aHNMkkrO_tTRjRMBfW02d8biYI439FtMiBbgrkGQGr2ase0xZbqfOBfDvn8Gh0ed394VLTSkyvAK3_LuzijG7UlQ4DAo6iTY3rficNWrVRhJWX9ZG7X5XHx9xdtjmRg60HkYTUAIxltHitEnpDlEWqGysdO9XAOiKN1ONgiPE8Omx-jzWv7YqC_fo5APjyY95EIqMTUeftkH9_BZk3sDXvMfFzEk-bVvJrcLA6QlpnrDgBNdgULUeXmJ1NAcQ7DKYge-qfvDFr9sAoUL_7tzpXPzzOqEvpMc8xQz_WDMsUF5MNoSDo96m_2nANxrQpJozuPq)**
---
| | • | $50 puts our ad in front of 500 Virginia voters who haven't seen the truth yet.
---|---
• | $250 funds a full day of digital outreach to low propensity voters.
• | $1,000 helps us match Jeffries dollar-for-dollar in a single media market for 24 hours.
If this map passes, here is what happens: **Four Republican congressional seats could be eliminated before a single vote is cast in November.** Putting us in a dangerous spot heading into November's midterm elections. Hakeem Jeffries made a calculation: if he spent enough money in Virginia fast enough, he could win before Republicans could respond. He is now at $20 million. Twenty million dollars in television, digital, and direct mail -- all of it pushing a single message based on lies to Virginia voters: vote yes. Voters are not falling for the lies claiming this map is 'fair.' Nonpartisan political scientists (read: Liberals) have called it the most lopsided gerrymander in United States history. But Jeffries isn't buying fairness. He's buying repetition. And repetition, at $20 million worth of frequency, starts to sound like truth. If we don't have the resources to respond at scale, he's going to get away with it. **[That’s why we need you to step up - right now.](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=9bb248f57db04ec5900b54e225be410b&_e=SWZf4OTf-KrM0qMGpcNrsXNgW0PkZckzowOPJ0MvuGFBa5KaBGlUw6KV5rqJT_b_CXxt9LGnyzABCs_HR9R2HbYsYwrNguw2SHQL4T0RTSzs4lYQiCMnKY9HJmCULbEGDtvIkRWQN8YvZsBugOK6eNXVZ6nwum18uvQ6zWWGLzx9CJXsbFoS37RfEFh_g-fJPzamu3a0arYkrJeL3WV4-ZuG9xEhHQtwiC_SbSfsRnLvpZXkJ7uC5we4oWZhvH_9YNGxFOZxCuoOg8O4urhYnJArUW-G5WgYKOK1sqOdo6jeLGZwXiJoWiCcOgekHz_QNPefr5TYz1pj-71zk-et9dJupxv7mln4aEPpAJ00I9jxBySQ4c-HxrRLgcrHqax7es0ATSo6kg43tLBXzt9WLNQIAF-UNm7ASR4EDen6ZnfXXiy4dKmFQjZmTEQkjMyf_iprB8aYu7QuC_sYW_TRhUOwZ6sJHdxN1ed714_n4T93FJPN2aLVLJzA_OziBhnA)**
| [ DONATE ](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=9bb248f57db04ec5900b54e225be410b&_e=SWZf4OTf-KrM0qMGpcNrsXNgW0PkZckzowOPJ0MvuGFBa5KaBGlUw6KV5rqJT_b_CXxt9LGnyzABCs_HR9R2HbYsYwrNguw2SHQL4T0RTSzs4lYQiCMnKY9HJmCULbEGDtvIkRWQN8YvZsBugOK6eLDEyAQeZq8BAWnqXlnDgKguwGzC-TopIQDusV8vcBPH3ENC466qJ0bMDcJtvirzUAG3O7qW6ayerTwFmLC72CGWCSi1I7rxiNUBtjQyw1Dy9OlYdyzYe-IGG5t2dCFhQJcJhHc6-hPUttLRrm5onUBpAbWfi9euOJErsoYMOImuPmjmq_sBsSn8VDwJwUTbISOWWdFBZo3Db5WtxTNCr5x76qKfvRd7O8Z_5PdYO9vX4JLmwlNfsZ39q8zc6sbLoRJEsE2L-obV88_m6zccI9jpeePfemYsCdP_ykV4X5anaq3A0tEZNFXh4671-E272CtJuH8Ft4os_1SiIWmCIiU-XI1Olg5aaUzuKtCHJr3m)
---
The clock is running. Virginia voters are making up their minds right now and casting their ballots early. I wouldn't ask if this weren't the most urgent fight I've seen in years.

-- Speaker Mike Johnson

| Paid For by Virginians For Fair Maps
---

P.O. Box 1472
Richmond, VA 23218 [Unsubscribe](https://links.stayinformednow.net/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_s=9bb248f57db04ec5900b54e225be410b&_t=3KwZA-1c_cFzA3dTj-5c0Ec__MeQpVLWoTPDeZXhWmi_8Arap2uPxY64w1s-2SGxlzxDuWUbTdmLL0nNiE-NimGvcDjfz1ijeAGa0MbTx9d_7DcxQY34PLMMPKgJXOa3)

name: Jamie Davis (D-LA)
subject: Why does my opponent hate the working class?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/617370535A5771373630636B76786346755272494B6376314E4C57646366366C5575352B4C6339657071684B6F454D51395479643654426241786B6A6454752B/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202026-01-27%20at%2011.11.49%20AM.png]
My name is Alex Vindman, and I wanted you to hear directly from me: I am running for the United States Senate in Florida.
I’ll explain more about why I chose to run, but if you already know the stakes of this race — and are fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s top ally in the Senate — then please become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild:
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-vindman]
I swore an oath to protect this country when I joined the U.S. Army more than two decades ago.
In 2019, I honored that oath by blowing the whistle on Donald Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine, an act that led to Trump’s first impeachment and ultimately cost me my military career.
People told me to keep my head down. But my family came here as refugees to escape tyranny. I sure as hell wasn’t going to bow down to a wannabe tyrant.
This president unleashed a reign of terror and retribution, not just against me and my family, but against all of us.
Today, our country is in chaos. We are entering a dark chapter of American history, one that echoes early stages of authoritarian power consolidation seen elsewhere.
Thug militias attacking citizens. Tariffs pushing prices sky-high. Healthcare premiums through the roof. While all of this is happening, my opponent refuses to put the interests of the American people before her own self-interest.
Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets.
They put Ashley Moody in the Senate to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaires. She’s not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs.
We need someone who isn’t afraid to put a check on an outlaw president, to defend our democracy, and to make sure that every American has a fair chance at prosperity.
That is why I am running for Senate, and why I am humbly asking you:
Will you split a donation of any amount between my Senate campaign in Florida and Resist Reclaim Rebuild before midnight? Your donations add up quickly when everyone is chipping in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-vindman]
CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP DEMS FLIP THE SENATE! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-vindman]
The billionaires and special interests will throw everything they’ve got to try and stop us. But in the infantry, we didn’t back down from a fight — we went towards it. Join me.
Thank you.
Alex Vindman
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.
PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW.RESISTRECLAIMREBUILD.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.
Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

clean_body: Retired Navy Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher is the Democrat running to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2026, and she’s our best chance ever to finally put an end to Boebert’s embarrassing political career. Hello, Lauren Boebert is only still in Congress because of 546 votes... You read that right. 546 votes. Retired Navy Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher is the Democrat running to defeat Lauren Boebert this November, and she’s our best chance ever to finally put an end to Boebert’s embarrassing political career. But Lauren Boebert has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs, Elon Musk, and special interests. And she’s going to spend it saying anything she can to try to win reelection again. Eileen can defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all and flip this seat blue, but she’s counting on you to chip in right now to her campaign – before our critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – if she’s going to win. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Eileen’s not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert, so no amount is too small. name: Katie Porter
subject: The talking heads will be looking at this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Dear Peter,
In just a few hours, our campaign will have to publicly report our grassroots fundraising so far this year. With so many voters still undecided, _everyone_ will be looking at our numbers to see the strength of this campaign.
Our team set a $300,000 goal to make sure the number we report is as big as possible. Can you use this custom link to chip in any amount that makes sense to you?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260418_3_ak?refcode=em20260418-41169](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260418_3_ak.fbvC31&refcode=em20260418-41169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=41169%2E3422442%2EnEgXB5)**
**I want you to hear it from me: we can win this race.** If enough people chip in as little as $5 or as much as they can afford, we can overcome the millions my billionaire and far-right opponents are spending to defeat us.
Tonight’s reporting deadline is a big deal for our campaign, and something the talking heads will use to compare our movement to the other candidates.
I’ve been on the road with my whiteboard to meet with voters and rally support, but none of that would be possible without people like you standing with me over the past year.
In a state as large as California, grassroots support can make the difference between winning and losing. We only have a few weeks to get our message to the voters we need to win this race.
That’s why this goal is so important, and why I’d be honored to have your support. Donate $5 or any amount that makes sense to you before our midnight deadline.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260418_3_ak?refcode=em20260418-41169](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260418_3_ak.fbvC31&refcode=em20260418-41169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=41169%2E3422442%2EnEgXB5)**
Thank you,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41169&t=3&akid=41169%2E3422442%2EnEgXB5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41169)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41169&t=4&akid=41169%2E3422442%2EnEgXB5)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

Our Fighting for the California Dream town hall in Los Angeles today was incredible — and humbling. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129736518/615396106/-1978189107?refcode2=4da91a85-8c3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&refcode=em260418-2-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRhOTFhODUtOGMzYi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tjBeZTUuZvATMeUpLTs6dNB6bGU5Y_72WEp1oURxmLY=) We were joined by a huge crowd of union members, immigration advocates, Young Dems, and hard-working folks who want to protect the California Dream. It was extra special to be introduced by my beautiful wife, Carolina. And I'm so grateful to our special guests, Yvette Nicole Brown and Angelica Salas of CHIRLA Action Fund, for joining us. **Today’s rally was exactly what we needed to show our supporters and naysayers alike — we have the grassroots momentum to win this race.** But this kind of momentum only matters if we keep it going. What we do right now — after the rally, after the energy — matters just as much as what happened on that stage. Because the truth is, this race is only going to get tougher from here on out. Our opponents are going to respond with more money, more ads, and more attempts to drown us out. And time is running out before the primary. Our best way to respond now is by growing this movement. So on the heels of this incredible momentum, I am asking: [**Can you chip in $3 right now to help us build on this momentum? If you felt what we felt today, you know we can win this — but only if we stand together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129736519/615396107/-1978189107?refcode=em260418-2-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRhOTFhODUtOGMzYi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tjBeZTUuZvATMeUpLTs6dNB6bGU5Y_72WEp1oURxmLY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129736520/615396108/-1978189107?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em260418-2-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRhOTFhODUtOGMzYi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tjBeZTUuZvATMeUpLTs6dNB6bGU5Y_72WEp1oURxmLY=)

clean_body: Now we build on it and move forward | Our Fighting for the California Dream town hall in Los Angeles today was incredible — and humbling. = We were joined by a huge crowd of union members, immigration advocates, Young Dems, and hard-working folks who want to protect the California Dream. It was extra special to be introduced by my beautiful wife, Carolina. And I'm so grateful to our special guests, Yvette Nicole Brown and Angelica Salas of CHIRLA Action Fund, for joining us. Today’s rally was exactly what we needed to show our supporters and naysayers alike — we have the grassroots momentum to win this race. But this kind of momentum only matters if we keep it going. What we do right now — after the rally, after the energy — matters just as much as what happened on that stage. Because the truth is, this race is only going to get tougher from here on out. Our opponents are going to respond with more money, more ads, and more attempts to drown us out. And time is running out before the primary. Our best way to respond now is by growing this movement. So on the heels of this incredible momentum, I am asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me. Xavier = | = Becerra for Governor 2026 330 N Brand Blvd Suite 700 Glendale, CA 91203 United States mailto:info@xavierbecerra2026.com | Paid for by Becerra for Governor 2026

body:
He was wrong to begin with, and has just gotten worse

| | |
# [Kash Must Go. He Cannot Remain FBI Director](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3318463a-bbe8-4827-8173-d7d4abfd4b44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf56b48e7-b031-4d33-ac83-7fc2358d29c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _([Go directly to petition](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0df48249-1d93-44eb-9db0-89cd869a299f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [More actions here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7336c950-87e4-4f61-8542-02ee7efd4f44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d01ca84-5e0e-4d67-919a-2aff776cb95f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ Kash Patel was an abusrd choice for FBI Director, with zero qualifications for this critically important position. But a bombshell new [report](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bd48548-c423-4785-ba5e-04b6a56889f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) now adds some frightening new details -- bouts of excessive drinking, unexplained absences, and other utterly bizarre behavior that is making people across the political spectrum call for his ouster as soon as possible. **[Sign On: “Kash Patel Cannot Remain as FBI Director”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a795ad4-a6ca-44fd-acc8-c154ec0941f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** And this was hardly the beginning: _“Patel’s behavior on the job — including his use of the FBI’s private jet and the bureau’s [security detail for personal reasons](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0759c19-3f02-412a-a0c8-fb05e8632b98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) — have come under the scrutiny of lawmakers. A video of the FBI director in February [guzzling beer with the U.S. men’s Olympic hockey team ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T154b609a-1e1c-41cd-a2ad-075e22da4a85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)after it won the gold medal in Italy, during a trip that his spokesperson had said was for security meetings, sparked [outrage in FBI and DOJ circles](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f61bfe3-20c3-48ea-bb68-7ffd2a616a94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).” ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf037a6d-9b66-4b35-9dc3-33731fb36cd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ FBI director isn’t just any old job, it’s one that is essential to keeping us safe. And there’s no way Kash Patel should have it. **[Sign On: “Kash Patel Cannot Remain as FBI Director."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20a781b8-d2fb-4853-9721-df1a7b74be79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

clean_body: Peter, The Department of Homeland Security has been partially shut down for over 55 days \-- the longest in American history. "Over 55 days of hardworking Americans working without pay.Over 55 days of our national security at stake.Over 55 days of Democrats putting party politics over YOU." But what is Democrat Senator Tammy Duckworth doing? "Demanding that TSA require travelers to take off their shoes at airport security." Seriously \-- the radical Left isn't concerned about TSA getting paid or our country being secure.They're concerned about your shoes. Despite them focusing on harassing travelers instead of doing their actual job,the Department of Homeland Security is too vital to wait another day. "Forget the shoes. Demand that the radical Left OPEN THE DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY NOW and fund the agents who keep our streets safe>>" Paid for by Elect Common Sense. 11 Convent Road #25, Convent Station, NJ 07961 |

body:

**Postmaster General Warns Postal Service “Will Run Out of Money in 2027,” Could Halt All Deliveries** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20260418_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=23754%2E878179%2E9qLb8t) | [**WE NEED A SURGE OF SUPPORT TO SAVE USPS.

Destroying the Postal Service has been Trump’s plan ALL ALONG. And now, he’s even closer to eliminating it than we thought possible...

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: Why this Memorial Day matters more than ever
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | |
---
Friend,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za4s0e2hqr236u71o5sglcjj96hbhf3tuelhghh0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America's 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lpurc9dghr0utnk2u8kcl217m3k7ev6mrj6b20_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziq6l10rj4inqldsb7j2teoi58lhtj5t7jgbn0eo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpukv22f1295ngtic7srj1jbmlp1am0odet5jimg_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9bcfvkrcabbi3maeooova25tu5g132d9ed7ou68_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. _Bigger_ crowds. _More_ veterans. _More _young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstim159q21fqtfoik29h7hkfubl1mo49dlavq4g_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded ****_entirely_**** by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** **[Friend, as we look ahead to this historic event, can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z92a2jkq8hdembf68tud26a0gdasrtrtseccn588_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zirq4n0a9j03j00djtoc8r3p72emeef1hr2ngn28_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zka7t0941e04cdivcou2hg5agmhhslj9eprv3tn0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq49rt7pdcfca3e6kr2hms2v89uiqvdpmfuinln0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
| | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade during America's 250th birthday with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekf78isn62thg5o5upb48phqvmee61k3dne75r0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zro5nq8n9mh6bshj5go7bf3fbq194jqvk1s0klkg_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdmv3j9es2gdh8q86dcmnp72020e8j1es58ij3u0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7na8uimmcudlj1nnfh77jeem3bup1cj9ck2fu88_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
| | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250****th**** birthday overlap. ** **[Will you join AVC and me in making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's historic National Memorial Day parade to honor them one last time?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7v2u4gidmnvm5ank7a50jne36dl3cjvptit4ao0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf1d71s422vke1pnt6j3a5koh93sk5filo5cdnbg_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv0jt5tsngl83v3au1uj432ia5gh1k26254o5jo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America's 250****th**** birthday.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk1211oe5cunuvuae8ao5qvav25ps74uuictvldg_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
**P.S.** Friend, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. **[Please join AVC and me today in making this event possible with your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or whatever amount you can give.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziccvin801k60icsupob62tqacu50ra7gfqri6r0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc5g67nc2g98hutqe6pq6h92ag29k0pr9kmd7gjo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr2q1t91cdpnrpm39mi7tprregpujjnmqkmqb6oo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ae4rdt3r3ok7q47thbvqvgd53ctvi2aapqh4r0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[unsubscribe](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zvg64eel845s5qrd1os063n436dc12iiho2rrsu0) PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1li223tdrv5e31h2umb4nuq2h6t91blavts2tp8_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshim9o36ctge49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zidknq6ii18r70k70se7gqodhd41ftrr5b7mqvuo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlq7l6g40f372fmf8clj0sap422o70tpt6plkk60_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie4o72c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade during America's 250th birthday with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z22acmve70dvmn5umsdhnks4v7qcr6p8otd0oq08_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gorufuqg45v0b9v4pg4iltph3dn2b1ef66edvg_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1u9pss5p4um84skm7nm8n5ubu63h66aldvtmd78_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9e6vpahojojpq1uru3qo2jv203lod9bdaort0io_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
| | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250****th**** birthday overlap. ** **[Will you join AVC and me in making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's historic National Memorial Day parade to honor them one last time?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16nljdf4gntjljcrdrqvutuk6armg4446d8jrk8_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zac07dai7kerp5arkkn8c8g2jpl3k7vo778liad0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp6ql7ol9n25278s49i9dr0c99roadgdakhvhfvo_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America's 250****th**** birthday.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd9khho79e8g7v9senm91ei1ma8l6d1sbpj1j8e0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
**P.S.** Friend, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. **[Please join AVC and me today in making this event possible with your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or whatever amount you can give.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqoaqgvtdhm091cacapfe0mb5lvh9d6khao2fg08_rp22sh2s8i6epr3clie2or2cph2bs)**
---

---
Peter, This is the petty ad my opponent GOP Senator Bill Cassidy is running to try and survive a 3-way primary challenge from his right:
"Julia Letlow is with they/them. The woke mob will love liberal Julia Letlow."
And while Cassidy attacks Letlow, both her and the other MAGA ally in the race, state Treasurer John Fleming, are hitting Cassidy for being disloyal to Donald Trump.
Welcome to Louisiana politics, folks.
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MJCo0A6sOOwkVGfKhfhTf__rqU3FQzkIIla2VTqNmC4a_eww_eynngi7K21iJg5bYlfXV44GJU3BeDflIW0DgKN41aVJcgvPzFzk-tA5yrVrH27zGBBdSlYCj10q-8EPK1ZGEO7cBYQzCTnp7a2D0MWqIAC9bym9hoZL0keSTcXOLFvg0vFSHVKcmFERp_90RmLLuw2O5ZP7GXGetgszD8KyIIXi0N7l&c=aXHvWtrj1tIQhaun1NXzN_XQhI4rgaBESmMio85ut_jTfikmY3RDBA==&ch=WFBzUWFjnLnEuhJWgrjR8bIaPwXxwhyQMwijteG5nbDQPp0VyVklHw==)
---
But the truth is: nobody here loves any of these people. They just haven't been presented with a better alternative in quite some time.
I am the Democrat that can win the majority of voters in Louisiana--independents, Democrats, and yes even enough Republicans who are disgusted with the direction of the country and feel betrayed that their concerns about jobs, grocery and gas prices, healthcare, wages, and affordable housing have been completely ignored by Trump.
They feel betrayed - but they are receptive to a New Deal-style Democrat who stands for and with the people first and foremost.
As a Black farmer in the South, I know what it takes to survive on hard work. My family and I have put blood, sweat, and tears into our Delta land.
But I also know that the playing field is far from level. Our government has been captured by billionaires, Wall Street banks, and special interest groups who have put all the burden and toil on working people while taking away all the benefits.
Enough is enough. I am running to fight for all of us. And I need your help to win this thing and shock the nation when Louisiana elects its first Black Senator since Reconstruction.
[Peter, are you with me? I need as many folks from across the entire country coming together to win this November. Can you send in a donation of $25, $10, or more to help me reach people with our message of hope, prosperity, and change?](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MJCo0A6sOOwkVGfKhfhTf__rqU3FQzkIIla2VTqNmC4a_eww_eynngi7K21iJg5bEWUdZe-hNzbCmh1_ELS9bIN5hwRLd9yA-oq4MfYR04bvYhNnlIWGhgKfI-EX0maPxlq-uHoiV8WohM5Tb4B0L5jAmkMPSJ6GKRmbv3MIG-j1SgBfTNsgTAXCejBNAbydeoOsjphTQ2-4kknpJaFRfcnoehQOBNMh0rc54g7CSyM=&c=aXHvWtrj1tIQhaun1NXzN_XQhI4rgaBESmMio85ut_jTfikmY3RDBA==&ch=WFBzUWFjnLnEuhJWgrjR8bIaPwXxwhyQMwijteG5nbDQPp0VyVklHw==)

# Sunday, April 19, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1775, a group of colonial Minutemen engaged in their first battle with British regulars in Lexington and Concord, immortalized in the phrase: "The Shot Heard Round the World." [See Concord Museum Artifacts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy2yAQAL8GdWjghIQoKNKoe2lTarA4mcsgzkHIjvP1GecX0m6xs7M_vtavQJnK_Xs40Led14KvM2NrWNfE9bj-NCwncTk3Lo3Khb-e2woKJqmM1G6NgfJ7NV30OyLg0KHX1k6jGwCgS_62D3q_uX1CM9sJrcIJImw2jAbHwYWO_MemjHZaqWl0vXZh3oYdR5j1rKIRRmGkxrX_yVRawj2_-Ym13_josk-tPU4xfBOwCFg2LhvXeFwnXkfP9S5g4ZKpoMTfiW7UiIuApSWUZ-ImE4YaZeWrRPmBL645yvColKV2Uls7Cli66uPjRTnTOVlh1P0IlP8FtP-69vTwNwAA__8wiILN). The Montgomery Ward catalog once inspired the mail-order dreams of moms, dads, and children across the country, eventually expanding its footprint with department stores. But competition and evolving retail trends brought down the institution, as shown in ["Whatever Happened To?"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAYAE-Du1jwGTumoNjGXbbdEhH4bH8rfryAHWVP__RyhXeAmZHmz8M8LAVK228bUbc1m4SvGrA1LGbPJZ7_G6ZKOVWXU6N04r_LGeAw3bi8CWW8pfA2svN6RQQcOtTifp9GNQBAt2sr55Uj50pOYh6cd08-PicJ8ukVclAd6W8bl0IJzqdR9ULZ2Q0rjjCLmXvJJEdPLZf-b6bUdlzDO19YepdjF_Te2lHZ8IvBwmCxxe10YZ_LxmDx2CyFymCJObUtRyxv87LFG2ebDXkz9SiUNmOTN_WMEYsRahIfwCODBc6jK9ofLwqB6nRnkm_RUvjE24-OXRq-AgAA__8JhIH_) In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown unpacked a new report that suggested Joe Biden's first choice for Vice President in 2020 was not Kamala Harris. Who was it, and what ultimately drove the Kamala Harris selection? [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0Fu6yAQANDT4F0sGLCxFyz-V2Wpi3RRVeoSERjHVBgSPE6anr5qr9ALPOm9H-3RxRTz-cWtaGguNuN9S0iE1S6lrvsXYd5iyZsvmWLe8XrzFjj0B64OYrTBxfSwqglmRgSUDRqhdd-NEgCaxaCG3jsl0Uvfue6kFJ97p3HUnQpOiiaaH40rMQrO-25sxegGL2fsYBADD4opjiFSqe1HiZkWnNOj3LC2vqxNMgvRZWPyH4OJwfQoO-3tCRlMb9fP-n94tTY8MzkRk0-geVNNuNxjSnHrNVP8vLqYfiX6U_9m4DsAAP__W_1ttg). ## Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz Amid Blockade
Iranian military officials [claimed "strict control" in the Strait of Hormuz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Ltu6zAMBuCnsTcZuvmiQcNZsuWsHQ1VomMWspRKjI306Qv38gSdCJIAwe9_uc5XhxHT7b_bwNKS5wRHjUAEZV5z2R4fBKliTtXnRJge8L77WXI5MK6ZMHNwGJ-zboNdACSoFqwYx6E3SkrZrtY7WLichDKjUB6UXIIHqdWoFWhtRIv2vMa1MILzoTedMG7yaoFeTmLiQTeaQ0DKpXvLmGiFJT7zDqXzeWujXYnutVH_Gnlp5OU4ji69-lNx7s9JLjE08oLFpZ_CCuB2zxUqq1TQEztxJcezdUjsW848EqYb-5UH9qgsud1FVnxySvNx6Ntiw_3AGLEOY6P5bXMYv16jP-W5W_kZAAD__xAZjSI) on Saturday, just one day after declaring the waterway "completely open." Merchant vessels attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday received radio messages from Iran's navy [telling them they were not allowed to pass](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHS2yAUBODToA4NPAlkCoo06v60KTUEHjIZBA48S2OfPuPkCGm32Nn9fnxtXy7lVPbv7kBLsW4Fr56RCNt2r-14vglLT7V0Xwul8sTfp99AgOZi5tJswaX82uYh2IgIOA1o5bJoZSYAGO42GuHRgZl-SjVpp_Ui9S0G5cArtUxhSPbTJmZppBBamVEad_NTRAU3eRNhZrPAkKi28VdNhe4Y86ue2EZfjyHbO9Gjs-kbg5XBel3X2Mp79HUsbwbr584nri0HBqsysGjNYA0YkyvED-zd7chjqwdPzRXuOj-xd8ydOyI8HpTKzqly32rv_B8Kb_iojfj-LDE1HJoNjyvlnLpe2Cz2w6X8dx_9F-pp4U8AAAD___xDjls), while two ships reported being hit by gunfire. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that it would continue to block transit through the strait [as long as the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports remained in effect](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3S2yAQRZ8GdXhghf4KijR0TptSg9FibYLAgbU9ztNnlDzCV9-ZM_ecH9f16ilRvn_3B1qOZc34bgmZsa57qcfzD2NuVHILJTPlJ_5-hRUUjFIZqZd185Q-q-k2GxEB-w6tnqZxWHoA6HYLajODWjxOEG79LXg1zEoHvxjt4wzYkT1pyuhFKzUOy0Uvfg59xAFmPavNCKNwIy718rNQ5h1j-pQX1ksoR5fszvxoov8mwAlw-fMojc9JgDvBApwyApyeBbhnk6efAEfVZxmpYpMlS_b5F1aZ0VdZDp-lj4xVVpQhlUb5LhtXTyxLlP-rCHBdtdvjTSlRGydh1P3wlP6d4i-VfFn4GwAA___ZLIge). The announcement of the opening of the waterway on Friday [sent U.S. stocks to record highs on Friday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOkf-wYALF9uky7ZbosEewmyMzZpJouzTX3Ff4ZZHRzo63_fnNt2AEuX7b9jQ81KmjO8jITPWaS11e_5nzAeVfISSmfIT_73CpKXuheyEclMESp-pa6NfEDWaFr0aht46o7VuVx9HM47WBa2ksyqC7GersAOQBoZgQ0v-XJOdckrK3rqLcjAGs6DVoxpl7JpOYiQu9fK3UOYVl_QpL6yXULY2-ZV5Pxrzq9HXRl9hPwHO6gyVKSRs9PXgEh5ig_pAPgTX57aLQklQhSzeUIWVqOS8aAA3y7m3Y7AK1RBng7OZlWmrj_ubUqKjH5pO3jeg9P2Af6Tt5fVXAAAA__8_w4EC), while the price for U.S. oil dropped 9.4%.
## Ruling Allows White House to Resume Ballroom Project
Construction of a $400 million ballroom project at the White House will continue after a U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia [granted an administrative stay](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OrSAUhZ9GOw0C_lBQ3Mbu3HZKg7A5MkG2A9tjzjz9xHmF6VbyJWtlfR-P5WFCDOn53-ygyeOS4CoRiCAvG-b9_CZIJWAqFhOFdMLXyy6c8aFhsunU4kyI70XWTnsADqIG3Y3j0CvBOa837SbfqVHZQXLBjBC99f26ykl5J2BQvg76bmOyUx1jQ6_aTpnJCg89n7qJOVlJBi4Q5vYTQ6INfHzjC3Jrca-j3oiOUol_FZ8rPl_X1dq13C9uXvH5jjfYAkGz4VmgWU2MGXFvLKZC-bQUMDXmOMDE0lg8M1V8rrN2xxViDGUYK8meuwnxd5T-ZOql-U8AAAD__20yf-E) on Friday that blocked most above-ground construction last week. The Justice Department appeal came after U.S. District Judge Richard Leon temporarily blocked construction in March. The 2-1 ruling from the circuit court provided temporary relief, allowing "the court sufficient opportunity [to consider the emergency motion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GMy1owZ-AYBOz2XRDi5F27C0EF9qxZp_-lvcVbn7qnPN9fx7zw1Gg-PrtdrS8pjniVQIyY563lPfzP2MslGJZUmSKJ_57LzNI6GqpazXO3lH4zLrydkUEbCu0qu87M7YAUG3WgFQDuEG3Bp9u6ZanNAa80b1UahxMRfZuk1qNSsrOjI0a3bC0KxoY1CC9FlqiJ065-Zso8oZr-KQ35mZJexXsxnwU0f4SMAmYrutqeMPX6bInF--MgOks9c0lYLq3BEzuyAImNQiYOJ_7UTu_U6TC2TGlWF8bMdZbOgvWTxdCTmmvsvXHRSFQ6Xqh5Wt3FL5P8I_MvS18BQAA__-RNoMN) for a stay pending appeal." The Justice Department argued that Leon's ruling "would imperil the President and national security and indefinitely leave a large hole beside the Executive Residence." The case [stems from a lawsuit filed late last year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFypDAQBNCvgUyUJECgQMElZHvphZRODMvcCQ2WhsXrr3ety3_guKtedfef23zzGDHdf_sdHK80J7hKBGbI80Z5Pz8YUkFKJVBiTCe8PcKspTZCdkLZefEYn3NXL24F0NDW4NQwmN62Wut6cz1YtZjBKiW9tGYdVR-WoZWmC0ZrGGp0L012yiopTW8bZf0Y2hV6PapRLl3VSViQKTf_CBNvsMYnPSA3gfY6uo35KFX7q9JTpafrupqV3l8rXnmlp4MiMoZS6ckfB_hYRKAzs4jARXA-90NkKOcO4tqQQWx0FhB_fYyZaBeBUuF8BkZKogD8LyLSBflbCdFn5Ged3XJcGCMWM1SdvO8e41dD_tGtD6c_AwAA__9azZFY) by the National Trust for Historic Preservation, which argued that the project violates multiple federal laws.
## Outcomes Vary for Fast Food Leftovers
Fast food restaurants feed millions of visitors each day, often preparing more food than they sell and [creating lots of leftovers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkUGu2yAQQE-Dd0RmsLG98CLql9VNuu3S4sMQpsWQArGVnr5y1Bv85dMbjeZpft7Wm6ZA8f5DbzhXl9aIRwlYK-bVp7w9_1aMhVIsJsVK8Yl_drNCC4q3HRfTajWF19o1dnaIgLLBWQyD6icJAI2fxwmM7HpEpcwgnBCjaJWTIw4WQZqpofnc1nZiEm2r-ukiJj0a6bCHUYyt7VjXoqWa8uVXolg9uvBKO-aLSVsTZl_rozB5ZbAwWI7juGwlno7BgpE_C4PFpWR1tDZT_P0fz04GS_VUOBV-eF35Kz0zd3pPmSpyp0vl5yg3XlMs3CZ-UPU8oKvnAW_JYNGZX68g5LfvNyaXZMgy-eEfW4kMlNnfqCYEaz617XXX9cJq7C0gTNaOQ2_gk4FCYvKjH5o828dBIVBRA-va-6YpvFvrlx60z_AvAAD__9ZXpEU). More than 2,500 Chick-fil-A locations participate in the [Shared Table Program](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFywyAQQNHTSJ00aIUEFBRp3DltSgbDymyCwAFsjXP6jHOF9H9e8T_O5mwpUrq-2x1127JJeNSIrWExIZf9_tMwVcqpupwapTt-P5wBBuvA-DAp4y3Fp-G91xsi4NyjnoRYFzUDQB80yEUJkEoBF5ajwNleADk4eVkXu7qe9EtjfFITY-uixklZ6eYNF5CTZJ53nKGnlsv4mSm1gFt85geW0eW9jzq0dqvd_NbBqYPTcRyjC-S-ho3iYF9NB6cabEE_NHuJ2BftbwfFSHUVHWfX3VL8s9q_Bjw0_AYAAP__V_9veA) to donate prepared food to local nonprofits and community organizations, helping create more than 42 million meals since 2012. Dunkin' allows its franchises to participate in the [End of Day Donations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyszAQhJ8GOhjpQCAKFX9D579NycjSCS4ROkcIe5ynzzh5hNS7s_vN93ZZLpYipfW_3dGUwEvCxxGxFMzLxnk_vwqmgzgdjlOhdOLn3S0gYGhE38hp8Zbic-lrbwIiYFejkeM4qKkDgHozzmPnA1xHh8o6PSjt5BS0sl4BCg01mdea6OUkhRjU1MrJatcFVKClFr6veoGeCuf2nSmVDUN88h1z63ivo9lKuR1V96-CuYL5hd_6M31Q8pzOcrxaFczXyGsF82_SBGbfeE62EKfmlnnNdq-z8bcHxUjHMFa9WHdL8eek_MnM3cB3AAAA__8lznqH) program, offering surplus bakery items to nonprofits and hunger-relief programs. Others take a different approach. Wendy's focuses on minimizing overproduction, while McDonalds does not donate any leftovers, citing food safety policy.

**Whatever happened to Montgomery Ward?** Long before Amazon Prime, there was the Montgomery Ward catalog--a thick wish-book that arrived in your mailbox like Christmas itself. Founded in 1872 by Aaron Montgomery Ward, the company pioneered mail-order shopping, bringing everything from farm equipment to fashion to rural America's doorstep. Its 1875 promise--"satisfaction guaranteed or your money back" --was a radical idea that became the foundation of modern retail. Customers across America flipped through hundreds of pages, circled items in pen, and waited weeks for their orders to arrive at the local depot. [You can flip through the 1961 catalog here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAYAE-Du1jwGTumoNjGXbbdEhH4bH8rfryAHWVP__RyhXeAmZHmz8M8LAVK228bUbc1m4SvGrA1LGbPJZ7_G6ZKOVWXU6N04r_LGeAw3bi8CWW8pfA2svN6RQQcOtTifp9GNQBAt2sr55Uj50pOYh6cd08-PicJ8ukVclAd6W8bl0IJzqdR9ULZ2Q0rjjCLmXvJJEdPLZf-b6bUdlzDO19YepdjF_Te2lHZ8IvBwmCxxe10YZ_LxmDx2CyFymCJObUtRyxv87LFG2ebDXkz9SiUNmOTN_WMEYsRahIfwCODBc6jK9ofLwqB6nRnkm_RUvjE24-OXRq-AgAA__8JhIH_). You could buy almost anything from Wards, including an entire house: Between 1908 and 1940, the company sold more than 32,000 [mail-order kit homes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFy6yAQANDToM4aWCFsFRS_UeffptQwsJI2QawDa3uc02eSK-QCr3hv1-UaKFPZ_ocDvay8FHy2jCJYl53rcf8SLI24tMhFqNzx8xEX0OBO2p7MtKRA-bXYLvkVEXDo0Jvz2Y3TAADd7l0yGnAwTo_rmNzqQFuNcUwxDmlyoSP_o2lrJqO1G6feTOEShxVHuJiLTlZZjYmEa__OVGTHNb_4gbWPfHTZ7yK3poZ_CmYF8wfJzveGree6KZiFbxQVzAcX2fjA-jo9Q00K5q76dHtSztTcWVm9HYHyryl_inh4-A4AAP__S6hy8Q), shipped by rail and assembled on site. Some still stand today. The Christmas catalog was legendary. Kids memorized the toy section, dog-earing pages of Schwinn bikes, Radio Flyer wagons, and baby dolls. Moms ordered appliances and curtains for the living room. Dads browsed power tools and wrenches. And in 1939, a Wards copywriter named Robert May wrote a giveaway Christmas booklet for shoppers about a misfit red-nosed reindeer named Rudolph, a promotional throwaway that became one of the most beloved holiday stories ever told. Montgomery Ward department stores became fixtures in American towns, with their distinctive green awnings and automotive centers. But the company stumbled badly in the late 20th century. It killed its iconic catalog in 1985--fifteen years before the stores themselves would fall--abandoning the very thing that had built it. [Management missteps,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc2O0zAUhZ_G2bmynZ82iywGUFh1qmHBiFV0a18nBsc32E4y6dOjwiOwPTrnSJ--9-twBeddGF9hxi5bGgLuyWPOGIeJ4rw-MobkKCRNIbuw4u9ND0qohouKy3Yw4PwxVIXpLKLCssBOns9N3ZZKqWLqZKW11MbKpgbQF2jLWtWqPd8vwraVloXrnm-ikq0Uoqnbk2zhokuLtbrIizAVqwQalymefpILeULrD9ownjTNhe-mnJfEyhemeqb6fd9PE4LRtIasyVrEZ4-p_u5pTEz1_0L-5GSqzxNyC95zsnymkEeaMR58h2j4RDsHHjGD83xxFBAj95Qyf65gxug0BD5D_IV58aCRlX2KyWdnWPnlxc6fbrRstwcOhwDz1mcDuF4_Ph5bfKXte72-g6nDtx7Gz-OP-9txM9NX3hSxM8vuvHepObNKjDM4_xc2_5ehrVN_AgAA__-KbKtm) a botched pivot to specialty stores, and relentless pressure from Walmart and Target did the rest. After a 1997 bankruptcy and a failed turnaround, Wards announced its liquidation on December 28, 2000, and the last stores closed in May 2001, ending a 128-year run. Today, the brand name survives online, selling furniture and home goods, but it's a ghost of its former glory. Those thick catalogs are now collector's items, reminders of when shopping meant dreaming through pages, not scrolling through screens. _Did you ever get the Montgomery Ward catalog in the mail, or order something from it? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that it would continue to block transit through the strait . The announcement of the opening of the waterway on Friday , while the price for U.S. oil dropped 9.4%. Ruling Allows White House to Resume Ballroom Project Construction of a $400 million ballroom project at the White House will continue after a U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia on Friday that blocked most above-ground construction last week. The Justice Department appeal came after U.S. District Judge Richard Leon temporarily blocked construction in March. The 2-1 ruling from the circuit court provided temporary relief, allowing "the court sufficient opportunity for a stay pending appeal." The Justice Department argued that Leon's ruling "would imperil the President and national security and indefinitely leave a large hole beside the Executive Residence." The case by the National Trust for Historic Preservation, which argued that the project violates multiple federal laws. Outcomes Vary for Fast Food Leftovers Fast food restaurants feed millions of visitors each day, often preparing more food than they sell and . More than 2,500 Chick-fil-A locations participate in the to donate prepared food to local nonprofits and community organizations, helping create more than 42 million meals since 2012. Dunkin' allows its franchises to participate in the program, offering surplus bakery items to nonprofits and hunger-relief programs. Others take a different approach. Wendy's focuses on minimizing overproduction, while McDonalds does not donate any leftovers, citing food safety policy. [[Watch the Full Video ->]]() | Whatever happened to Montgomery Ward? Long before Amazon Prime, there was the Montgomery Ward catalog--a thick wish-book that arrived in your mailbox like Christmas itself. Founded in 1872 by Aaron Montgomery Ward, the company pioneered mail-order shopping, bringing everything from farm equipment to fashion to rural America's doorstep. Its 1875 promise--"satisfaction guaranteed or your money back" --was a radical idea that became the foundation of modern retail. Customers across America flipped through hundreds of pages, circled items in pen, and waited weeks for their orders to arrive at the local depot. . You could buy almost anything from Wards, including an entire house: Between 1908 and 1940, the company sold more than 32,000 , shipped by rail and assembled on site. Some still stand today. The Christmas catalog was legendary. Kids memorized the toy section, dog-earing pages of Schwinn bikes, Radio Flyer wagons, and baby dolls. Moms ordered appliances and curtains for the living room. Dads browsed power tools and wrenches. And in 1939, a Wards copywriter named Robert May wrote a giveaway Christmas booklet for shoppers about a misfit red-nosed reindeer named Rudolph, a promotional throwaway that became one of the most beloved holiday stories ever told. Montgomery Ward department stores became fixtures in American towns, with their distinctive green awnings and automotive centers. But the company stumbled badly in the late 20th century. It killed its iconic catalog in 1985--fifteen years before the stores themselves would fall--abandoning the very thing that had built it. a botched pivot to specialty stores, and relentless pressure from Walmart and Target did the rest. After a 1997 bankruptcy and a failed turnaround, Wards announced its liquidation on December 28, 2000, and the last stores closed in May 2001, ending a 128-year run. Today, the brand name survives online, selling furniture and home goods, but it's a ghost of its former glory. Those thick catalogs are now collector's items, reminders of when shopping meant dreaming through pages, not scrolling through screens. Did you ever get the Montgomery Ward catalog in the mail, or order something from it? subject: Friend, Alice was sold until someone stepped in
body:
She was rescued. Many are still waiting. You can help find them.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e917068/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvaHJqVnREdWdEcA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTk/LbmNsYW9CU2dkMQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNyR0JDZWJ3dDlSMGVscw/gaeSs8w/s1s2e5bb1c6)
| |
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend, A little girl sat alone in the dark. Lured online by someone pretending to care and taken from her home. Kidnapped and hidden away in a remote cabin, where she was abused, and sold online. And passed from one man to another. **Her name is Alice.**
---
[ Rescue A Child Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
And this is the part most people never hear. **She was found. An investigator in Florida traced her trafficker’s username. He saw a connection others missed and contacted the FBI.** Agents followed the digital trail, tracing the trafficker’s **IP address**. They moved in, raided the location and rescued her. **Alive.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Her trafficker now faces **20 years to life** in prison. This is what happens when someone goes looking.
This is what happens when the right tools are in place. But there are still so many children who have not been found yet. Still waiting.
Still trapped.
---
[ Rescue A Child Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
And that is why the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** exists. Friend, if this is your first time hearing about us, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation’s** mission is clear: **_To stop the sale of God’s children._** The foundation extends the reach of the _Sound of Freedom_ film, bringing awareness to the reality of child trafficking and taking action to stop it. Our vision is simple: **_A world where every child is safe and free._** We work with partners to prevent exploitation before it begins, support rescue operations, and equip investigators. Our partners walk with survivors as they heal and rebuild their lives. Because rescue is only the beginning. And right now, there is an urgent need. We are launching ** _Operation Search and Rescue,_** a __ mission to connect investigators and agents, identify traffickers, and build criminal evidence.

We will support real rescue operations using tools like **digital tracking and face recognition**. This is how children are found and how traffickers are stopped.
And today, you can be part of it. **And right now, your donation will be matched, dollar for dollar.** **A concerned Child Defense Organization** **has approved** **a** **$10,000 MATCHING GRANT**.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Every dollar you give will be **doubled**. **$25 Gift Doubles to $50**
**$50 Gift Doubles to $100**
**$100 Gift Doubles to $200**
**$250 Gift Doubles to $500**
**$500 Gift Doubles to $1,000** Your gift goes twice as far to help find and rescue children. **This is God multiplying love.** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**[Your donation of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can give today can have twice the impact, and double the chance to bring a child home.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Double My Impact Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jesus said, _“Whoever welcomes one little child like this in my name welcomes me.”_(Matthew 18:5) **Today you can be that welcome.**
**You can enable the search and help the rescue mission to bring a child home.** Please give as generously as you can while your gift is matched. And please pray for Alice, and for the children still waiting.
And for the day when every child is safe and free. **Because**** _God’s children are not for sale._** With gratitude and prayer,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

Because God’s children are not for sale._ With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verástegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: James O'Keefe
subject: “Sign his name. Here’s a dollar.” — We got it all on camera.
body:
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUPv-cp100tnhIFvWEgw3aXZjzOiy-yFJq-1PUbUmimbAe5dckNcbT3Tn704EwurDAn25Ntyk-AgjlISn8XSUj5B0vjFPyvEDhnwg "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| James O'Keefe | | | | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUQi7QFdjgDgKrlmYpYDUFXjeedSk8EjW6LpjMYSTi1CQnDgbk95qUR-5U7JeXSlDCsBjIhfg7ZzWAo8yt6edKKPaDJDFNc0l1hyg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")

---
| Dear Patriot,
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth — **a real voter’s identity.** “Sign his name,” the man said. “Just write what I tell you to write.” **[**We filmed the whole thing.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUR1rfkj7TdgumHQr96kmezzsbVUUlFLjx0PRHPhv3ArEsSeSt_vuTmhfHxotfR8GLz8HVXEFF6Zic5XWmVwJsZ-mAMkxoDUV-rwQ)

**[****](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUSQGNbmD22dogWc2nYi23a-eTRQFJZIceQrI_nsi5Z_In_X-FxV8d8Bg1cAAopjOyh9oEr1IYLmiR6ViQhBWojhceWGFzlUvswsQ) What you’re about to see is the most explosive hidden-camera footage my team has ever captured. Not speculation. Not anonymous sources. **Actual election crimes committed on camera — in broad daylight — on the streets of Los Angeles.** Over the course of several days, my undercover journalists documented petition circulators handing post-it notes with real voters’ names and addresses to homeless individuals, paying them cash — one to three dollars per signature — and instructing them to forge those voters’ signatures on official petitions and voter registration forms. We captured it **twenty-eight times.** That’s twenty-eight documented instances in just a few days of filming. Which means across Los Angeles County, this is happening **tens of thousands of times.** [****](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUTZR5qyWW2DOH3zRR1Gi49Ebg6SGMYVxqU4pNsfm4oSHAylRSTaFDNPA8WAPJEYsw7DZMCXP2CgLVtEg3IrOTTvLCrGphHzM1bHg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")**** | [ ▶ WATCH THE HIDDEN-CAMERA FOOTAGE AND CHIP IN $35 ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUUfHqbfyQCrZeAhnxRP3Tyf56HE2yPJpMQwYSmPDwEMgM0DyoGhw3PS_XTOPrAAT5I2JBETeiXNVPyrXrfHTng2j3YEpz54tKhOg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")
---
Let me walk you through what our cameras caught.
A voter named Vicky Walker. A voter named Paulson. A voter named Joseph Albright. Real people. Real identities. In each case, a petition coordinator handed a homeless person a sticky note bearing that voter’s information and told them to sign as if they were that person.
One coordinator was caught on camera admitting they get paid seven to ten dollars per signature. They’re turning around and paying homeless people a fraction of that — a dollar, sometimes three — to commit federal crimes on their behalf.
Let me be clear about what we’re talking about: **it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration.** What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically.
The New York Times told America this doesn’t happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. **We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape.**
And here’s what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called it “astounding.” NBC News covered it. The story is breaking through.
**But investigations like this are not free.**
Every dollar you give goes directly to fieldwork: $35 covers a day of undercover equipment costs. $50 covers the background research we do to identify real voters whose identities are being stolen. $100 funds a full day of field operations. $250 helps cover the legal costs of protecting our journalists when powerful people try to shut us down.
[****](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUVTQADuVKRxJA9IHN5_bmr1c9PeBQ0J4ZDfrsKjQsuc1pGLdkQd7UaCoUXMcVmiHt9DdsoqyakmxFwP767UJNt5fG6nHUbFq4jVQ "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")****
[ ▶ CHIP IN $50 TO KEEP OUR CAMERAS ROLLING ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUWn9WM-HGkFzLh4pwiQ12MbIJLQhHoKlDXbrpDfKmkXYdEqKeoD3z5JsCjsINN0Htw68R9dnn3pXqcvnW5UpL2Eslb4LX74yunOg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")
---
Think about what’s at stake. If petition circulators can forge voter signatures by the tens of thousands in broad daylight — paying homeless people with cash and cigarettes to impersonate real voters — and the system does nothing about it, then your vote is being diluted. Your voice is being stolen.
The only reason we know about this is because my team was there with hidden cameras. **No one else was going to expose this.** Not the Times. Not local officials. Not the people getting paid seven dollars a signature to look the other way.
We did it. And we need your help to keep doing it.
Can I count on you today?
[****](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUXTXC5uhlSh2mVA91xhDcHxma507iOTdd0oeTWm2iS-Ubu9JYV_5wwhvXwrq3cVCVLbl7TMZClPIQnG_G7oefjFrgRzjsGN6jnaQ "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")****
[ ▶ YES — RUSH $100 TO FUND THE NEXT INVESTIGATION ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUY1mZxtNbrtc31rkq3znoaJ-Bg-P317XMQN-aIrWK6_IT9sMXku7f2Y6mJqKTvyPBuzFYSbhh3ieh34D1FyuiLTqiQ9CkSFNUtfA "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** They said election fraud doesn’t happen. We filmed it twenty-eight times in a matter of days — real voters’ identities, forged by strangers for a dollar a signature. The White House has seen it. NBC has covered it. But the investigation isn’t over. **Your gift of $35, $50, or $100 today puts our cameras back on the street tomorrow.**
[****](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUZ4_s_cFP26a4bOeeaxSpXbhVUR84MnlzpiiM-s3B-z7LsRET4MUsTdenG70rL1yMjjXLTIvvrPbrRA4LehLOiNSkBPH0S-TtrJQ "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")****
[ Chip in right now. ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACE4ubUalnhvm8ml9v3LwaXOKxj2YzgUSDJXrM29lgFaXlX7jxn1IAC7H4HmbA-uRE7HW1HxeP01NBo9_3B5RxnUsFKgojsBPoYjxg1JXQ "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-om/?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22842_plr1&amount=25")

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: A historic opportunity to honor veterans this Memorial Day
body:
The National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.

| | |
---
Friend,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT2PnDAQhn-N6Xblr4V1QRFpRXcpokgprWE8gHUYk7HZ6P59xGXLNNfO-zF69P56828Q17jN3yFRz3XyXDwssdTMEfO-Z67HFutHzUvevJa6vUh7Ue706Sb0AQMobKhXXdfenO2kbJb-BtjdR9RGjqFzbSt1uFunbhOMNCkrm9ifVdIqp6RRxl1Rj3fVdndHt8kqZ4WVsBLXK9N-jGtE2CqU9ykz0hVzatZ-qXUvwnwTehB6KIQH0xU2CrmeDqEHSMRn8vKkSgxbuSBtlfiUnvhJ42fgD58oZY6wCjOUfDCSxxxImMePn4NzWnZCt0dNPlGIRxLmQQni-jr-SwjzWIADlHcP-PslIaQd4rwJ8_j_w4b7sP-J6xpL2wkr57P3k69-fY1nr_8GAAD__2UgnLA)
---
Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America's 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT2PnDAQhn-N6Xblr4V1QRFpRXcpokgprWE8gHUYk7HZ6P59xGXLNNfO-zF69P56828Q17jN3yFRz3XyXDwssdTMEfO-Z67HFutHzUvevJa6vUh7Ue706Sb0AQMobKhXXdfenO2kbJb-BtjdR9RGjqFzbSt1uFunbhOMNCkrm9ifVdIqp6RRxl1Rj3fVdndHt8kqZ4WVsBLXK9N-jGtE2CqU9ykz0hVzatZ-qXUvwnwTehB6KIQH0xU2CrmeDqEHSMRn8vKkSgxbuSBtlfiUnvhJ42fgD58oZY6wCjOUfDCSxxxImMePn4NzWnZCt0dNPlGIRxLmQQni-jr-SwjzWIADlHcP-PslIaQd4rwJ8_j_w4b7sP-J6xpL2wkr57P3k69-fY1nr_8GAAD__2UgnLA)**

The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. _Bigger_ crowds. _More_ veterans. _More _young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean.
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT2PnDAQhn-N6Xblr4V1QRFpRXcpokgprWE8gHUYk7HZ6P59xGXLNNfO-zF69P56828Q17jN3yFRz3XyXDwssdTMEfO-Z67HFutHzUvevJa6vUh7Ue706Sb0AQMobKhXXdfenO2kbJb-BtjdR9RGjqFzbSt1uFunbhOMNCkrm9ifVdIqp6RRxl1Rj3fVdndHt8kqZ4WVsBLXK9N-jGtE2CqU9ykz0hVzatZ-qXUvwnwTehB6KIQH0xU2CrmeDqEHSMRn8vKkSgxbuSBtlfiUnvhJ42fgD58oZY6wCjOUfDCSxxxImMePn4NzWnZCt0dNPlGIRxLmQQni-jr-SwjzWIADlHcP-PslIaQd4rwJ8_j_w4b7sP-J6xpL2wkr57P3k69-fY1nr_8GAAD__2UgnLA)

Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded ****_entirely_**** by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** **[Friend, as we look ahead to this historic event, can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkT2PnDAQhn-N6Xblr4V1QRFpRXcpokgprWE8gHUYk7HZ6P59xGXLNNfO-zF69P56828Q17jN3yFRz3XyXDwssdTMEfO-Z67HFutHzUvevJa6vUh7Ue706Sb0AQMobKhXXdfenO2kbJb-BtjdR9RGjqFzbSt1uFunbhOMNCkrm9ifVdIqp6RRxl1Rj3fVdndHt8kqZ4WVsBLXK9N-jGtE2CqU9ykz0hVzatZ-qXUvwnwTehB6KIQH0xU2CrmeDqEHSMRn8vKkSgxbuSBtlfiUnvhJ42fgD58oZY6wCjOUfDCSxxxImMePn4NzWnZCt0dNPlGIRxLmQQni-jr-SwjzWIADlHcP-PslIaQd4rwJ8_j_w4b7sP-J6xpL2wkr57P3k69-fY1nr_8GAAD__2UgnLA)**

clean_body: The National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade P.S. Friend, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday.
