name: Rebecca Weber
subject: Ban Non-Citizen Voting!
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasa6gp1q37rq79hhp339n7f95pedhhi4m6nqhi0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cdg69o36c1h2bs)
---
| | **Ban Non-Citizen Voting!**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, **[I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvggagm3q04cpj62fqm1ls92b75otngkt4hrrmq0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cdg69o36c1h2bs)** And at a moment like this, we are reaching out to Americans who still believe in election integrity, the Constitution, and the fundamental principle that **only citizens should decide our elections.** If you’ve ever heard of **AMAC Action** , you know that we are one of the nation’s leading conservative advocacy organizations—mobilizing millions of Americans to stand up for limited government, secure elections, and the values that made this country great.Right now, we need your voice. **[Please click here to submit your signed “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition in the next 48 hours.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfs00n5247ihsn839m1aanjktdg85bdicee25ago_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cdg69o36c1h2bs)** My friend, you know that with razor-thin margins in the House and Senate, all bets are off after the midterm elections. That means we must act **now** , while we still have the opportunity.We must **BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING** before it’s too late.Today, millions of illegal immigrants who entered the country are being counted in ways that directly impact political power.And that means:
---
* More congressional seats for states with large illegal populations
* More Electoral College votes
* More federal funding
* More political power

---
And more opportunity for non-citizens to end up on voter rolls.That’s exactly why AMAC Action launched this national petition drive.So far, **more than 100,000 petitions** have already been signed by concerned Americans.But it is not enough.**[To force action—to apply real pressure—we must reach 500,000 signed petitions.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqlphepp3j253018tg9tio33kf51m7kksubfla8_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cdg69o36c1h2bs)****Half a million.** That’s the kind of number that gets politicians’ attention.But without your signature, we won’t get there in time.To stop non-citizen voting, concerned citizens across the country must send one loud and unmistakable message:
---
1. **Only American citizens should be counted in the census.**
2. **Only American citizens should have a vote.**

---

subject: Trump's CDC pick, a Rare Taylor Swift Guitar, Celebs Buy Building
body:
President Trump selected [Dr. Jennifer Shuford](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUxvGnwU4HjqBSUNyGLrfd0iGcY2QXxQESk7ffSV5h-_98v5nv6zJfXIhhv_13G5n6XNK801ki1Up5rvm-HcWjP4L_cdllqu4VUy4zcBhaLluhZ3QhvmbZoLly1KIhI8ZxUHpQSjWrIT0BChwnroQUig-oF-dxUaPqAdXUBPMe41JoITj0qoNBO5QDTrJ3oyPJJCcMNeWurlTp6coSX-lBufNpa6JZaz0K6_8xsAzseZ7dJ6o5XO87dSnfGNi3wcByycCKiYH9NC2WtbTftO9hodyW9b6kjG11x0HYevQMbJMNHmeIMZRhZJLfNhfih65_O-xh4DcAAP__WR5_SA), head of the Texas Department of State Health Services, to serve as chief medical officer and deputy director at the CDC.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGncTYi-_ojePBQqcoGVQVSu0UX-wasOiSyDYG3r-grdD5Hv-H_tRt2GFO8nvc4kauPcR6utJZEtVIear5NS_HBL9H_YMZMFZ9pzmUADmbD1UbYIWBMz0E1wZ14sKIhJ7rOaGu01s3FGQ2jNV51ozptefDSgLedRMMD1yPJJroXxpWwQnCQugVjMSgTtkpih6SY4hRinXNbL1TpgWVMz_lOufXz1CR3qXUpTL4x6Bn067q259uG_Dy9dgY9yIPR-mgY9BLU5_7wujHZl9tJMPl-_O4_muzCssaUYjEdU_w8YUx_fP1flLuD3wAAAP__GxxzJg) | |
# Sunday, April 19, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1993, the federal government's 51-day siege of the Branch Davidians' Mount Carmel Center near Waco came to a [fiery end](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OozAUxfGnMZ0RNv4IhYtt6LLtluiCL-FqjY1sJ4S3H2U0bzD1TzpH-v-7T3egQPHxF3Z09b2mKeJZAtaKear5uR9l8ctBy3_IkLHCFVIuk-yk4Z3iYpg8ULgm1Xg3d34QDTphrdGD0Vo3m5uFVFoZlLiuEmCw2hqverzdtFS9tQ25z1inxCBEJ3vdSjOAV8bfVA8WUDHVoaeacls3rPiGsoYrvTC3S9qb4LZaj8L6P0yOTI7nebYblZry9XEmx7pR4R4uTpH_CJMjHJkCFwOT45whLhv38CJPEPmS9iM9o-fzM8fSZOePk0KgYixT3WMHCt_X9XfBXk5-BQAA__9bsoFj) after FBI agents launched tear gas into the compound. The initial raid and following siege resulted in the deaths of four ATF agents and more than 80 cult members. Trump tapped a [Texas health official](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUxvGnwU4HjqBSUNyGLrfd0iGcY2QXxQESk7ffSV5h-_98v5nv6zJfXIhhv_13G5n6XNK801ki1Up5rvm-HcWjP4L_cdllqu4VUy4zcBhaLluhZ3QhvmbZoLly1KIhI8ZxUHpQSjWrIT0BChwnroQUig-oF-dxUaPqAdXUBPMe41JoITj0qoNBO5QDTrJ3oyPJJCcMNeWurlTp6coSX-lBufNpa6JZaz0K6_8xsAzseZ7dJ6o5XO87dSnfGNi3wcByycCKiYH9NC2WtbTftO9hodyW9b6kjG11x0HYevQMbJMNHmeIMZRhZJLfNhfih65_O-xh4DcAAP__WR5_SA) for a top CDC role, and a forgotten [Taylor Swift-signed guitar](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU9jOke2MSYULrah-7fdEk3sIYzWwciehHD7FVxhy9HofXrf-_Mz_QAlWp-_4YWev3OeVtxrQmYsE5f3a6shho3CXyhQkOFIudTJKOOkslIPUwRKx2Sb6B8qDrpBr_vedYPruq5ZvOnt3Or46FULJrZR34NWJnToHgPctW3InzBl9aC1Mm13M26AaF282xZ6QCuswkicy40XZPxCndORP1huIb-a5BfmrYr2lzCjMOO-77fwqKfF-RdmvCLCjB-KmM_7cpB1p5llpeeKUT7fxFDkjBwWrFI7pZSkVa658CIvggwLFOJDwjsw5VWYsSk-bjulRNX1wqrnCyhdrfj_tvx48y8AAP__oB6K-w) turned into a $16,000 surprise. Catch both stories in the _Roundup_. In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown unpacked a new report that suggested Joe Biden's first choice for Vice President in 2020 was not Kamala Harris. Who was it, and what ultimately drove the Kamala Harris selection? [Listen here.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz0tOwzAQANDTOLtGtuNPvfAChCKxKAuExNKaZKathdMEZ_rJ7RFcgQs86X0e0gFyyZfTG0wU-XGc04XuayFmqonrdVrWEcclj19QoRLDVua6Ji2120mzUyEh5LIl02AcJAbVUFTeOxuctbY5R4kyEChlJSmvNfphGMHuCYOzZNXY5PiLSaOCUlJ3ttUuABqHe9OBBzLCSMLMc235TEwPWI9lm29U23GemhLPzMsquiehe6H7bb7ytR1I6P7j-1Gf9-8p4avoehbdi_ayqRGXey4lr84LI08T5PIn8f_-t6h_AgAA__8Ks25K) Today's sponsor, the [knēNest Pillow](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGncTYi-_ojePBQqcoGVQVSu0UX-wasOiSyDYG3r-grdD5Hv-H_tRt2GFO8nvc4kauPcR6utJZEtVIear5NS_HBL9H_YMZMFZ9pzmUADmbD1UbYIWBMz0E1wZ14sKIhJ7rOaGu01s3FGQ2jNV51ozptefDSgLedRMMD1yPJJroXxpWwQnCQugVjMSgTtkpih6SY4hRinXNbL1TpgWVMz_lOufXz1CR3qXUpTL4x6Bn067q259uG_Dy9dgY9yIPR-mgY9BLU5_7wujHZl9tJMPl-_O4_muzCssaUYjEdU_w8YUx_fP1flLuD3wAAAP__GxxzJg), is designed to relieve nighttime pain and improve sleep by keeping your body properly aligned for deeper, more restorative rest.

## Trump Taps Texas Health Leader for CDC Role
President Trump selected [Dr. Jennifer Shuford](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUxvGnwU4HjqBSUNyGLrfd0iGcY2QXxQESk7ffSV5h-_98v5nv6zJfXIhhv_13G5n6XNK801ki1Up5rvm-HcWjP4L_cdllqu4VUy4zcBhaLluhZ3QhvmbZoLly1KIhI8ZxUHpQSjWrIT0BChwnroQUig-oF-dxUaPqAdXUBPMe41JoITj0qoNBO5QDTrJ3oyPJJCcMNeWurlTp6coSX-lBufNpa6JZaz0K6_8xsAzseZ7dJ6o5XO87dSnfGNi3wcByycCKiYH9NC2WtbTftO9hodyW9b6kjG11x0HYevQMbJMNHmeIMZRhZJLfNhfih65_O-xh4DcAAP__WR5_SA), head of the Texas Department of State Health Services, to serve as chief medical officer and deputy director at the CDC. Shuford, [an infectious disease physician](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFyszAQRk8jOjFiLcAqVPwNnf82JbNIi1EsECMWY26fiTOTC-QA35v3vY9bf8MQw3L_jzNZfo2pX-jYIjFT7jnv87o579bgHpgxE-MZU956UNBIpWVleo8hnr0uvB2UN1VBtmrbpjZNXdfFZGsYlBsUoK5BXc1o0I1OtwYc0kBXLIL9hildmapScKlLaAx63firvmCLpIVW5AOnXPJETC_cxnimJ-XSpbmIdmJeN3H5J6AT0B3HUT52LlO-C-gmwsiTgO5XuBXQvX_JN0o676SndedT-pDJccryZyU_aVnCSFlu0z6m7Its_XqEGMPWtEKr-4whviX4b-meFr4CAAD__5nOhLw), has led Texas' public health agency since 2022 and previously served as the state's chief epidemiologist, guiding the COVID-19 response and other health initiatives. She also oversaw the state's response to a major measles outbreak in West Texas in 2025. [The CDC roles](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGOpDAMgOGngc4jyARYCoprpttrr0QmNpCbkCDHMyz39Cf2FbayZEu_9Ml_PsdP9MHH5TduPOjXnMbIRw6syjKqvLY9O3K7d08UFFY8Q5I8msq0UFmo-5HQh3O0JQ1TRX1d8lB3Xdv0bdM05TrwNN3n7qN3tndTi1T1zUyuaXly5k6NKf1wxSpb93VdmXtzM22PZFv6sHfskG1hKyavSW66svIX5jmc6c1yc2krw7Cq7rm4_yrMozCPJ-r7OhTmcUmugepThCNJoMI8vlGAMaZXdJwh8gGOHJAXdpoELizgvicfNcOTT9hT9lcjg4-gKwMuHN0JJMDiHUJ264Gi_2BOsrEA8f7SE_JLFk4RFo4sGEDSxKIww5NjZDrhr8AbnfORM6yMQVfYmPy1KGWg_fAh-Nx2ha2WDX34FuvP_vQezP8AAAD__15AsJ8) don't require Senate confirmation for Shuford, and a timeline for her transition has not been announced. State officials will be responsible for selecting her replacement once she leaves the Texas post.
## Athlete Dies During IRONMAN Texas
A participant in the [IRONMAN Texas triathlon](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS4yAQRL8GZbjQGElWQHAJ2V56oWoMI2tqEahgvFrf1195f-Hyru5-78_H8oGcOD9-405OvteyZDpbIhGqi9TnfrQQw8HhEytWEnylUtsCBkZtrO7nJSKn12K76O4mzn1Hrp-mcZjHYRi6zQ2A0QzXO9qwjjbYlaYI443iPcAdIXTs3mXG9nPfG7gOFxhnjHaMN3vFCckqayiylHqRjYS-sa3pVb6oXkLZu-Q2kaOp6y8FXoE_z_MSEodP2MqzScnvlAL_xlLgUwmYFPj3pgJvrALf3xT4ioH0gVU48IFZdGRqOj4r54duJ-_6KFW4ZF1WzbXkHbP-eaOlMsqWStactWykz1JiwhybLvWBmf9SbbrhS4HvqovHySlxGydlzWNHTj8g8n_6vxz8CwAA__-or53U) died during the swim portion Saturday morning in The Woodlands, organizers said. First responders assisted at the scene. Emergency crews responded to reports of [a missing swimmer](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO5CAUBNDT4AwLvgGbgGATZ7PphtY3fNposLEwM56-_ar7ChOX9FRV_z6WD0w5HY-_uJNrP7EsB91XptaoLq1-7eflgz-T_8SKlRo-c6nXAgIMF4pLuwRM-bmoLrhVBCs7cnIcjbZGa91tDqKdrI-RtJReBKVjMARDlGFE6dehS-6FCSWtlAIG3YOxGJQJkxpwRFJMCQqpldq3jRr94BXzs3xT7X3Zu-y21s6LDX8YzAzm-777z618vUIGM9aWfCYG82sXgzkXj5nBnGo5djz4G-RtI36XEjIe4eKhlvtIx4MHwrYxmGHSnDysoLTk3hjLFYmRW7-u3KspShwEqtV21YXzTjmny4xMiceOKb9rtt-d--3gfwAAAP__Rd-OBA) around 6 a.m., and the body was recovered later that morning after search efforts were complicated by low visibility in the water. Authorities from multiple local agencies are investigating the incident. [The athlete hasn't been publicly identified](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAUBOCnsTsswPyEgmIbd9l2S-vEHMcoYCwgIX77le8r3H70jWb-3ec7-OD351-IaOt3TfOOrQSsFfNc8zseZXHL4ZcXZMhY4Qwpl5lTrggVhJnZgQ_nLHpnH9QZ1qNlWitplJSy3-wqFQrN2IPTUd-UZholSKOM1tSYFXtvL4wKZhijfJQDVwacUO4mRtCAohMUna8pD3XDil8oazjTB_OwpNgHu9V6lG780_Gp41NrbVjTl6stvUtN-xXq-HSt6viEEfMT9-UkS8ZWSMblkkhpPkbMZM0pkgAvJC0lF2B3pc_WHc2H4IvSnaDPCD78VNffHfax_H8AAAD__3oDghM), and officials have released few details about the circumstances surrounding the death. Race organizers said they're supporting the individual's family and declined to comment further.
## Signed Taylor Swift Guitar Sells for $16K
A Taylor Swift-signed guitar discovered in a North Texas radio station's prize closet [sold for $16,000 at auction](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU9jOke2MSYULrah-7fdEk3sIYzWwciehHD7FVxhy9HofXrf-_Mz_QAlWp-_4YWev3OeVtxrQmYsE5f3a6shho3CXyhQkOFIudTJKOOkslIPUwRKx2Sb6B8qDrpBr_vedYPruq5ZvOnt3Or46FULJrZR34NWJnToHgPctW3InzBl9aC1Mm13M26AaF282xZ6QCuswkicy40XZPxCndORP1huIb-a5BfmrYr2lzCjMOO-77fwqKfF-RdmvCLCjB-KmM_7cpB1p5llpeeKUT7fxFDkjBwWrFI7pZSkVa658CIvggwLFOJDwjsw5VWYsSk-bjulRNX1wqrnCyhdrfj_tvx48y8AAP__oB6K-w), featuring her 2008 autograph alongside signatures from other celebrities. clean_body: President Trump selected , head of the Texas Department of State Health Services, to serve as chief medical officer and deputy director at the CDC. | | | | | | Sunday, April 19, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1993, the federal government's 51-day siege of the Branch Davidians' Mount Carmel Center near Waco came to a after FBI agents launched tear gas into the compound. The initial raid and following siege resulted in the deaths of four ATF agents and more than 80 cult members. Trump tapped a for a top CDC role, and a forgotten turned into a $16,000 surprise. Catch both stories in the Roundup. In case you missed it, this week on The Flyover Podcast , host Ayla Brown unpacked a new report that suggested Joe Biden's first choice for Vice President in 2020 was not Kamala Harris. Who was it, and what ultimately drove the Kamala Harris selection? Shuford, , has led Texas' public health agency since 2022 and previously served as the state's chief epidemiologist, guiding the COVID-19 response and other health initiatives. She also oversaw the state's response to a major measles outbreak in West Texas in 2025. don't require Senate confirmation for Shuford, and a timeline for her transition has not been announced. State officials will be responsible for selecting her replacement once she leaves the Texas post. Athlete Dies During IRONMAN Texas A participant in the died during the swim portion Saturday morning in The Woodlands, organizers said. First responders assisted at the scene. Emergency crews responded to reports of around 6 a.m., and the body was recovered later that morning after search efforts were complicated by low visibility in the water. Authorities from multiple local agencies are investigating the incident. , and officials have released few details about the circumstances surrounding the death. Race organizers said they're supporting the individual's family and declined to comment further. Signed Taylor Swift Guitar Sells for $16K A Taylor Swift-signed guitar discovered in a North Texas radio station's prize closet , featuring her 2008 autograph alongside signatures from other celebrities. I am going to make you a promise that you never see in your inbox.

__I am not asking for a dime.__

I want you to keep your credit card in your pocket. I want you to close your checkbook.

subject: Even Georgia’s GOP governor says MAGA is vulnerable
body:

---
---
| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GF03d1vjWhNDTy9j89SsfWqyq1SUY2KOjmSBgKz4Ui3WmSteKLa70AK2A5DfEfv4_lgOreyJp3rxq3Z_NzpFYAt2H5S7JvwPj8Lv2oEtjXf94TWPe6uFJAzfEMoCzE8gMYOSUNOIE4_5bz7wFXvNTtsJqgWRd_wDAKsIeL0nkyruivs1Od3snh3P5liB7wFI1KxmsvXAnv9YnTHAnRn5vOc63jKwCniTEfJp-cXKlDJ0-ndAVkoglpyaaXHnpsRFgtV3pk_2Es0=&c=uwpgiW2tHprpizfw2srWGm0E3ZMKzWwTCwX561SnHokcMUQdowjM2Q==&ch=flpW5HTU7eJon1IqqtMyAmk1yaAcZrt7XKtdJBlR2tjS84E02NL7Yg==)
---
| | Friend
Democrats in Georgia finally have a real shot.
Even Georgia's own Republican governor, Brian Kemp, is warning that MAGA is vulnerable. It's time we take advantage of their weaknesses, like they've done to us for too long.
The momentum is real: a recent Georgia special election marked Democrats' strongest overperformance yet in a deep-red district this year.
And it shows that even deep-red districts are within reach when turnout and engagement are there.
On May 19th we have a real shot at flipping two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court, setting up an opening to completely flip control of the court in 2028, just months before for the next presidential race.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GF03d1vjWhNDTy9j89SsfWqyq1SUY2KOjmSBgKz4Ui3WmSteKLa70AK2A5DfEfv4_lgOreyJp3rxq3Z_NzpFYAt2H5S7JvwPj8Lv2oEtjXf94TWPe6uFJAzfEMoCzE8gMYOSUNOIE4_5bz7wFXvNTtsJqgWRd_wDAKsIeL0nkyruivs1Od3snh3P5liB7wFI1KxmsvXAnv9YnTHAnRn5vOc63jKwCniTEfJp-cXKlDJ0-ndAVkoglpyaaXHnpsRFWQxrS8jQAOQ=&c=uwpgiW2tHprpizfw2srWGm0E3ZMKzWwTCwX561SnHokcMUQdowjM2Q==&ch=flpW5HTU7eJon1IqqtMyAmk1yaAcZrt7XKtdJBlR2tjS84E02NL7Yg==)
---
| This race is winnable. But only if we show up.
And in a nonpartisan election, there are no party labels next to candidates' names, meaning you won't have the usual cues to guide their decision.
That's exactly why a coalition of pro-democracy groups is going all-in on these races. After our recent wins in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin they've turned to us to help close the gap when it matters most.
Everything we've seen so far points to a real opportunity in Georgia--and the chance to close the gap is right in front of us. We can do this.
[Friend, now is the time to show up. clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | | Friend Democrats in Georgia finally have a real shot. Even Georgia's own Republican governor, Brian Kemp, is warning that MAGA is vulnerable. It's time we take advantage of their weaknesses, like they've done to us for too long. The momentum is real: a recent Georgia special election marked Democrats' strongest overperformance yet in a deep-red district this year. And it shows that even deep-red districts are within reach when turnout and engagement are there. On May 19th we have a real shot at flipping two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court, setting up an opening to completely flip control of the court in 2028, just months before for the next presidential race. | == | This race is winnable. But only if we show up. And in a nonpartisan election, there are no party labels next to candidates' names, meaning you won't have the usual cues to guide their decision. That's exactly why a coalition of pro-democracy groups is going all-in on these races. After our recent wins in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin they've turned to us to help close the gap when it matters most. Everything we've seen so far points to a real opportunity in Georgia--and the chance to close the gap is right in front of us. We can do this. == | | | | | == | == | == | == MAGA is vulnerable. Let's seize on the opportunity to flip two seats on the GA Supreme Court. Team Defend our Courts | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

name: Ken Burns
subject: North Carolina is at another crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
| | | |
---
Ken Burns here, friend. I’ve said this before and it’s now more relevant than ever: The power rests in our hands to secure the future of the Senate.
**_[I have more to say, but if you want to use that power in your own hands, and have a few bucks to spare, please consider donating to Roy Cooper’s campaign today. Winning his race is absolutely critical if we’re going to flip the Senate, so I hope you’ll join me.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9337?t=8&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)_**
Across this country, people are feeling the strain in ways that don’t always make the history books – but shape lives all the same. The cost of groceries that are too high. A lifesaving prescription that forces a difficult choice. A paycheck that doesn’t just stretch as far as it once did.
These are the quiet pressures that define a moment.

Roy Cooper has spent much of his life as a public servant working to ease those burdens.
Not seeking attention, but doing the work. Expanding access to affordable health care. Investing in public schools. Defending the idea that government, at its best, is not distant – but present, steady and accountable to the people it serves.
It is the kind of leadership that rarely makes noise. But over time, it leaves a mark.

There are those who would take the state in a different direction – who see division as a strategy, who mistake power for purpose. They are organized. They are well-funded by dark-money groups.
**_[We can beat them back. This work matters, and we won’t stop fighting. So please, will you chip in now to help elect Roy Cooper for the U.S. Senate?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9337?t=9&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9337?t=10&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
---
History has been written in moments like this – when people choose not to sit back, but to take part.
If you can, _[**give today**](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9337?t=11&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)_. Help ensure that the next chapter of North Carolina reflects the very best of what this state has always tried to be.
Thank you for doing your part,

Ken Burns
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9337?t=12&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=1093%2E124072%2EUGFyKD)

body:
Oh, come on!

The world will end if you don't respond to this email right this second!
Give me a break!
Messages like that are just another example of what is wrong with our political process today.
This is Navy Veteran Jen Kiggans, and I'm sick and tired of career politicians and their slick gimmicks.
I'm not going to pretend to be someone I'm not....I'm a Republican Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom running for Congress in one of the most important races on the map.

Look, I ran for Congress because I got tired of all the broken promises and tricks...so I won't play those games. I'm shaking up business as usual in Congress, and I'll never let the Political Establishment push me around.
[I'd be incredibly honored if you would support my campaign with just $7 or $10 today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNDE5X1dNLTkwLjExNDUxMF90MTg3NDQyMC0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDQxOV9XTS05MC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4NzQ0MjAtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuUTV5VVdqNWxIVWxsNVJiSHU2M0NoaGYxZ29sTDRNbWZXSUMwbU1GQ3hvSDBkcVU4aG5NRU5lWmtHNk45UXJIOSJ9/vTSUM6jTr4IHsOIOx5sC3Q) I promise you it will go directly toward helping make sure Republicans protect our House Majority in November.[SUPPORT MY REELECTION CAMPAIGN TODAY

From the bottom of my heart - THANK YOU..![](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNDE5X1dNLTkwLjExNDUxMF90MTg3NDQyMC0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDQxOV9XTS05MC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4NzQ0MjAtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuUTV5VVdqNWxIVWxsNVJiSHU2M0NoaGYxZ29sTDRNbWZXSUMwbU1GQ3hvSDBkcVU4aG5NRU5lWmtHNk45UXJIOSJ9/HVkjGKck2Z4jKpEQ46GFDQ)-Jen| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-KiF8FpUuurHp6It6A)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Can’t find it? That’s because they hid it deep in the fine print.

Most Americans casually clicked "I Agree" to the new terms of service this month, not realizing they just gave permission for the Digital Dollar switch.

This controversial update allows institutions to:

* Track every penny you spend.
* Freeze your account if your purchase history looks "suspicious."
* Cap how much cash you can withdraw.

If you have a checking account or IRA, you are already in the danger zone.

But there is a specific way to reverse this permission before the system goes live.

He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Open your banking app. Go to settings. And look for the new "Digital Integration" tab. | Can’t find it? That’s because they hid it deep in the fine print. Most Americans casually clicked "I Agree" to the new terms of service this month, not realizing they just gave permission for the Digital Dollar switch. This controversial update allows institutions to: Track every penny you spend. Freeze your account if your purchase history looks "suspicious." Cap how much cash you can withdraw. If you have a checking account or IRA, you are already in the danger zone. But there is a specific way to reverse this permission before the system goes live. body:
Can you help?

|
| | | | | | | | Friend,

You were flagged as one of our most reliable supporters of the conservative movement, which is why we're reaching out to you before our **critical end-of-month deadline.**

Right now, Donald Trump and Republicans are $942.25 short of our goal and we're only a few days away from our deadline on April 30, 2026.

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Frankly, the odds are against us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re in an uphill battle to retake the Senate, and the odds are against us. To succeed we need to win races that a lot of people have written off for a long, long time.
#
Peter, here’s the truth:
To stop Trump, we need to win elections. We need to take back the House and Senate in order to put up a line of defense against his White House.
The good news is, we’re on track in the House. It will be tough, it will be expensive, but there is a pathway.
The bad news is, the Senate’s another story. We’re in an uphill battle to retake that chamber, and the odds are against us. To succeed we need to win races that a lot of people have written off for a long, long time.
North Carolina, Ohio, Alaska, Texas, Maine, Iowa, Florida... These are reliable Republican states, but we have to win at least a few of them to have any chance at a majority.
VoteVets will be critical in that effort. Our ads are the most effective. They speak to the centrists, moderates, and independents we need to win. They cut through. Veterans are trusted messengers. Our ONLY limitation is resources... and it’s going to take a lot of them.
We’re being honest with you now because we’re hoping this message resonates. We have a real shot here. We CAN do this, but we can't do it alone.
[**So, if you’re willing to support the organization that will lead the fight to retake the Senate, make a donation of $3 or anything you can afford.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr26.8SLh3X&refcode=em260419-1-120&t=1&akid=35090%2E3013755%2ELlEaPj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: | Fellow American, we have a serious problem, and we are not going to sugarcoat it. President Trump went on Fox News and said exactly what every Republican already knows in their gut: [ "We have to keep the [Senate] majority, otherwise all of the things we've done are going to go down the tubes." — President Trump ]() That is why it is so frustrating that your is still sitting incomplete in our system. We have reached out to you multiple times, Fellow American and so has Senate Republican leadership. We are not asking for much. Everything President Trump has built survives or dies based on whether we hold this majority. Lose the Senate, and the left dismantles every last bit of it overnight. Your verified response is the one thing we still need from you. It takes less than a minute, it is completely private, and it could not matter more than it does right now. - Thank you, NRSC HQ | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,

And you'll snag our most popular food kit, in the process: Delicious & designed to last for 25 years 1,088 total servings $0.64 Per Serving – holy smokes! It's freedom in a box. These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right – no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, these kits contain more food than ever. It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared. Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude. Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: A historic opportunity to honor veterans this Memorial Day
body:
The National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.

| | |
---
Friend,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)
---
Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America's 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)**

The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. _Bigger_ crowds. _More_ veterans. _More _young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)
---
Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded ****_entirely_**** by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** **[Friend, as we look ahead to this historic event, can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)

[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)
---
| | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade during America's 250th birthday with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)
---
If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult.
---

| | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250****th**** birthday overlap. ** **[Will you join AVC and me in making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's historic National Memorial Day parade to honor them one last time?](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvCWQJUuOBw1FgwAd7taOAkMxMVFLciXZxf37wteMXW4j-B4f8eH9fPNvwAun5ztEcrizL9XDzLXlwpjXNZe2JW4fLc85eSWVPcnh1E-HT3XBYbBadeT6cbRWmkFfutn192AGfbd6QNOP4zAhGcCAimQwd3vp2B1JcuinXmup7TnYIPXj0puHfjzMBcUgtzVAo3rGnCqVHRrvxCnlY8rpjDl2i5tbW6vQ34S6CXWrhFuhMyQKuR0OoW4QqTBCOu3UqECqJ6TUqBzSjp9E_gnlw0eKuTAsQt9q3gqSxxxI6Ov3H-_TpKQRym4t-kiBtyj0lSLw8lr-uxD6OkMJUH95wN8vCSGuwM8k9PX_D7viwvqHl4WrHcUgn0fuJ1_7eiO7U38DAAD__6oVntk)**

clean_body: The National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade P.S. Friend, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. clean_body: Sorry for the Sunday interruption, but what’s happening in Detroit today is too important to wait | | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Good morning, Team! Sorry to email you so early today, but it’s Michigan Democratic Party Convention day — so we are up and on the move. Matt’s going to speak with folks about why he’s the best candidate in MI-07 to take on Tom Barrett and flip this district. Here are the facts: Polling shows Matt performs the strongest in head-to-head matchups against Tom Barrett Matt brings over 20 years of service in the Navy to the table, including as President Obama’s Military Aide — when Matt was trusted with carrying the nuclear codes Matt doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money But here’s the reality: We’re up against a mountain of GOP dark money. They’ve flown in multiple Cabinet secretaries, and even JD Vance visited! They’re going all out because they know there’s no path for Democrats to take back the House without flipping this seat. The only way we’ll be able to do that is with your help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | Let’s get to work, Team Maasdam | PAID FOR BY MATT MAASDAM FOR CONGRESS MATT MAASDAM WAS A UNITED STATES NAVY SEAL. subject: Stop Illegals from Voting
body:
I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately.

| | **Ban Non-Citizen Voting!**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, **[I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkMGO2yAQhp8G32zhwcHhwCErx6seUlVplB7RBLAXFYwF2H39Km32AfY4v2a-0ff_uqgLOu-W-TsGK1OZVMoql7g67-2MPk8phj0Wt8wKKPCadnUrnktQGWm0wVZXVrZ9zzk9HLpD9SHNwYhuantmwHAQRyGoYVyLo7bHB3JROflE0a4VLWMA0PQU-iM1nE0G2fSwpKPobSpNsuv28E7jUjD_nmLSttExVF5-lLJmwk4ERgIjBtSoi4tLk-y-NzoSGFfEgOX1imc37cAJG7cSVI5b0paw4W14r6_nOwH-jIM1bguEDefLK9EYVnTzQtjwCVJvw7s6XU439fPbeIf_8_V8Vz9O9fU2vg6LJmy43sb6U7VK0qx_nPcu8550dA7o_D-Z8sXedwl_AwAA__8_YIvd)** And at a moment like this, we are reaching out to Americans who still believe in election integrity, the Constitution, and the fundamental principle that **only citizens should decide our elections.** If you’ve ever heard of **AMAC Action** , you know that we are one of the nation’s leading conservative advocacy organizations—mobilizing millions of Americans to stand up for limited government, secure elections, and the values that made this country great.Right now, we need your voice. **[Please click here to submit your signed “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition in the next 48 hours.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkMGO2yAQhp8G32zhwcHhwCErx6seUlVplB7RBLAXFYwF2H39Km32AfY4v2a-0ff_uqgLOu-W-TsGK1OZVMoql7g67-2MPk8phj0Wt8wKKPCadnUrnktQGWm0wVZXVrZ9zzk9HLpD9SHNwYhuantmwHAQRyGoYVyLo7bHB3JROflE0a4VLWMA0PQU-iM1nE0G2fSwpKPobSpNsuv28E7jUjD_nmLSttExVF5-lLJmwk4ERgIjBtSoi4tLk-y-NzoSGFfEgOX1imc37cAJG7cSVI5b0paw4W14r6_nOwH-jIM1bguEDefLK9EYVnTzQtjwCVJvw7s6XU439fPbeIf_8_V8Vz9O9fU2vg6LJmy43sb6U7VK0qx_nPcu8550dA7o_D-Z8sXedwl_AwAA__8_YIvd)** My friend, you know that with razor-thin margins in the House and Senate, all bets are off after the midterm elections. That means we must act **now** , while we still have the opportunity.We must **BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING** before it’s too late.Today, millions of illegal immigrants who entered the country are being counted in ways that directly impact political power.And that means:
---
* More congressional seats for states with large illegal populations
* More Electoral College votes
* More federal funding
* More political power

---
And more opportunity for non-citizens to end up on voter rolls.That’s exactly why AMAC Action launched this national petition drive.So far, **more than 100,000 petitions** have already been signed by concerned Americans.But it is not enough.**[To force action—to apply real pressure—we must reach 500,000 signed petitions.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkMGO2yAQhp8G32zhwcHhwCErx6seUlVplB7RBLAXFYwF2H39Km32AfY4v2a-0ff_uqgLOu-W-TsGK1OZVMoql7g67-2MPk8phj0Wt8wKKPCadnUrnktQGWm0wVZXVrZ9zzk9HLpD9SHNwYhuantmwHAQRyGoYVyLo7bHB3JROflE0a4VLWMA0PQU-iM1nE0G2fSwpKPobSpNsuv28E7jUjD_nmLSttExVF5-lLJmwk4ERgIjBtSoi4tLk-y-NzoSGFfEgOX1imc37cAJG7cSVI5b0paw4W14r6_nOwH-jIM1bguEDefLK9EYVnTzQtjwCVJvw7s6XU439fPbeIf_8_V8Vz9O9fU2vg6LJmy43sb6U7VK0qx_nPcu8550dA7o_D-Z8sXedwl_AwAA__8_YIvd)****Half a million.** That’s the kind of number that gets politicians’ attention.But without your signature, we won’t get there in time.To stop non-citizen voting, concerned citizens across the country must send one loud and unmistakable message:
---
1. **Only American citizens should be counted in the census.**
2. **Only American citizens should have a vote.**

---
[ ** Sign the Petition** ](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkMGO2yAQhp8G32zhwcHhwCErx6seUlVplB7RBLAXFYwF2H39Km32AfY4v2a-0ff_uqgLOu-W-TsGK1OZVMoql7g67-2MPk8phj0Wt8wKKPCadnUrnktQGWm0wVZXVrZ9zzk9HLpD9SHNwYhuantmwHAQRyGoYVyLo7bHB3JROflE0a4VLWMA0PQU-iM1nE0G2fSwpKPobSpNsuv28E7jUjD_nmLSttExVF5-lLJmwk4ERgIjBtSoi4tLk-y-NzoSGFfEgOX1imc37cAJG7cSVI5b0paw4W14r6_nOwH-jIM1bguEDefLK9EYVnTzQtjwCVJvw7s6XU439fPbeIf_8_V8Vz9O9fU2vg6LJmy43sb6U7VK0qx_nPcu8550dA7o_D-Z8sXedwl_AwAA__8_YIvd)
---
You’re receiving this message because you’ve been identified as someone who may be willing to take a stand on critical issues like this. And at a moment like this, every signature matters. Because without action, momentum is lost—and we cannot afford to lose momentum with the midterms approaching.When you sign and submit your petition in the next 48 hours with your petition sponsorship gift you will help AMAC Action:
---
* Distribute hundreds of thousands of additional petitions by mail, email, text, and social media
* Expand digital outreach to recruit more conservative seniors
* Organize state-level petition drives
* Deliver signed petitions directly to lawmakers
* Push election integrity legislation that safeguards your vote
* Fight for census reform so representation reflects citizens only

---
That’s a lot to accomplish.But we’ve seen what’s possible when Americans step forward.With the help of patriots just like you, we’ve already helped:
---
* Pass the Rescissions Act to cut wasteful spending
* Push the “One Big, Beautiful Bill” across the finish line
* Advance the SAVE Act in the House

---
And so much more. But now, we must finish the job. Stopping non-citizen voting is one of the most common-sense issues of our time. And if enough Americans take action—we can get it done.Some have chosen to ignore this issue. The Left is counting on that. But millions of Americans are taking action. We hope you will be one of them. **[Please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition and submit it within the next 48 hours.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkMGO2yAQhp8G32zhwcHhwCErx6seUlVplB7RBLAXFYwF2H39Km32AfY4v2a-0ff_uqgLOu-W-TsGK1OZVMoql7g67-2MPk8phj0Wt8wKKPCadnUrnktQGWm0wVZXVrZ9zzk9HLpD9SHNwYhuantmwHAQRyGoYVyLo7bHB3JROflE0a4VLWMA0PQU-iM1nE0G2fSwpKPobSpNsuv28E7jUjD_nmLSttExVF5-lLJmwk4ERgIjBtSoi4tLk-y-NzoSGFfEgOX1imc37cAJG7cSVI5b0paw4W14r6_nOwH-jIM1bguEDefLK9EYVnTzQtjwCVJvw7s6XU439fPbeIf_8_V8Vz9O9fU2vg6LJmy43sb6U7VK0qx_nPcu8550dA7o_D-Z8sXedwl_AwAA__8_YIvd)**

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately. | | | | | | | | Ban Non-Citizen Voting! Dear Fellow Patriot, And at a moment like this, we are reaching out to Americans who still believe in election integrity, the Constitution, and the fundamental principle that only citizens should decide our elections. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action , you know that we are one of the nation’s leading conservative advocacy organizations—mobilizing millions of Americans to stand up for limited government, secure elections, and the values that made this country great.Right now, we need your voice. My friend, you know that with razor-thin margins in the House and Senate, all bets are off after the midterm elections. That means we must act now , while we still have the opportunity.We must BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING before it’s too late.Today, millions of illegal immigrants who entered the country are being counted in ways that directly impact political power.And that means: More congressional seats for states with large illegal populations More Electoral College votes More federal funding More political power And more opportunity for non-citizens to end up on voter rolls.That’s exactly why AMAC Action launched this national petition drive.So far, more than 100,000 petitions have already been signed by concerned Americans.But it is not enough. a million. That’s the kind of number that gets politicians’ attention.But without your signature, we won’t get there in time.To stop non-citizen voting, concerned citizens across the country must send one loud and unmistakable message: 1. Only American citizens should be counted in the census. 2. Only American citizens should have a vote. You’re receiving this message because you’ve been identified as someone who may be willing to take a stand on critical issues like this. And at a moment like this, every signature matters. Because without action, momentum is lost—and we cannot afford to lose momentum with the midterms approaching.When you sign and submit your petition in the next 48 hours with your petition sponsorship gift you will help AMAC Action: Distribute hundreds of thousands of additional petitions by mail, email, text, and social media Expand digital outreach to recruit more conservative seniors Organize state-level petition drives Deliver signed petitions directly to lawmakers Push election integrity legislation that safeguards your vote Fight for census reform so representation reflects citizens only That’s a lot to accomplish.But we’ve seen what’s possible when Americans step forward.With the help of patriots just like you, we’ve already helped: Pass the Rescissions Act to cut wasteful spending Push the “One Big, Beautiful Bill” across the finish line Advance the SAVE Act in the House And so much more. But now, we must finish the job. Stopping non-citizen voting is one of the most common-sense issues of our time. And if enough Americans take action—we can get it done.Some have chosen to ignore this issue. The Left is counting on that. But millions of Americans are taking action. We hope you will be one of them. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. Thank you for taking the time to read this message. Protecting the integrity of our elections is one of the most important issues of our time—and we hope you’ll stand with AMAC Action today. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | ** 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: This is what a grassroots movement looks like:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
We’ve said from day one that this is a movement built by Virginians for Virginians and the numbers don’t lie!
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260419-536&t=1&akid=536%2E12592%2EyfiEjg)
This just in: **We have over 10,000 donors who’ve given $100 or less.**_That’s compared to the NO campaign’s 2,453._
We’re proud to have more than 4X the number of grassroots donors than the opposition and we wouldn’t have it any other way.

# **VIRGINIA GERRYMANDER MEMO**
---
| | **FROM:** Jason Miyares and Eric Cantor, Co-Chairs of Virginians for Fair Maps **TO:** Concerned Parties **RE:** Virginia Democrat Gerrymander and Special Election I need to be completely honest with you about what is happening right now. A Virginia court has ruled the Democrats' new congressional map an **unconstitutional partisan gerrymander.** Virginia Democrats put it on this Tuesday's ballot anyway. They are asking voters to ratify an act a court declared illegal -- because they are betting that low turnout in a special election will carry them across the finish line before anyone can stop them. Nonpartisan political scientists have confirmed what we have argued from the beginning: this is **the single most partisan gerrymander in the history of the United States.** The new map hands Democrats a 10-1 congressional advantage in a state where President Trump won over 46% of the vote -- because it was drawn with one purpose, to steal four Republican seats before the midterms begin. If this map passes, **the midterm elections may be effectively over before a single November vote is cast.**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I have some bad news...

body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=6174%2E582294%2EO7R0sT)
Hi, it’s Chris, and I have some bad news.
Republican right-wing super PAC AFP Action has endorsed my opponent, John Sununu, and is preparing to spend a ton of money in this race.
**[Here’s why this matters: I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, and I need your help to fight back. Will you rush $5 so we can stand up to outside spending and defend New Hampshire’s Senate seat?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260419_1.LX_feG&refcode=em20260419-1&t=2&akid=6174%2E582294%2EO7R0sT)**

From the moment we launched this campaign, Donald Trump, MAGA Republicans, and their far-right billionaire sponsors have made it clear they will do whatever they can to influence New Hampshire’s Senate race.
I’ve won this kind of race before, and I’m going to continue fighting back. But I know from experience I can only succeed with **a strong grassroots team** and a lot more resources to win.
**[Please, if you’re able to, make a $5 donation to power our campaign.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260419_1.LX_feG&refcode=em20260419-1&t=22&akid=6174%2E582294%2EO7R0sT)**

Together,
Chris Pappas

The radical Left has made it clear: they will use violence to intimidate anyone fighting for conservative principles.
Whether it’s journalists filming protests or ballot chasers knocking doors to help low-propensity conservatives actually vote — patriots on the ground are being targeted with assaults, mob attacks, and threats simply for showing up.
**This isn’t rare.**
It’s becoming the norm as Democrats grow more desperate to flip Congress and reverse border security, tax cuts, energy dominance, and every America First gain from the last two years.
We **_refuse_** to back down.
Turning Point PAC is scaling the proven ballot-chasing operation that delivered results in 2024, but we’re also making sure our teams are trained and equipped to handle these real-world threats with vigilance and smart preparation.
**[Your support](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTF9AAwAAAAAACHslPzgXRk5SZmGVwXWGPvowsvME6ZWEqgZjIoh5AoE1O0srbPTWkg7CouziZZdTTRKK4087mqz09_XDahkUI9EAHvQnZj_E1dg9lq6-g)** hires more chasers and gives them the knowledge and resources they need to stay safe while locking in the early votes that decide races.
The ground war is intensifying. The violence is real. And the only way we win is if good people like you keep the fighters funded and protected.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. name: The DNC, me (2)
subject: Did you see this?
body:
Complete the DNC Voting Rights Survey today!
---
Hey Derek — wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this: **Donald Trump recently signed an executive order seeking to restrict mail-in voting and the DNC is fighting back.** The DNC already filed a lawsuit to stop Trump immediately. But, we want to know: [**Do you support the DNC’s work to defend voting rights?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&amount=7&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5) | | | **[YES](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?&refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**
---
****
| **[NO](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**
---
****
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **DNC Research Team**
Date: Monday, April 13, 2026
Subject: BREAKING: Trump's executive order
Derek, did you see this?
**Donald Trump signed an executive order two weeks ago to restrict mail-in voting and give the Department of Homeland Security direct oversight over who can vote.**
This attack on vote-by-mail is an assault on Americans’ constitutional rights, and will disproportionately impact working families, seniors, Americans with disabilities, and members of the military who rely on mail-in voting to make their voices heard in our elections.
**So we have a question for you, Derek: Do you support the DNC’s work to defend voting rights?**
| | **[YES](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**
---
****
| **[NO](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**
---
****
**Here’s the deal:_The DNC filed a new lawsuit to stop Donald Trump immediately._**
While Trump and his allies continue to attack voting rights and try to make it harder for Americans to make their voices heard at the polls, the Democratic Party is fighting back in court.
[**But Derek, we need to make sure this grassroots team is on board with our legal strategy, so we need to hear from you right now: Do you support the DNC’s work to defend Americans’ voting rights?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&amount=7&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)
| | **[YES](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**
---
****
| **[NO](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260411_voting_rights_survey/?refcode=em_20260419_6755_fr&akid=6755%2E22930333%2EtoC5F5)**

****
Thank you for your continued support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
clean_body: Complete the DNC Voting Rights Survey today! Hey Derek — wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this: Donald Trump recently signed an executive order seeking to restrict mail-in voting and the DNC is fighting back. The DNC already filed a lawsuit to stop Trump immediately. But, we want to know: | | | ** | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: DNC Research Team Date: Monday, April 13, 2026 Subject: BREAKING: Trump's executive order Derek, did you see this? Donald Trump signed an executive order two weeks ago to restrict mail-in voting and give the Department of Homeland Security direct oversight over who can vote. This attack on vote-by-mail is an assault on Americans’ constitutional rights, and will disproportionately impact working families, seniors, Americans with disabilities, and members of the military who rely on mail-in voting to make their voices heard in our elections. So we have a question for you, Derek: Do you support the DNC’s work to defend voting rights? | | | Here’s the deal:The DNC filed a new lawsuit to stop Donald Trump immediately. While Trump and his allies continue to attack voting rights and try to make it harder for Americans to make their voices heard at the polls, the Democratic Party is fighting back in court. | | | ** Thank you for your continued support, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift.
