name: Chelsey Wininger
subject: Personally introducing myself to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129763993/615462084/-664395954?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFmZjc0MS1mZDNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5MHrQsoycl8qrRjUTnDqTsQTHje3EFpRG4vPDeLcdA=)
Hi there, Chelsey Wininger here. I’m stepping into the role of Executive Director at DASS at a moment when the stakes couldn’t be higher – with key elections ahead that will shape how our democracy functions for years to come. You’ve seen just how far MAGA Republicans are willing to go to subvert the rule of law and our democracy: refusing to certify election results, stoking conspiracies, and even trying to overturn the will of the voters. And that was _before_ the second Trump Administration. Over the last year, we’ve seen those threats escalate – from unprecedented DOJ demands for sensitive voter data, to the FBI seizing ballots in swing states, to Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order targeting vote-by-mail. And through it all, Democratic Secretaries of State have stood firm. They’ve refused to hand over sensitive voter data. They’ve defended vote-by-mail access. They’ve taken this administration to court to protect voters – even as they’re being sued in return and targeted by relentless political attacks. That’s what it looks like to be the last line of defense for free and fair elections in this country. And in November, 26 of these offices are on the ballot. **These races will decide whether our democracy is guarded by public servants who believe in the rule of law – or hijacked by those who don’t.** That’s why we’re not waiting. At DASS, we’re launching the most ambitious early campaign we’ve ever run – defending swing states like Arizona and Nevada, and taking the fight to Republicans in places like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. [**But to build early, organize deep, and win big – we need your help right now. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to power this work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129763996/615462087/-209663061?refcode=em-4.19.26-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFmZjc0MS1mZDNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5MHrQsoycl8qrRjUTnDqTsQTHje3EFpRG4vPDeLcdA=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129763998/615462091/-209663061?refcode=em-4.19.26-all&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFmZjc0MS1mZDNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5MHrQsoycl8qrRjUTnDqTsQTHje3EFpRG4vPDeLcdA=)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Impeach
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I don’t take this lightly.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em_impeachment_pet_apr26/?source=em260419-1-180&refcode2=2172.791427.ItGQWt&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)
**Yes, I support impeaching the President.**
I don’t take this lightly. Impeachment is a powerful tool established in the Constitution to hold a criminal president accountable. I would not call for this tool to be used without an overwhelming need.
But we’ve all seen the crimes of this presidency play out in real time — the open corruption and bribery, the defiance of the Constitution and the separation of powers, the constant stretching and breaking of US law, the use of ICE as an extrajudicial police force, the war crimes committed in the Caribbean, Venezuela, and Iran.
We simply can’t wait until 2029 for a new president to take office. Who knows what crimes and violations Trump will rack up between now and then, putting the American people and the entire world in further danger.
When a president is this out of control, the responsibility falls on Congress to take swift and decisive action. Today, I’m asking you to join me in pushing for that action before it’s too late.
[**Sign on to my petition today calling on my colleagues in the House to join me in our push to impeach Donald Trump. We must make the voice of the people heard, and show Congress that there is a grassroots movement of millions of people who are ready to see real accountability.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em_impeachment_pet_apr26/?source=em260419-1-180&refcode2=2172.791427.ItGQWt&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em_impeachment_pet_apr26/?source=em260419-1-180&refcode2=2172.791427.ItGQWt&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2172_791427_ItGQWt&akid=2172%2E791427%2EItGQWt)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: You’re not an ATM to me, friend.
body:
|
#
Friend, I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails lately. I have too. It’s not an easy time to ask for support – and I don’t take that lightly. But I do want to be clear about something: **You’re not an ATM to me, friend.** I’m not here to pressure you or play games with fake deadlines or ALL CAPS scary messages. This campaign is about doing right by mid-Michigan families – and that includes being honest and respectful with the people who power it. From the beginning, this has been a grassroots effort – people chipping in when they can and helping us build something strong enough to stand up to whatever comes our way. And because of you, we were able to win this seat in the first place, take on tough fights, and deliver real results for families across mid-Michigan. **This is the work I came to Congress to do – and it’s what I plan to continue doing.** So when you hear from me, it’s not about pressure. It’s about being honest with you about where we stand and what it’ll take to keep this work going. [**This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the nation – and we need your help if we’re going to defend MI-08. If you’re able, can you chip in today? Even just $1 goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129765065/615466063/846650056?refcode=em-4.19.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk4MDE3Ny0wMDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2FjM7vw5sAgddGhKFQWnjGVI6MFFkkLcANI0VqFhYg=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129765070/615466065/846650056?refcode=em-4.19.26-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk4MDE3Ny0wMDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2FjM7vw5sAgddGhKFQWnjGVI6MFFkkLcANI0VqFhYg=)

clean_body: | Friend, I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails lately. I have too. It’s not an easy time to ask for support – and I don’t take that lightly. But I do want to be clear about something: You’re not an ATM to me, friend. I’m not here to pressure you or play games with fake deadlines or ALL CAPS scary messages. This campaign is about doing right by mid-Michigan families – and that includes being honest and respectful with the people who power it. From the beginning, this has been a grassroots effort – people chipping in when they can and helping us build something strong enough to stand up to whatever comes our way. And because of you, we were able to win this seat in the first place, take on tough fights, and deliver real results for families across mid-Michigan. This is the work I came to Congress to do – and it’s what I plan to continue doing. So when you hear from me, it’s not about pressure. It’s about being honest with you about where we stand and what it’ll take to keep this work going. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129765484/615467332/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzk4MDE3Ny0wMDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yOki93UZOlzGNn0ldJ9zE_kQwxt6KthszfkdUQOBTnE=) There’s something you should know about our campaign: **We don’t take a single penny of corporate PAC money.** In fact, I was an early adopter of the pledge to reject all corporate PAC money — a pledge that’s still too rarely taken in politics today. When we ran for Senate in 2020, we stayed firm in that decision. And this year? You bet we’re sticking to it. To be honest with you, it was an easy decision. I never planned to run for office. I started my career as a geologist and then started a small business in Downtown Denver. I only threw my hat in the ring because I was fed up with the corruption plaguing so much of our politics. Corruption too often stems from our campaign finances. I wanted to do something about it. That’s why our campaign is fueled by grassroots contributions, not corporate PACs or shady billionaires. In fact, over 80% of our donations in our first quarter of this year have been just $25 or less! My only boss in the Senate is YOU, not corporate or special interests. **But the reality is that this decision comes with a price.** Our extreme MAGA opponent, hand-picked by Lauren Boebert, is officially on the ballot this November. We could be at a serious financial disadvantage if we don’t raise the grassroots resources to keep up. **_[So if you can, we’re asking you to chip in to keep Colorado blue today. Folks like you are the backbone of our campaign, so we can’t overstate how much your support would mean to our team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129765486/615467335/-584038332?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_041926_decision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzk4MDE3Ny0wMDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yOki93UZOlzGNn0ldJ9zE_kQwxt6KthszfkdUQOBTnE=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129765489/615467337/-584038332?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_041926_decision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzk4MDE3Ny0wMDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yOki93UZOlzGNn0ldJ9zE_kQwxt6KthszfkdUQOBTnE=)

I’m in this fight to change that. Here’s what your $1 today helps me do:

name: Katie Britt (R-AL)
subject: This is my story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
From dance classes and a hardware store to the Senate.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Patriot,
My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. **I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be._That’s just not who I am._**

In 2022, I was elected to represent the great state of Alabama in the United States Senate. I became the first woman in Alabama’s history to hold this seat—but that’s not why I ran.

I ran because I’m a _**mom**_ , a _**wife**_ , and a _**conservative**_ who’s fed up with the direction this country is heading. I came to Washington to fight for our families, to protect our values, and to bring some Alabama backbone to a broken system.

I didn’t come here to make friends with the political elite. I came here to stand up for the people who don’t have a voice in the room—and I’m not backing down.
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Before coming to the Senate, I served as the first female president and CEO of the Business Council of Alabama, and before that, I was Chief of Staff to Senator Richard Shelby. **I’ve never shied away from a challenge—and I’ve never forgotten who I’m fighting for.** In every role I’ve held, my mission has been the same: _deliver real results for Alabama families and the American people._
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Before starting my career in public service, I earned my undergraduate and law degrees from the University of Alabama. That experience taught me how to lead, think on my feet, and fight for what I believe in—**and it laid the foundation for _everything_ I’ve done since.**
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
But long before that, I was just a small-town girl from Enterprise, Alabama. My dad ran the local hardware store. My mom taught dance to almost every kid in town. We didn’t grow up with wealth or political connections. **We came from hard work, grit, and doing things the right way._That’s how I was raised, and that’s exactly how I lead._**
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
My husband Wesley and our two amazing kids are my rock. In 2011, a tornado tore through our home and nearly took our lives. That moment changed everything, and reminded me what truly matters. __**Faith** , **family** , and **resilience**.__
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I’ve lived a life full of hard work, determination, and breaking barriers. There have been challenges and triumphs alike, but I wouldn’t trade any of it.

My story is a testament to what America stands for—the American Dream. From a small town in Alabama, I rose to become my state’s U.S. Senator—a woman who’s breaking barriers and fighting for conservative values every day.

_**_I’m living proof of the limitless opportunity and freedom that define this country._**_

But, I didn’t get here by playing it safe or staying quiet, **and I’m not about to start now.**

The radical Left wants to _silence_ conservatives like me. They want to drown out our voices and push their agenda without opposition, but I’m standing firm.

I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep up and push back hard, for Alabama, for our values, and for every American who believes in freedom.

**The support I’ve received so far means everything, but this fight is far from over.** We need the resources to keep going strong and hold our ground.

**[So, after hearing a bit of my story, will you take a moment to chip in whatever you can afford to help me keep up this fight? The road ahead won’t be easy, but I’ve faced tough battles before. And it would mean the world to have you standing with me.](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
|
---
[CHIP IN TO FIGHT WITH KATIE BRITT >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Thank you, and may God bless America.

Katie Britt (R-AL)
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
| | ****

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
| |
# **We'd be sad to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving our emails, click[HERE](https://link.email.brittforsenate.com/click/e151810/VaHR0cHM6Ly9iZmEubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYnJpdHRmb3JzZW5hdGVfY29tMjYwNDE5/LbmNsUDE3RjFN/qP2hpZHM9bmNZMFJDbmdIeXFMbHM/gaeTuyw/s6sf81abdef)**
---
| | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
---

name: Shaun Finnie
subject: You’re paying for it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Shaun Finnie For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0419 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0419]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0419 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0419]
Inflation just spiked to 3.3%, the steepest monthly jump since the worst of the post-pandemic crisis.
Gas is up 40% in six weeks. Airfare up nearly 15%. Home heating fuel up over 30% in a single month.
Tack on the shipping surcharges, the delivery fees, the nickel-and-diming that's crept into every single purchase, and you've got a cost of living crisis that's not slowing down.
And here's what makes me mad, as a businessman who's spent 30 years looking at numbers: this was a policy choice, but you're the one paying for it.
I grew up with a mom who worked two jobs to keep the lights on and put three kids through college. I know what it looks like when a family is doing everything right and the system still isn't working for them.
I'm running because TX-2 deserves a representative who understands what these numbers mean at the kitchen table, not just on a spreadsheet.
TX-2 is a must-win Red to Blue race, and we need your help.
Can you chip in $10, $20, or $50 today? A grassroots donation from a working person who's had enough will send a strong statement to Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0419] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0420] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0420]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=10&refcode=em0420&express_lane=true] Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=20&refcode=em0420&express_lane=true] Donate $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=35&refcode=em0420&express_lane=true] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=50&refcode=em0420&express_lane=true] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=100&refcode=em0420&express_lane=true] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0420]
We can flip this seat. We can flip the House. But only if people like you decide this moment is worth fighting for.
— Shaun

Michiganders overwhelmingly voted (twice!) to expand absentee ballot access and protect it in our State Constitution.

| Hi Peter, Donald Trump is at it again, trying to make it harder for people to vote.

His unconstitutional executive order to shut down mail-in voting nationwide is just another attack on our right to choose our leaders.

But here’s the thing: **Michiganders overwhelmingly voted (_twice!_) to expand absentee ballot access and protect it in our State Constitution.**

As Chairman of the Michigan Senate Elections committee, I’ve become an expert on election law and am prepared to confront Trump’s lies about voting.

[_**If you know that Michigan controls our own elections, and not Trump, chip in to my campaign today. I’m running to be a bold fighter for Michiganders in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129767358/615473302/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-04-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2MmFjOTMtMDEzYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-sonYEq9Mpsti2pSI5Qxf9C2eGJfyDMngt-57Ix5RIQ=)

After years of fighting to protect voting rights in the Michigan Senate, I know exactly what this is about: making it harder for people to vote. And I’m not going to stand by while Trump and his allies undermine our democracy.

We’ve already seen the damage they’ve done with voter suppression and attacks on mail-in voting. But the good news is, we’ve won this fight before. I won’t stop until every Michigander has equal access to the ballot box – no matter where they live or how they vote.

[_**But I need your help to keep pushing back against this unconstitutional move. Will you chip in today to help support our efforts to protect Michigan’s elections and ensure everyone has a voice in our democracy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129767371/615473361/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-04-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2MmFjOTMtMDEzYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-sonYEq9Mpsti2pSI5Qxf9C2eGJfyDMngt-57Ix5RIQ=)

clean_body: Michiganders overwhelmingly voted (twice!) to expand absentee ballot access and protect it in our State Constitution. | = | Hi Peter, Donald Trump is at it again, trying to make it harder for people to vote. His unconstitutional executive order to shut down mail-in voting nationwide is just another attack on our right to choose our leaders. But here’s the thing: Michiganders overwhelmingly voted (twice!) to expand absentee ballot access and protect it in our State Constitution. As Chairman of the Michigan Senate Elections committee, I’ve become an expert on election law and am prepared to confront Trump’s lies about voting. = | | | = | = | = | = | = After years of fighting to protect voting rights in the Michigan Senate, I know exactly what this is about: making it harder for people to vote. And I’m not going to stand by while Trump and his allies undermine our democracy. We’ve already seen the damage they’ve done with voter suppression and attacks on mail-in voting. But the good news is, we’ve won this fight before. I won’t stop until every Michigander has equal access to the ballot box – no matter where they live or how they vote. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with me in this fight. We will protect Michigan’s right to vote. Jeremy * | | = Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress Jeremy Moss for Congress 2211 S Telegraph Rd PO Box 7023 Bloomfield Hills, MI 48302 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Everything is on the line, and that's not an exaggeration. If we want to revive this nation, we start at the state level: with unapologetic, America First governors who stare down the administrative state and actually deliver results.
The Democrat Machine has already thrown its weight behind Amy Acton - they'll spend whatever it takes to flip Ohio.
And if she wins, we know exactly what's coming:
Dr. Amy Acton - Ohio's Chief Lockdown Officer - ordered businesses to close, banned in-person worship, and shut down our schools during COVID-19, causing lasting harm to kids, families, and communities.
She was wrong then. She's wrong now. But she still defends every decision.
If she becomes Governor, she'll be a roadblock to everything we're fighting for - tax cuts, deregulation, parental rights, election integrity - and she'll do it with the backing of the national Democrat Machine.

clean_body: I'm not one for sugarcoating. This race is razor-thin, and I need your immediate support to build back momentum. | Fellow American, New polling just dropped: we're trailing our Democrat opponent. I'm not one for sugarcoating. | Everything is on the line, and that's not an exaggeration. If we want to revive this nation, we start at the state level: with unapologetic, America First governors who stare down the administrative state and actually deliver results. The Democrat Machine has already thrown its weight behind Amy Acton - they'll spend whatever it takes to flip Ohio. And if she wins, we know exactly what's coming: Dr. Amy Acton - Ohio's Chief Lockdown Officer - ordered businesses to close, banned in-person worship, and shut down our schools during COVID-19, causing lasting harm to kids, families, and communities. She was wrong then. She's wrong now. But she still defends every decision. If she becomes Governor, she'll be a roadblock to everything we're fighting for - tax cuts, deregulation, parental rights, election integrity - and she'll do it with the backing of the national Democrat Machine. | The ONLY thing we ask is for every America First patriot to chip in SOMETHING - whether you live in Ohio or not. The fight for Ohio is the fight for America - and in a race this close, | Gratefully, Vivek | | Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24143%2E4449941%2EjRlIXx) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24143%2E4449941%2EjRlIXx) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73741?t=3&akid=24143%2E4449941%2EjRlIXx) **[Team - in a moment, we're going to ask you to chip in $5 to help block the horrific _Make Elections Great Again Act._ Let us explain.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73741?t=4&akid=24143%2E4449941%2EjRlIXx)** | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73742?t=5&akid=24143%2E4449941%2EjRlIXx)

name: Team Benson
subject: Your $15 donation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
What would you say if we told you that donating $15 to Jocelyn Benson’s
campaign today would help us keep the Michigan governor’s office blue and
elect a leader focused on making life easier and more affordable for
millions of Michiganders?

It may not sound like much but your $15 combined with thousands of others
could be the difference between Michigan electing a governor who will
stand up to Trump, or one who bends a knee to Washington.

Your $15 will help us compete in one of the biggest battleground states
this year.

Your $15 will help us counter the spending of billionaires and corporate
PACs that are pouring millions into Michigan to support Jocelyn’s
opponents.

Your $15 will help us pull ahead in a tied race and reach voters
throughout Michigan with Jocelyn’s message before outside money groups
launch attacks.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4110?t=1001&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]The
donations we receive from emails like this are key to our ability to win
this November. So, if you’re convinced, will you chip in $15 or another
amount?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4111?t=1002&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4112?t=1003&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4113?t=1004&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4114?t=1005&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4115?t=1006&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Donate $250 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4116?t=1007&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l ]Other →

Thank you,

Team Benson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
Unsubscribe: https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=1008&akid=1600%2E181023%2EWv7q8l

Friend,

Polls are now showing only 3 points between me and Greg Abbott.
**Let me break down what this actually means.**
**3 points** is the same thin margin that sent Ann Richards to the Governor's mansion — the last time a Democrat led Texas.

**3 points** is some of the closest polling Greg Abbott has ever seen.

**3 points** means we are not just competing, _we are a real threat and inches away from making history._
**_[Every dollar counts. Will you split $5 between Deb Haaland and my campaign today to help turn 3 points into an electoral victory?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5897?refcode=jtk586-bu-nd&t=1&akid=9090%2E400544%2E6GHoqd)_**
This isn’t just a fantasy anymore. We have a _real path to win_ — but only if we have the resources to fight against Abbott’s millions.

This team's support is exactly what we need for the sprint to November, to fund digital ads for Texas screens across the state. For thousands of text messages to mobilize our supporters. For door-knocking and conversations in neighborhoods Abbott has ignored for years.

President Donald Trump **[signed an executive order Saturday](https://substack.com/redirect/d14a19ac-d28d-4ffc-8791-a10aa739121d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to expedite research into ibogaine--a Schedule I controlled substance championed by Joe Rogan--removing legal restrictions that have prevented extensive studies and establishing FDA protocols for "safe therapeutic use" of psychedelics.
"The text message to the President came back 'sounds great, do you want FDA approval?'" Rogan revealed, emphasizing how fast-acting Trump was when Rogan reached out for help.
## [Watch the incredible moment between Joe Rogan and President Trump here: ](https://substack.com/redirect/d14a19ac-d28d-4ffc-8791-a10aa739121d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d14a19ac-d28d-4ffc-8791-a10aa739121d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d14a19ac-d28d-4ffc-8791-a10aa739121d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The order aims to help** the more than 6,000 US veterans who commit suicide annually, with Trump saying "Today's order will ensure that people suffering from debilitating symptoms might finally have a chance to reclaim their lives and lead a happier life."
* **Preliminary research shows promise** : Clinical trials indicate psychedelics, particularly ibogaine, successfully treat depression, anxiety, PTSD, suicidal ideation and substance abuse, with more than 14 million American adults diagnosed with serious mental illness. CMS Administrator Dr. Mehmet Oz called it "an entire paradigm shift away from a one-day-a-pill model, which has failed so many" and offers those who are drug-resistant "a way of getting out of that rut."
* **What 's next**: The FDA previously granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to specific psychedelic drugs and currently has three applications for in-house research, with officials expecting to hand out vouchers next week. Government-sanctioned treatments could begin as soon as this summer pending FDA authorization, with high-profile supporters including former Texas Gov. Rick Perry, former Sen. Kyrsten Sinema, and Rogan, who said veterans on his podcast shared "life-changing experiences" with the drug.

# **Glamorous Iranian businesswoman with US green card arrested at LAX for allegedly trafficking arms for Tehran**
Shamim Mafi, 44, of Woodland Hills was arrested Saturday night at Los Angeles International Airport and charged with brokering deals for Iranian drones, bombs, and millions of rounds of ammunition bound for Sudan, **[according to the US Attorney for the Central District of California.](https://substack.com/redirect/6eaf16d9-20ea-4be3-a426-801b2f87ee54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[| | | | | Libs of TikTok
---
@libsoftiktok
BREAKING: Iranian national Shamim Mafi arrested at Los Angeles International Airport for allegedly trafficking guns on behalf of the Iranian government. She faces up to 20 years in prison. Mafi was born in Iran and became a lawful United States resident in 2016 under Obama.
| 2:45 PM * Apr 19, 2026 * 21.3K Views69 Replies * 405 Reposts * 1.26K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/4c765bd5-418c-4870-905d-d5a77bc88d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **How she allegedly did it:** Mafi, who left Iran in 2013 and became a permanent US resident in 2016 under the Obama administration, allegedly used a company registered in Oman, Atlas International Business, to broker weapons deals as recently as 2025, including a $70+ million contract for Iranian-made Mohajer-6 armed drones and 55,000 bomb fuses transferred to Sudan's Ministry of Defense.

* **Direct contact with Iranian intelligence** : Phone records indicate Mafi had direct contact with Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) between December 2022 and June 2025, with prosecutors alleging she had no legal authority to oversee such sales. Mafi posted glamorous photos of herself traveling the world, including posing in a $100,000 Mercedes-Benz roadster.

* **The alleged coercion scheme** : A probe showed Tehran seized properties Mafi inherited from her father in 2020, with the Ministry of Intelligence then directing her to open a business in the US to buy the properties back from the Iranian government--with Iran offering to pay start-up costs. Mafi allegedly told investigators she is "more useful" to Iranian spies in Tehran than in the United States, though she denied being tasked by the regime to conduct activities for Tehran in the US.

* * *
# **Wisconsin police use tear gas, rubber bullets as 1,000 animal activists storm beagle breeding facility**
Hundreds of animal welfare activists **[attempted to break through barriers](https://substack.com/redirect/2e0b553d-7766-4f59-b5b8-295d7df9c6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and fencing at Ridglan Farms in Blue Mounds, Wisconsin on Saturday, forcing Dane County Sheriff's deputies to deploy tear gas, pepper balls and rubber bullets after protesters ignored warnings about trespassing on private property. Organizer Wayne Hsiung was arrested within minutes on probable cause for conspiracy to commit burglary, with deputies seizing "burglary tools" including saws, fence cutters, sledgehammers, handcuff keys and tear gas from activists who blocked roads to slow law enforcement response.
[| | | | | Paul A. Szypula 🇺🇸
---
@Bubblebathgirl
Animal rights activists were repelled by less-lethal munitions as they tried to break into a beagle farm, Ridglan Farms, in Wisconsin on Saturday morning. Dane County Sheriff Kalvin Barrett said that 300 to 400 people were "violently trying to break in" to the Ridglan Farms
| 2:39 PM * Apr 19, 2026 * 1.35K Views8 Replies * 11 Reposts * 55 Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/69fa428e-b189-483b-bca7-d529dee1a59a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **RFK Jr. denies NIH still funds facility despite violations** : Rep. Mark Pocan (D-Wis.) told HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a House hearing that "Ridglan Farms has hundreds of code violations, including serious harm to the health of the dogs, yet the NIH is still giving funding to groups that use the beagles from this facility." Kennedy responded "I have a hard time believing that" and claimed "we've ended most" animal testing, but White Coat Waste Project's Justin Goodman accused Kennedy of lying, saying NIH "doled out over $126 million in new funding to dog and cat labs since RFK took office."
* **Second major protest in weeks** : Saturday's clash marked the second high-profile incident at Ridglan Farms--which houses an estimated 2,000 beagles--after activists broke in during March and removed 30 dogs, leading to 27 arrests. The facility agreed last year to surrender its state breeding license effective July 1 under a deal to avoid prosecution on animal mistreatment charges while continuing to deny abuse or neglect.

Glamorous Iranian businesswoman with US green card arrested at LAX for allegedly trafficking arms for Tehran Shamim Mafi, 44, of Woodland Hills was arrested Saturday night at Los Angeles International Airport and charged with brokering deals for Iranian drones, bombs, and millions of rounds of ammunition bound for Sudan, How she allegedly did it: Mafi, who left Iran in 2013 and became a permanent US resident in 2016 under the Obama administration, allegedly used a company registered in Oman, Atlas International Business, to broker weapons deals as recently as 2025, including a $70+ million contract for Iranian-made Mohajer-6 armed drones and 55,000 bomb fuses transferred to Sudan's Ministry of Defense. Direct contact with Iranian intelligence : Phone records indicate Mafi had direct contact with Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) between December 2022 and June 2025, with prosecutors alleging she had no legal authority to oversee such sales. Mafi posted glamorous photos of herself traveling the world, including posing in a $100,000 Mercedes-Benz roadster. The alleged coercion scheme : A probe showed Tehran seized properties Mafi inherited from her father in 2020, with the Ministry of Intelligence then directing her to open a business in the US to buy the properties back from the Iranian government--with Iran offering to pay start-up costs. Mafi allegedly told investigators she is "more useful" to Iranian spies in Tehran than in the United States, though she denied being tasked by the regime to conduct activities for Tehran in the US. Wisconsin police use tear gas, rubber bullets as 1,000 animal activists storm beagle breeding facility Hundreds of animal welfare activists and fencing at Ridglan Farms in Blue Mounds, Wisconsin on Saturday, forcing Dane County Sheriff's deputies to deploy tear gas, pepper balls and rubber bullets after protesters ignored warnings about trespassing on private property. Organizer Wayne Hsiung was arrested within minutes on probable cause for conspiracy to commit burglary, with deputies seizing "burglary tools" including saws, fence cutters, sledgehammers, handcuff keys and tear gas from activists who blocked roads to slow law enforcement response. RFK Jr. denies NIH still funds facility despite violations : Rep. Mark Pocan (D-Wis.) told HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a House hearing that "Ridglan Farms has hundreds of code violations, including serious harm to the health of the dogs, yet the NIH is still giving funding to groups that use the beagles from this facility." Kennedy responded "I have a hard time believing that" and claimed "we've ended most" animal testing, but White Coat Waste Project's Justin Goodman accused Kennedy of lying, saying NIH "doled out over $126 million in new funding to dog and cat labs since RFK took office." Second major protest in weeks : Saturday's clash marked the second high-profile incident at Ridglan Farms--which houses an estimated 2,000 beagles--after activists broke in during March and removed 30 dogs, leading to 27 arrests. The facility agreed last year to surrender its state breeding license effective July 1 under a deal to avoid prosecution on animal mistreatment charges while continuing to deny abuse or neglect. Peter,

Leaders are supposed to have our best interests in mind, but Mariannette Miller-Meeks is nothing more than a mouthpiece for party bosses and corporate interests.

I want to change all that and bring accountability back to Congress. I released an ethics plan last year because members of Congress should always remember who they serve and, sometimes, they need more than a reminder. In Congress, I will fight to:

✅ Ban the trading of stocks by all members of Congress, Executive Branch Members, Supreme Court Justices, their spouses, and staff.

✅ Pass a constitutional amendment to reverse the Citizens United decision and block unlimited corporate spending on campaigns.

✅ Institute term limits and age caps.

✅ Ban family members from being paid by campaigns or official offices

✅ Ban members of Congress from using taxpayer dollars for first-class and business-class air travel.

I wholeheartedly believe it's time to put a stop to the revolving door and put ethics back into our politics. **[If this sounds like a good idea to you, make a donation to strengthen my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129770567/615482748/-2009658230?refcode=em26_260419_ethics_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em26_260419_ethics_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=ccb3c350-073c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2IzYzM1MC0wNzNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SXxK6hndD0Ix_Ry04D7u48kvZ-RVqZj7ZSQ78oF0ckc=)**

name: ICE Warehouses via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to stop mass detention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Right now, ICE is RACING to spend $38 BILLION to turn warehouses across
the country into detention centers to cage over 100,000 members of our
communities. And together we’re going to stop it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1011&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Headline: ICE to spend $38bn turning warehouses into detention centers,
documents show.

As communities across the country speak out to oppose these massive new
detention centers, Congress is pushing forward quickly with yet another
bill to fund ICE’s terror. If we don’t stop them, they’ll rubber stamp
another massive check to ramp up the mass detention of our immigrant
neighbors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1012&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]We need to send a clear message: we MUST stop this mass detention. Add
your name right now to demand Congress say NO to billions more for ICE and
YES to communities, not cages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1013&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]ADD YOUR NAME

Right now, ICE is already using our tax dollars to buy up and convert
warehouses across the country into industrial-scale detention camps where
people are caged in squalid, overcrowded conditions, often without medical
care, adequate sanitation, or legal help.

Already, ICE is detaining more than 70,000 people and growing. And when
ICE’s new wave of mass detention plans are fully in motion, they could
cage over 100,000 people – including families and children.

The good news is that people across the country – even Republican
officials – are fighting back. In Tennessee, ICE tried to build a
mega-facility to detain up to 16,000 people. But thanks to relentless
local organizing, residents forced ICE to cancel. Similar battles are
erupting everywhere from Mississippi to New Hampshire.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1014&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Headline: GOP revolt derails ICE detention plans

On Saturday, April 25th, activists across the country will join forces for
the Communities Not Cages National Day of Action. But despite this outcry,
Congress is pushing ahead with a reconciliation bill to FORCE even more
funding for ICE without ANY Democratic support – with NO reforms, and NO
plan to rein ICE in.

This moment is urgent. We need thousands of us to raise our voices in the
next 48 hours as lawmakers start the process of funneling billions MORE
dollars into tearing families apart.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1015&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Will you add your name right now to demand Congress reject yet another
MASSIVE giveaway to ICE? Our voices will be delivered straight to Hill
offices to show just how powerful this movement is.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37556?source=email-20230419&t=1016&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]ADD YOUR NAME

Across the U.S., everyday people are standing up — in their city councils
to say: no more money for ICE detention camps. No blank checks for an
agency that rips parents from their children and violates the basic rights
of our neighbors.

We can stop this if enough of us stand up together.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20230419.CVvIci&t=1007&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20230419.PibzNv&t=1008&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20230419.ptAfFk&t=1009&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20230419.OAI2WB&t=1010&akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10561%2E5885482%2EP8uUZi

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We can't just say "fight Trump"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129770583/615482899/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmNjODY3NC0wNzNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44h-taGAQdKsnGeeXPF1OJOOmXhsnFDpkwIero9yLqg=)
While I've been traveling across Colorado, one thing I get asked on a daily basis is, _"How do we fix our party?"_
And I get it. Washington's inability to hold Trump accountable for his corruption and chaos is painful to see. But I think we're asking the wrong question.
The Democratic Party is only as useful as its ability to help people. And its failure to do so – **our party's **failure to do so – is a big part of why we're here today asking this question.
**We can't fix it by just running on a platform that says _"Fight Trump"_ and hoping Republicans come to their senses.**
It starts with offering a compelling vision for the future, where:
* No one has to spend more than 30% on housing,

* Kids graduate with skills to earn a living wage and enter the middle class,

* Our health care system maximizes patient wellness instead of profits,

* And teachers aren't quitting en masse because fast-food joints offer better pay, and they can't afford to live where they teach.

Until we do that – and more – we'll always wind up right back here, whether it's Trump leading the GOP or the next crazy MAGA candidate.
**The answers we need will come from all of us here in Colorado,** working together in every corner of our state. We just need a leader with the know-how, vision, and courage to stay focused on improving Coloradans' lives.
That's what I'm running for governor to do – **_[but I'm going to need you with me to get it done. Will you join me by chipping in a few bucks today to help me win this race and be Colorado's next governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129770584/615482900/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmNjODY3NC0wNzNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44h-taGAQdKsnGeeXPF1OJOOmXhsnFDpkwIero9yLqg=)_**

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: No PAC Jack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg?refcode=251201_js_corruption [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg?refcode=251201_js_corruption]
What sets me apart in this race?
❌NO SuperPAC money
❌NO Corporate PAC money
❌NO AIPAC money
❌NO Big Tech money
❌NO AI money
I'm Jack Schlossberg, and I want to represent YOU in Congress, so why would I accept dark money from shady investors who hope I'll put their interests first in Washington?
How can someone fight corruption in DC if they're relying on billionaire bailouts??
The answer is: They can't.
New Yorkers deserve leadership that's only beholden to them – not SuperPACs, not corporations, not Big Tech.
I believe in politics as a way of solving problems, not as a means to gain wealth. Based on where their money is coming from, the insiders in this race can't say the same. I am proud to say we're a grassroots campaign and mean it.
But the political machine in power doesn't want us to pull this off.
They want to elect someone who they can buy, who won't shake things up, who will preserve the status quo that they benefit from...that will never be me, and they know it.
So, I am calling on you to help me prove them all wrong and show that WE CAN DO THIS.
Will you step up and split a donation between me and Resist Reclaim Rebuild today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg]
DONATE TODAY TO HELP WIN THIS RACE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg]
Thank you!!
–NO PAC JACK 💪
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.

But here’s what I know for sure, Peter: Speaking out against this threat has turned my campaign into #1 target of Islamic attack – from Zohran Mamdani, to Ilhan Omar, to the millions of Muslim voters who use their religion as a political tool & weapon. If death be my ultimate punishment... If their goal is to publicly slaughter me in the streets... So be it . I will never turn my back on Christ.I will never turn my back on America.And I will never turn my back on YOU. ? \- Rep. Andy Ogles | PAID FOR BY ANDY OGLES FOR CONGRESS P.O.Box 68009, Franklin, TN, 37068

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: Spineless Lindsey Graham...
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129771979/615487540/-639635826?refcode=WUEFHP46_20260419_AndrewsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1058359&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgwMTVkYS0wODNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zW-l3xeqJ7IbnlZ8SOPSLgEs0aeN2RsG_U_IKtWjJUY=) I’m Dr. Annie Andrews, a pediatrician, a mom of three, and the Democrat running for U.S. Senate to defeat Republican Lindsey Graham in South Carolina.

If we flip this seat, we can end Lindsey Graham’s career and help Democrats retake the Senate, and expand the map for Democrats in future elections.

I know this won’t be easy. But I’ve treated kids who were shot, hospitalized, and failed by broken systems. Nothing about this moment feels optional. ****[**We need an overwhelming surge of grassroots support to prove that we can finally defeat Lindsey Graham. So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in a split donation of $50, $25, or even a $3 donation between EMILYs List and my campaign right now so we can hit our fundraising goals? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129771980/615487541/-639635826?refcode=WUEFHP46_20260419_AndrewsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1058359&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgwMTVkYS0wODNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zW-l3xeqJ7IbnlZ8SOPSLgEs0aeN2RsG_U_IKtWjJUY=)****

Let me introduce myself.

I’ve spent nearly 20 years serving my community as a pediatrician, treating everything from asthma and violent trauma to the emotional toll of growing up in poverty.

I’ve seen what bad policy does to good families — and I’ve seen kids suffer because people like Lindsey Graham would rather protect their own power than protect children.

In 2022, after 15 years of working in hospitals, I ran for Congress because I knew our kids needed a voice in Washington. I lost — and I told my oldest daughter I wouldn’t run again.

But then Trump’s chaos came back.

And Lindsey Graham? He cheered.

The truth is, I’m scared. And I’m angry. And I’m done waiting.

So I’m stepping up — because our kids, and this country can’t afford another six years of Lindsey Graham. ****[**I’m building a people-powered campaign to flip South Carolina and give kids the voice they deserve. And I need your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129771981/615487542/-639635826?refcode=WUEFHP46_20260419_AndrewsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1058359&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgwMTVkYS0wODNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zW-l3xeqJ7IbnlZ8SOPSLgEs0aeN2RsG_U_IKtWjJUY=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129771982/615487543/-639635826?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFHP46_20260419_AndrewsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1058359&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgwMTVkYS0wODNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zW-l3xeqJ7IbnlZ8SOPSLgEs0aeN2RsG_U_IKtWjJUY=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129771983/615487544/-639635826?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFHP46_20260419_AndrewsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1058359&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgwMTVkYS0wODNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zW-l3xeqJ7IbnlZ8SOPSLgEs0aeN2RsG_U_IKtWjJUY=)

Thank you — from the bottom of my heart. This campaign is for the kids, but it only works with you in it.

clean_body: | = I’m Dr. Annie Andrews, a pediatrician, a mom of three, and the Democrat running for U.S. Senate to defeat Republican Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. If we flip this seat, we can end Lindsey Graham’s career and help Democrats retake the Senate, and expand the map for Democrats in future elections. I know this won’t be easy. But I’ve treated kids who were shot, hospitalized, and failed by broken systems. Nothing about this moment feels optional. **= Let me introduce myself. I’ve spent nearly 20 years serving my community as a pediatrician, treating everything from asthma and violent trauma to the emotional toll of growing up in poverty. I’ve seen what bad policy does to good families — and I’ve seen kids suffer because people like Lindsey Graham would rather protect their own power than protect children. In 2022, after 15 years of working in hospitals, I ran for Congress because I knew our kids needed a voice in Washington. I lost — and I told my oldest daughter I wouldn’t run again. But then Trump’s chaos came back. And Lindsey Graham? He cheered. The truth is, I’m scared. And I’m angry. And I’m done waiting. So I’m stepping up — because our kids, and this country can’t afford another six years of Lindsey Graham. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you — from the bottom of my heart. This campaign is for the kids, but it only works with you in it. Until the kids are alright, = Dr. Annie Andrews Democratic Candidate for U.S. Senate | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: JanePAC
subject: This California race could flip the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Cook Political Report agrees.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129772934/615491107/1328794144?refcode=ea.27ebb307-0a3c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.27ebb307-0a3c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZWJiMzA3LTBhM2MtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V8h-TZsYnWp63KKOGb7XuI5wuX2Fjic44cU7MzaV0TA=&emci=17ebb307-0a3c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=27ebb307-0a3c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
| **Here's the situation:** **_Cook Political Report rates California’s 22nd Congressional District as a toss-up — making it one of Democrats' best opportunities to flip a seat in the House this year._** CA-22 just so happens to be the district where our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion Randy Villegas is running for Congress, and it's one of the most consequential congressional races in the country.
---
**Here's why it matters:** We are **three seats** away from flipping the House of Representatives and building a real check on Trump's authoritarian agenda and fossil fuel handouts. But flipping the House is not enough. We need a majority made up of leaders who refuse Big Oil's money — and who will always choose our planet, our democracy, and people over corporate profits. **CA-22 is exactly the kind of race where that choice gets made.**
---
**Here's what we’re up against:** Randy is facing a serious challenge in his primary this June that will determine the kind of Democrat we send to the general election. **His main opponent, State Assemblymember Jasmeet Bains, has taken money from 53 of the same corporations that donated to the Republican incumbent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66.**
---

clean_body: Cook Political Report agrees. | | Here's the situation: Cook Political Report rates California’s 22nd Congressional District as a toss-up — making it one of Democrats' best opportunities to flip a seat in the House this year. CA-22 just so happens to be the district where our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion Randy Villegas is running for Congress, and it's one of the most consequential congressional races in the country. Here's why it matters: We are three seats away from flipping the House of Representatives and building a real check on Trump's authoritarian agenda and fossil fuel handouts. But flipping the House is not enough. We need a majority made up of leaders who refuse Big Oil's money — and who will always choose our planet, our democracy, and people over corporate profits. CA-22 is exactly the kind of race where that choice gets made. Here's what we’re up against: Randy is facing a serious challenge in his primary this June that will determine the kind of Democrat we send to the general election. His main opponent, State Assemblymember Jasmeet Bains, has taken money from 53 of the same corporations that donated to the Republican incumbent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66. Here's what we're doing about it: JanePAC is mobilizing grassroots supporters like you to make sure a true leader — not a corporate-backed alternative — makes it to the general election in November. A toss-up rating means this race is genuinely winnable, and it means every dollar of grassroots support helps power this movement forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's do this, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Dear Fellow Patriot, **[I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMGOpCAQhp8Gb3awsGE8cOgZ20kf3GxmN-6RVCM6JCBGkH39jbPdDzC3qr-q_sr3_-lVj9bZZf6B3kidrdqiiims1jkzo4vTFnwOyS6zAgq8pHVZNccSFKPUI2dQGFkJwXl1ZowWn_I-YcOAvTDAxgjQjPOzqKfRvDCK4k4LKw8nWldNxaszwAmpqUWtTVPdDTWCk5ru64jJxJMOSzRbxmSzscsSjiosJx184eRnSmsk7EKgI9ChR436a7yZnE86EOhWRI_p8Y9HO2XghHV78iqGfdOGsPa1fS8_rgMBfsjejHb3hLXX_qFo9CvaeSGsfRqp1_ZdXfrLb_Xr1g3wv_-4DurnpXwbbo_DpAlr34Zb-eQtNjmuf61zNnJBajp7tO4LJn0z-yzhXwAAAP__UcuNKw)** And at a moment like this, we are reaching out to Americans who still believe in election integrity, the Constitution, and the fundamental principle that **only citizens should decide our elections.** If you’ve ever heard of **AMAC Action** , you know that we are one of the nation’s leading conservative advocacy organizations—mobilizing millions of Americans to stand up for limited government, secure elections, and the values that made this country great.Right now, we need your voice. **[Please click here to submit your signed “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition in the next 48 hours.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMGOpCAQhp8Gb3awsGE8cOgZ20kf3GxmN-6RVCM6JCBGkH39jbPdDzC3qr-q_sr3_-lVj9bZZf6B3kidrdqiiims1jkzo4vTFnwOyS6zAgq8pHVZNccSFKPUI2dQGFkJwXl1ZowWn_I-YcOAvTDAxgjQjPOzqKfRvDCK4k4LKw8nWldNxaszwAmpqUWtTVPdDTWCk5ru64jJxJMOSzRbxmSzscsSjiosJx184eRnSmsk7EKgI9ChR436a7yZnE86EOhWRI_p8Y9HO2XghHV78iqGfdOGsPa1fS8_rgMBfsjejHb3hLXX_qFo9CvaeSGsfRqp1_ZdXfrLb_Xr1g3wv_-4DurnpXwbbo_DpAlr34Zb-eQtNjmuf61zNnJBajp7tO4LJn0z-yzhXwAAAP__UcuNKw)** My friend, you know that with razor-thin margins in the House and Senate, all bets are off after the midterm elections. That means we must act **now** , while we still have the opportunity.We must **BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING** before it’s too late.Today, millions of illegal immigrants who entered the country are being counted in ways that directly impact political power.And that means:
---
* More congressional seats for states with large illegal populations
* More Electoral College votes
* More federal funding

clean_body: So another poll just came out. Here’s what that really means: Hi, it’s Chris. I need to be direct with you: A new poll just came out, and our lead is slipping. = National Republicans are pouring in cash and surging to try and flip this seat – and we’re falling short of where we should be at this point in the month. = Here’s what this new poll really means: John Sununu has made it clear he’ll stand with Donald Trump and protect his agenda in the Senate. And now he’s just one point behind us. If Republicans win here in New Hampshire, it would cement their majority for years to come – and give Trump unchecked power in Washington. I’ve taken on tough fights before, and I know we can win this one too. But only if we have the resources to fight back right now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = This will decide whether we can keep up, respond to attacks, and reach the voters we need to win. I’m counting on your grassroots support. Thanks for being with me, Chris If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can .** Click here to . [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129773263/615492522/926634065?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_041926_B1_Schlossbergsplit_reflections&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWEwMmIyNy0wYjNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6wKucdtMfrvH2WRO7DAc9knK2MHTKcp3bDuf6ZgOxU=) Lately, I've been doing some reflecting on my grandfather, President John F. Kennedy, and his legacy of hope. In my run to fight for NY-12 in Congress, and just as a person, that's what I want to focus on. **_Hope._** My name is Jack, or John Bouvier Kennedy Schlossberg if you want to know the whole thing. In high school, I spent hours watching my grandfather's speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. **When we fight for hope, we're not just doing it for ourselves, we're doing it for each other and the future we all have to share.** I know I have big shoes to fill. In my grandfather's memory, I've led a life of caring about this a lot. I put that care and effort and hope into everything I do. But this is bigger than me. It's bigger than my family's legacy. Hope is hard to find in Politics these days, but if we let it die out completely, that's how we really lose. Now cannot be the time to stop caring or turn away. **We have to double down in our pursuit of hope.** I really think this election is the one — our last chance to stop Trump and change the direction we're heading in. [I need you to know that I believe we can do it. I believe in hope, and I believe in us. Will you believe with me? You can make a difference by splitting a donation between our campaign for NY-12 and the Democratic Party of Georgia today >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129773264/615492523/926634065?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_041926_B1_Schlossbergsplit_reflections&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWEwMmIyNy0wYjNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6wKucdtMfrvH2WRO7DAc9knK2MHTKcp3bDuf6ZgOxU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Democratic Party of Georgia and Jack Schlossberg immediately:_

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = Lately, I've been doing some reflecting on my grandfather, President John F. Kennedy, and his legacy of hope. In my run to fight for NY-12 in Congress, and just as a person, that's what I want to focus on. Hope. My name is Jack, or John Bouvier Kennedy Schlossberg if you want to know the whole thing. In high school, I spent hours watching my grandfather's speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. When we fight for hope, we're not just doing it for ourselves, we're doing it for each other and the future we all have to share. I know I have big shoes to fill. In my grandfather's memory, I've led a life of caring about this a lot. I put that care and effort and hope into everything I do. But this is bigger than me. It's bigger than my family's legacy. Hope is hard to find in Politics these days, but if we let it die out completely, that's how we really lose. Now cannot be the time to stop caring or turn away. We have to double down in our pursuit of hope. I really think this election is the one — our last chance to stop Trump and change the direction we're heading in. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Democratic Party of Georgia and Jack Schlossberg immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. \- Jack | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard. But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing. body:

| | | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fpebkmqg_u1uDg-sklQ0Ug~~/AAUS1hA~/3hgJnKH8AUqzp4gxYKISarQYqoKtUNA-5uTKotBE8X1aLM9dooK_rYZy5fpfhep8oe-rZ-pEl6BCBmZarhwh0gXXiM7M4oP6oBal0I3tTMEe9U2efy-MDk6mEfiLKYkuvZXSzu_zJAvtgi01_ByjC4PGXCcq3hM79X8jtqTtRh99L-OthPX_Af7JE96sTPPs) | Folks, MAGA really thought this seat was safe.

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: We don’t know who exactly is funding the midterm elections this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
But grassroots supporters like YOU can help us change that
#
Peter,
There has been a lot of news recently about WHO exactly is funding the midterm elections. And unfortunately, often the conclusion is that we don’t actually know that much at all.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103013?refcode=em20260419-10325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10325%2E614464%2EBZzRtp)
**Between the billionaires and dark money groups already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into competitive elections across the country, it’s hard to pinpoint exactly who is trying to exert all this influence over our politics.**
**_Today, you can help us change that._**
With your help, we’re building a grassroots movement of people like you who believe that by electing Democrats across the country we can end the influence of shady mega-donors corrupting this system.
**[So we’re urgently asking: Can you make a donation of whatever you can – even just $5 or $10 – to support our efforts to do exactly that?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103013?refcode=em20260419-10325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10325%2E614464%2EBZzRtp)**

And unfortunately, often the conclusion is that we don’t actually know that much at all. Between the billionaires and dark money groups already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into competitive elections across the country, it’s hard to pinpoint exactly who is trying to exert all this influence over our politics. Today, you can help us change that. With your help, we’re building a grassroots movement of people like you who believe that by electing Democrats across the country we can end the influence of shady mega-donors corrupting this system. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We’re so grateful for your support, Peter. – SDC HQ Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Take Back California
subject: Breaking Poll Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Take Back California
body:
New Emerson numbers just landed. The top-two strategy is working.

[https://eblastem.com/r/d38cb396fce97cc8f8ea78ef6?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YTowOnt9czo1OiJlbWFpbCI7aTo1MzM7czo0OiJzdGF0IjtzOjIyOiI2OWU1MDgwNjY4ZTg5MDY4OTk3NDA5IjtzOjQ6ImxlYWQiO3M6NToiNDM1ODMiO3M6NzoiY2hhbm5lbCI7YToxOntzOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjUzMzt9fQ%3D%3D]

Breaking · Poll Results

THE FIELD IS BREAKING OUR WAY.

New Emerson numbers put Hilton at 17% and Bianco at 14%. Both
Republicans are consolidating. The Democratic field is still
fractured.

April 17, 2026

The new Emerson poll just dropped, and it validates everything we’ve
been saying. This is the moment we’ve been preparing for.

For months we have made one argument: California’s top-two primary
is the opening Republicans have been missing. Split the vote smart,
get both Hilton and Bianco into the November runoff, and one of them
becomes governor. The other shapes the cabinet. Either way, California
changes.

Emerson Poll / CA Governor

Steve Hilton (R)
17%
+4

Chad Bianco (R)
14%
+3

Tom Steyer (D, leading Democrat)
14%
—

Emerson College Polling, fielded April 14–15, 2026. Likely voters,
±3.1%.

Hilton gained four points in a month. Bianco gained three. The
Democratic field is still in disarray. Steyer leads with the same
share as Bianco, and the next five Democrats are fighting for second
place. Swalwell’s freefall left room for someone else, but no one
has filled it.

Two Republicans on top. One governor’s mansion. Forty-six days until
the primary.

This does not win itself. Republican voters across the state still
have to hear the message. Vote for both. Tell their network to vote
for both. Get both into the runoff. That is what TBCA exists to do,
and that is what your contribution funds.
• • •

We are not a campaign. We do not build a campaign apparatus. We
communicate the math to the Republican donors, activists, and opinion
leaders who move votes. And we have forty-six days to finish the job.

Contribute

Fund the final 46 days.

Every dollar goes to reaching Republican voters before ballots drop.

One dollar per day through primaryContribute $27

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: The field is wide open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We’re counting on Porter Supporters like you.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41182%2E3422442%2E5zmfhq)
Peter,
A lot has changed in the California governor’s race since we launched this campaign last year, but one thing is the same: **the field is wide open.**
With just over six weeks until polls close, every candidate is polling below 20%. ‘Undecided’ has more support than any one candidate. **There’s plenty of room for us to push Katie into the lead.**
The final days of this election will see these voters deciding who to support, but only two candidates can move onto the November primary election. **We have to act now to win over those voters before other campaigns do.**
That means staying on the road to meet voters in every part and pocket of California, and raising money to keep our TV ad on the air. We’re counting on Porter Supporters like you to power that work.
Katie can win this race if we leave no stone unturned between now and June 2nd. It’s going to take all of us to make that happen.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more to win over undecided voters and get Katie on the November ballot?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260419_1_ak.mRIfsl&refcode=em20260419-41182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41182%2E3422442%2E5zmfhq)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260419-41182&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41182_3422442_5zmfhq&akid=41182%2E3422442%2E5zmfhq)**

Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> April 19, 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._W_JTT-5WghXapBHg)
---
| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[WATCH: Ted Cruz Slams Dems, Media At California GOP Convention:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) **"U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, called the Democratic Party the party of the rich and the press "liars" during an hour-long speech at this weekend's California Republican Convention. Cruz also discussed some of the national Republican Party's priorities, which include fighting for parental rights, pushing back on transgender ideology and curbing illegal immigration. "We have seen illegal border crossings drop more than 99%," Cruz told a ballroom audience of prominent Republicans on Saturday night at the Sheraton San Diego Resort. "What does it mean when..." **[Cruz Says Trump'Spoke To Me Seriously' About Supreme Court Vacancies:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-FPAxdK8MhTGRFRj5KUA)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) on Wednesday said President Trump spoke to him "seriously" about filling a hypothetical Supreme Court vacancy in his first term but maintained that his priority is policy fights instead of ruling on legal battles. "In the first Trump term, the president spoke to me seriously about all three vacancies, and three times I said no, because I don't want to be out of the arena of the political battle," Cruz said during a Wall Street Journal Opinion Live interview. "I think there's ... too much need there," the Texas lawmaker added, referring to policy battles in..." **[Cruz Calls Carlson'Deranged, Leftist Psycho' Following Comments On Muslims:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Texas Sen. Ted Cruz (R) accused right-wing commentator Tucker Carlson of turning into a "deranged, Leftist psycho" who "loves Sharia" law on Wednesday in a social media post. Cruz was responding to a post from his media company on the social platform X, which stated, "Muslims love Jesus." "That's why Donald Trump's painting depicting himself as the Son of God offended the president of Iran. It was an attack on his religion as well as Christianity," the Tucker Carlson Network wrote, in response to a controversial post from President..." **[Senators Cornyn, Cruz Lash Out At Houston Catch And Release Immigration Ordinance:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._xDtY_Ore_ZgipzCeg)** "Senator Ted Cruz and Senator John Cornyn have both issued stinging rebukes of Houston City Council's decision to further minimize local police cooperation with Immigration and Customs Enforcement. "The Houston City Council's new sanctuary city policy is not only absurd - it's dangerous. Immigration enforcement is a critical part of ensuring national security and public safety.
