Democrats are laser-focused and organized. While Operation Epic Fury unfolds, we're distracted, exhausted and chasing memes -- with only 7 months until the midterms. If Democrats take the House, it's game over.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.kYusMgmTy3dS9qtCSn_l8Ra8Pet7oWxtE9zkmR3Etq4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=194661660)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/360c7aca-7267-4f34-9559-5f99beb64346?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The 14th Amendment was written after the Civil War to protect the rights of freed slaves -- not to grant automatic citizenship to the children of illegal immigrants.
Section 1 is crystal clear in its original intent: "All persons born or naturalized in the United States, and subject to the jurisdiction thereof..." That jurisdiction clause matters. A lot. In my latest video, I break down the history, the text, and why this amendment was never meant to be a blanket "birthright citizenship" policy for those who enter the country illegally.
We've watched this loophole get stretched far beyond what the framers intended -- and the consequences are playing out at our borders every single day. If you care about the Constitution, rule of law, and what "subject to the jurisdiction thereof" actually means, this one is for you. Watch the full video here: [Watch Now: Born in the USA... But Who Was the 14th Amendment Really For?](https://substack.com/redirect/53775f75-2cc2-4adc-8a2e-20c812a25482?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What do you think? Was the 14th Amendment intended for this? Drop your thoughts below -- and share this with someone who still believes in the actual meaning of our founding documents. Truth over narrative. Always. -- Kathy

Surprise. Surprise. Instead of wealthy white liberals personally funding the cause they champion, the money came through public revenue streams tied in part to cannabis sales tax, property-related taxes, and other taxpayer-backed sources.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05f3fcf5-4515-43d4-9ad3-890d8a6fbe55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In this episode of The Kathy Barnette Show, we break down what's happening inside the Republican Party--and why the SAVE Act, a bill requiring proof of citizenship for federal voter registration, may face resistance from within.

Is this political dysfunction... or something more deliberate?

Kathy walks through:

1\. What the SAVE Act actually does (and why it matters)

2\. Why passing it should be straightforward under Republican control

3\. The internal resistance building inside the GOP

4\. Whether this is weakness, strategy, or something else entirely

This is bigger than one bill. It's about whether those in power are willing to act--and what happens when they don't.

subject: Graham Platner’s best endorsement yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We were built for moments like this.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260419-1&t=1&akid=3386%2E587540%2ESMQmsR)
Peter, if Chuck Schumer is against you, you’re probably doing something right:
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260419_1_graham.7BI2FZ&refcode=em20260419-3386&amount=5&t=2&akid=3386%2E587540%2ESMQmsR)
**Less than two months from today, Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate is taking on Janet Mills in the Democratic primary for the Maine Senate race.**
Leaders We Deserve was built to meet moments like this. Establishment figures like Chuck Schumer are firmly behind Janet Mills. But Mills is 77-years-old and if elected, she would be the oldest first-term Senator in US history and would serve alongside Maine’s Senior Senator, Angus King, who is 81 years old. This isn’t meant as an attack on her. It’s just the way it is.
And with how much is on the line in this fight, we desperately need a new bench of bold leaders. That’s why Leaders We Deserve is fighting to elect Graham and a new generation of bold young progressives who can lead our fight into the future.
Peter, your donations help us support our slate of new leaders and endorse even more candidates. We _never_ take corporate PAC money. We rely on real, grassroots supporters like you who are invested in electing better politicians.
**[Will you contribute $5 to elect leaders like Graham across the country?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260419_1_graham.7BI2FZ&refcode=em20260419-3386&amount=5&t=3&akid=3386%2E587540%2ESMQmsR)**

Thank you for your support,
David

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: It’s ironic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=2028%2E251025%2EGBvNGi ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=2028%2E251025%2EGBvNGi ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

We want to tell you about something that happened at one of our campus
rallies.

In the middle of his speech, Abdul said something simple: “In America, it
should be one person, one vote. Not groups like AIPAC coming in to pour
$100 million into races like ours to influence the results.”

The room ROARED with cheers and people banging on desks in support. They
know the system isn’t working the way it’s supposed to.

But the irony is, to change this broken system, we have to beat it.

AIPAC has already told its donors that Abdul is a dangerous candidate in
the 2026 election cycle for the US-Israel relationship — and they’re
preparing to spend whatever it takes to stop us.

The only way we’ll fight back and overcome this type of spending is if we
band together. That’s why we’re asking:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260419-1-ak.aMSVdF&amount=10&refcode=em20260419-2028&t=1004&akid=2028%2E251025%2EGBvNGi ]Can you chip in $10 today to help us continue meeting

Team Abdul

Read that again. Nearly _4 in 10 Republicans may stay home._

>>> They take back the Senate.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Virginia: Go vote on Tuesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026]
Derek,
Donald Trump has spent months trying to rig elections in the GOP’s favor ahead of the midterms. On Tuesday, Virginia voters have the chance to use their voices and fight back.
Virginians can vote YES on a temporary redistricting measure that levels the playing field and keeps our elections in the hands of the people.
I’m supporting a YES vote because I believe this will restore fairness in our elections and prevent Donald Trump from locking in power months before the November midterm election.
Here's everything you need to know to vote in Tuesday’s election:
— Polls will open at 6 AM and close at 7 PM.
— If you’re voting by mail, make sure that your ballot is complete and postmarked before polls close on Tuesday.
For polling locations and everything else you need, visit IWillVote.com/VA [http://iwillvote.com/?state=VA] .
And if you’re able to help get out the vote, Virginians for Fair Elections is looking for volunteers right now to call and text Virginia voters before Tuesday.
Right-wing misinformation has been rampant to attempt to muddy the waters and confuse voters, so volunteers can make a real impact by getting the truth out before Election Day.
Click the links below to sign up to volunteer:
* Make phone calls [https://www.mobilize.us/virginiansforfairelections/event/899732/]
* Canvass in your neighborhood [https://www.mobilize.us/virginiansforfairelections/?tag_ids=699]
If you’re on board, please share this email with your friends and family in Virginia who are eligible to vote.
This election is happening on Tuesday, not in November — please don't sit this one out!
Thanks for always stepping up and staying engaged when it matters.
—Tim

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Trump just pulled prosecutors from clinic protection cases
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129777285/615505218/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGZmNjkwZS0xOTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HYhM9dKtJoTJFYCeDl21YjbZ_iIuIO1RZrOOVoQTdA8=&emci=a99b663a-5c3a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7dff690e-193c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

The Trump administration just removed federal prosecutors who worked on cases under the FACE Act—a law that's meant to protect patients and providers from harassment and violence at reproductive health clinics.

They're saying it's about "bias" and "misconduct" tied to cases involving anti-abortion activists. But here's the truth: Those prosecutors were enforcing a law that exists because clinics and patients have faced real threats and intimidation for years.

Their job was to make sure people could get care safely. That's not biased. **That's simply them doing their jobs.**

And the reality on the ground hasn't changed—people going to clinics are still being harassed and intimidated just for seeking legal medical care. Providers are still dealing with threats, proving that these protections exist for a reason. Pulling prosecutors off these cases doesn't make that problem go away; it just makes enforcement weaker at a time when access to safe, legal reproductive care is already under very real threat.

This is another step in a broader pattern of an anti-abortion agenda that keeps chipping away at protections for patients and the people who care for them. We don't have to accept that direction. As the only pro-choice doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting every day to protect a woman’s right to receive the care she needs. We need leaders, like Kim, who will actually defend reproductive freedom and protect clinic safety—and that starts with building enough power to replace Republicans with more pro-choice Democrats.

clean_body: Peter, The Trump administration just removed federal prosecutors who worked on cases under the FACE Act—a law that's meant to protect patients and providers from harassment and violence at reproductive health clinics. They're saying it's about "bias" and "misconduct" tied to cases involving anti-abortion activists. But here's the truth: Those prosecutors were enforcing a law that exists because clinics and patients have faced real threats and intimidation for years. Their job was to make sure people could get care safely. That's not biased. That's simply them doing their jobs. And the reality on the ground hasn't changed—people going to clinics are still being harassed and intimidated just for seeking legal medical care. Providers are still dealing with threats, proving that these protections exist for a reason. Pulling prosecutors off these cases doesn't make that problem go away; it just makes enforcement weaker at a time when access to safe, legal reproductive care is already under very real threat. This is another step in a broader pattern of an anti-abortion agenda that keeps chipping away at protections for patients and the people who care for them. We don't have to accept that direction. As the only pro-choice doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting every day to protect a woman’s right to receive the care she needs. We need leaders, like Kim, who will actually defend reproductive freedom and protect clinic safety—and that starts with building enough power to replace Republicans with more pro-choice Democrats. = Dear Friend,

Have you ever wondered how the earliest Christians worshiped and prayed, endured persecution and hardship, and defended their faith in the Roman Empire?
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/w66MX_B4KV8FTUvYPAbyo0DQXBQkwnwIyvO_Yfg4Str4GvfKlTUU_kLC4i-W3AQilROWHIOFZo-wBG-OJuaWjYlWDX0laAc6bW1YxIo2mn1LawbZjyuhx7QGvJ_wYGIq-FIK4PWEDGPn5cVIklRvetkaikO4X_Mbj73zP_SzdojfA33dswmfPfepmFumbW8GoxMVhoS5tH6-JPbwdeYO_U5ggKZlFai9Mzt9BMi7N-ObI62Pwr1kJjZKqa6LoJCkbbKHp78Dg7Lr1s3op2ab0xUQpDw0xRVCL_UhPJRc8CGcPnEjJBbRtI1YqedeVgKOVR9KEjq2Dh_R-UO1PPEbvS7MJ73uE1_1csuCh7kUiseTPzPoQL-sISpfxhhIJ-RLekkHzH86ed0-Jk1BNvitZBwhBxegnU9WyG4Q5qnPB36rtd7v3MGUPDxA2PXRdJvazr0Q94fD4bXA5j-UTJPZ8vFTwfNm1tBBIlIfwfrQhQNqd00va4q2d1daY07GZJpG1SkNLvBrutaKu4_IIC0fEs4VDsRr2iyU27OodZjVA9sd1a5IhbsqOwEudHpLGmoPRwnDuqbKqboynBSwrxyVLdvnpkzpW5D34lQWq2ZiiHWJ5d3cqAZVE1J_ZhEovmT9stcrswEt_iegRb6R7Ew3aLGAEyX63TuAaDJL5orQdRwTCxs7g7kYmZX7jd-Ljo82pipVTiViaoDZRRgktcUXQTz6gZOaPjZXLM2pa7BdMmH3z3jPeKVpLqQMrNF_K3FRBTx8t0Ul19VZkpB-bQKuWCgibPu-7Kz9LW3Kz5JPg7P5JpaB0DdTAdEu4Q/BCXzqdHffHHLa6YaydHt_a1p4DfKYm1u/19)
Beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations, and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from Jesus' ministry, to the Apostles, through the age of Constantine.

Do you have the same issue?

**Now you can explore these stories in Hillsdale College 's course, "Ancient Christianity," available on DVD and sent to you at no cost.** All you have to do is complete the form using the secure link below. There's no cost or obligation-your DVD is 100% free to you.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert will guide you through the first four centuries of Christianity, showing how the faith survived persecution and ultimately transformed the Roman Empire.

clean_body: Have you ever wondered how the earliest Christians worshiped and prayed, endured persecution and hardship, and defended their faith in the Roman Empire? | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Friend, Have you ever wondered how the earliest Christians worshiped and prayed, endured persecution and hardship, and defended their faith in the Roman Empire? Beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations, and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from Jesus' ministry, to the Apostles, through the age of Constantine. Do you have the same issue? Now you can explore these stories in Hillsdale College 's course, "Ancient Christianity," available on DVD and sent to you at no cost. All you have to do is complete the form using the secure link below. There's no cost or obligation-your DVD is 100% free to you. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert will guide you through the first four centuries of Christianity, showing how the faith survived persecution and ultimately transformed the Roman Empire. Click the secure link below to request your FREE DVD box set of the course "Ancient Christianity" today: We hope you enjoy the story of the first Christians' courage and faith. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

My first instinct was to reach out to you. You have always been there for me, and I wanted you to be the very first person to see this. I am at a _**_total loss for words_**_ —I never thought I would see something like this in writing.
This is devastating, and I need your eyes on it immediately. We **__cannot__** ignore what has been uncovered.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: A quick look at what’s happening right now
body:
This is one of those early signals | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d948c328553e44b2858f92edfea0afbe&_e=Gy8B5d-VRt21MgqGU4o-6hCTSwqUDjvZK0m5Qy20eRyooFJnrnB4yyK4nTovQS9kMjAn-0FO5bEe-louoNK6oZm5gDrHnSKL9p6Mu-Y796MME-Zhohptmn2GFlp-8dsYtO5TwcRdxMy-xRgZjlRbJ5Mzrgx0xhj4Nwhon34syzsCICUf5u4p-X7-lV6DdMaQ9FD7vm4sMNtqVOSN3YwPPpbJxJfeqlXnC5ZO1AVYpsUisL9ED4o3RQt1qgKqvujmTSeFFlV3LHKymDGjo7i1coo16h7s4yxVzGFvvPsPu9mFQarJqiptFaUEZSTv78FfpnGyP25pRRAWoHjxychuJNzsDJekV0Scv5dC0KfgW0OQIZapvhfV-BG7y_gCBfGxznQ0wjRPnm_2qszfq6lhZzhRQhfSPyzk6atfp1DTirIAnv2A2V7g6yQxLrohOhLIlCOmJOjMvtsIJelZaGIMeQgdxpR74XErykz6qtU1PtG7jKwCmqmOP6_UCNy7RdrVs69RUH2-496vXH9jibFYTp6eTmBFVmP9TDNASmR3Ek3G1W6DK8TR2k6-DgcBPlz42kHC7AdE_N-4fn2y0Q8SPbrZ-8j7LxDZq1rhhTrK4lJyViplbIgNA-mucExUxHUrlZo623-Fwg65SpeKEwHIIBgkNhLF1bTz3GNL_TxR_Xlx9NaODUiQmniIKwgXIjrUlrVgaEOiXfRfmNIJMJKQtQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,
---
I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground.

Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d948c328553e44b2858f92edfea0afbe&_e=Gy8B5d-VRt21MgqGU4o-6hCTSwqUDjvZK0m5Qy20eRyooFJnrnB4yyK4nTovQS9kMjAn-0FO5bEe-louoNK6oZm5gDrHnSKL9p6Mu-Y796MME-Zhohptmn2GFlp-8dsYtO5TwcRdxMy-xRgZjlRbJ5Mzrgx0xhj4Nwhon34syzsCICUf5u4p-X7-lV6DdMaQ9FD7vm4sMNtqVOSN3YwPPpbJxJfeqlXnC5ZO1AVYpsUisL9ED4o3RQt1qgKqvujmjRqtRLbZBZSpmYkfPxQeoEVanm5Ewba-7uo1XErrLWvq7xtr0kEtZH80E9ixdCYjV_4mOaJWBEjr9bYhA7z03D1iOxrXcDhkh3ISF3avIpmfXLSRoT2oJspAWJ1QQq0FF-2leTPUBte73Av6A4_e13__JtOZD5T1m4IdExS-22IUuIGOyffsZYR4h55BskPOKhYZuovsw0MbubP9avKP4l5UlrXa8Skjzydd6sfwiCd0d7zuE1h51HjxgxgQBKSuYJqxSmk1N7sSAETRPxxnJFiMgM3Fwd_-YC_9a_LQGLn1jLMLoy22RL2TQA0Jsd-l6tLP66lqM4bigtepKjR6c-Ur785UyP1lie44yvUbt_w3oNXj2-XiodLlWuZ5wnS8jIw9C-CtWH-Y97Dmbx-k8iGNq_uWpTNU8qaxhbEns9t5FDcGOjnEDXA6jRQ4KM4pYowIgiwu7XsQlAGtcALFtQ%3D%3D)
---
_Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona_
---
These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them.

They're already claimed. And we don't have extras.

By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in.

Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it.

That's where things stand right now.

We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

And I don't say that lightly.

Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down.

The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great.

And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing.

Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back.

**We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. **

For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there.

And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d948c328553e44b2858f92edfea0afbe&_e=Gy8B5d-VRt21MgqGU4o-6hCTSwqUDjvZK0m5Qy20eRyooFJnrnB4yyK4nTovQS9kMjAn-0FO5bEe-louoNK6oZm5gDrHnSKL9p6Mu-Y796MME-Zhohptmn2GFlp-8dsYtO5TwcRdxMy-xRgZjlRbJ5Mzrgx0xhj4Nwhon34syzsCICUf5u4p-X7-lV6DdMaQ9FD7vm4sMNtqVOSN3YwPPpbJxJfeqlXnC5ZO1AVYpsUisL9ED4o3RQt1qgKqvujmhXQmpVFZfgmaIgpsxG5vsD_Vun0hj91VmRuzu-2m2VJTshxebVpxCqqhNRJjcXdCqa6X7bWm3guEYsPb2YQQuuLgviY3RuL4pPD9ckxY4gOYRTCZP7Fqv1tEVPy2CWZHZvtL8qz_tjcn3zX9YWpmOEXVJWOSH1X8HUuRUDBIlYZHd_qrFneEfTyYmqC52SjjIyytNZo_L4g_VffojmoL_8IdNgBPLS_RkMXN6CoIhX0bknOtjJDE24UOszMGDnuRQKwCOqMY8kJQDrAJXgLq55aLCDihRJdv7W-Z6UOFQZjTuVlgza4C_99RUnMLzeSlMbkdnTLYk1W_qEgAUp3-5yy1nv1REF-L-pYJ0wAW1QM8R_Zz-3WVD8vW-zeZj8MgwQvIvBi7UFmilsCyPUJc88S_5yGiz5utuihsXakjrUTD9v4eLiB4ST9eLXwxgW93ZkJPJ2IL-rFb88VQIrXm8g%3D%3D)
---
That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens.

And it's not isolated growth anymore.

**We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. **

But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America.

That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation...

And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak.

So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build.

What's different now is the pace.

**Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: **

✅ Arkansas
✅ Florida
✅ Idaho
✅ Indiana
✅ Montana
✅ Nebraska
✅ Oklahoma
✅ South Carolina
✅ Texas
✅ Tennessee

That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d948c328553e44b2858f92edfea0afbe&_e=Gy8B5d-VRt21MgqGU4o-6hCTSwqUDjvZK0m5Qy20eRyooFJnrnB4yyK4nTovQS9kMjAn-0FO5bEe-louoNK6oZm5gDrHnSKL9p6Mu-Y796MME-Zhohptmn2GFlp-8dsYtO5TwcRdxMy-xRgZjlRbJ5Mzrgx0xhj4Nwhon34syzsCICUf5u4p-X7-lV6DdMaQ9FD7vm4sMNtqVOSN3YwPPpbJxJfeqlXnC5ZO1AVYpsUisL9ED4o3RQt1qgKqvujmbclFwfGYqScC0LaR_3AY99AJ8jzqWG2OLUbwLEotN_j0d9lu4Dri1Kdy3-_mTHTFJI3LMCXBFDtl3PRXvwGPx3_N2nMBdza-Qku2hHAYuqXsO6b3pXvb25RYfvjsNvRxIRDQGL9dNKTpD_ZCKsH_MlRTNeEjMUeBAOjNJ2pwaAplx4FZEtO6iDKeBKlQf8WD9ICJpAqukBrrZMsmfaH2XzqkhP--4dMgYvYOYqH0vZz3ly842_oRm3BkE_8rwqV2UuM8kaxAveh0xLP16Sfn2i3wyhrTIz2Xg3yw-JUph1luhUed0QDtRuK9DSg_kuGjbGdd5Mbli22kJdBcFx1Q2q7eTzPPkLI9TbcVSuVqRANbrr4_4u7vdUKjrYtVn7IOlFMM9ydFD3XzcMNhV0c77ysclQ3XTM0F9YhoMHoXWNaMdlK5VMrivfGsDYuoy60EpOMTL-mXaC2yistr-pSO8A%3D%3D)
---
That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly.

It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up.

Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through.

And right now, that's where we're stretched.

We're not lacking interest or momentum.

We're working to keep up with both.

_So here 's how you can help... _

Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it.

**An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: **

✅ Constitutions.
✅ Chapter guides.
✅ Flags.
✅ Materials to organize and lead.

It turns a student who wants to speak up... _into one who actually does. _

And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here."

**[Each activism kit costs $25 to pack and ship to a student chapter. clean_body: This is one of those early signals | | | | | Friend, I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground. Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible. Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them. They're already claimed. And we don't have extras. By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in. Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it. That's where things stand right now. We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. And I don't say that lightly. Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down. The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great. And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing. Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back. We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there. And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet. That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens. And it's not isolated growth anymore. We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America. That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation... And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak. So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build. What's different now is the pace. Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: ✅ Arkansas ✅ Florida ✅ Idaho ✅ Indiana ✅ Montana ✅ Nebraska ✅ Oklahoma ✅ South Carolina ✅ Texas ✅ Tennessee That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action. That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly. It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up. Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through. And right now, that's where we're stretched. We're not lacking interest or momentum. We're working to keep up with both. So here 's how you can help... Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it. An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: ✅ Constitutions. ✅ Chapter guides. ✅ Flags. ✅ Materials to organize and lead. It turns a student who wants to speak up... into one who actually does. And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here." Every activism kit you help sponsor means one more student is ready to lead instead of sitting on the sidelines. That's how we keep saying "yes" when the next student steps forward. That's how this movement actually scales. Because the reality is, the demand is here now. The only question is whether we're equipped to meet it. And that comes down to whether people like you decide to step in and help carry this forward. One final thing: I also wanted to say thank you. If you've supported Turning Point USA before -- whether once or many times -- you've already played a role in building what you're seeing right now. Students finding their voice. More state partnerships. New TPUSA chapters like the one at Charlie's former high school. This kind of momentum doesn't happen without people willing to stand behind it. And we don't take that lightly. I appreciate you taking the time to read this, and for everything you've already done to support this work. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. Friend, what you're seeing right now is something we've been working toward for years -- a generation of young Americans who are no longer willing to sit quietly while the Left dominates their schools and culture. But moments like this don't sustain themselves. If we don't keep up, we lose ground. It's that simple. We need to keep pace with the growth happening right now -- to fund more activism kits, support more chapters, and make sure no student is left standing alone after they decide to speak up. If you've already supported Turning Point USA in the past, thank you for carrying this movement forward every single day. If you haven't yet, I'm asking you to step in now. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Peter,

I faced one of the toughest Senate races in 2024. We were outraised, outspent, and up against the full force of the Left.

**They poured everything they had into Montana.**

But we still fought back. We won because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when it mattered most.

_**[Now, I need you to do it again.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=573fe91acd37482eae95291bba19046e&_e=sKeUy5nmQUta66OaxNGEYK-zI0o3ba6Y46O7lAWk-9eD5ekfAu5AkL_W0f1ZMos0L_UjBm5Mtq11ohK_DEsYMNXrYh8mm5_lB6ljpDj2sFxDZQJV88oGmLnh05HPZm91Sm0x-61-jNfS0MvcNN7oX5kJ2QQJQMNfaOAmpec0CAuIS_537H3bFCVW5SZouHZGCj9QSBMFY4wGLTzGoeqviHCdCVZkIBvliT7-s38AU4vT9pHn8L9DLahwhgBxbjBbaeXVu6W1M9iGeErX-uoGskum8Zyup_gYdsrAICmLxtiesbST40aOruCOnmYjVDfyjwhqJXy550xQcBMReQOXhJbpMAie8HRUdLE222xXyb2VmQq72H6j4iwRW9vbn4MRgJUSFTCRm22SzxjuYpKbTTAbpEETfAiPAnA6iArEa4td1ihGz7BspMUNBOm10_OrSk8klUhvvR3KPs6Z0m89SQbHxSG-q2ft9Cq0yY3Szj2Heei2RZHCLH87Cfg8aJxg-uZcLJXir0PGlTM9rWYyuSgtrUd24zarIR4jUffK26GaSfm27tG8a2qrr2G2nuV9HfvIAQjUFsB7XLjNO6vVTU1DOqRb5S-j-DSKvkHWd1LPo3uQ4vgHWI30QIuSKwvNTwFx5jvuRlqw0DHSPJjltI8u5lh69xphVDRVto-FWzyQVgOdqq4FOBWxz9pTXmJu)**_

Kurt doesn't have that luxury yet.

I've seen firsthand how critical these early days are.

If Kurt is going to build a winning campaign - one that can stand up to the millions that will come flooding into this race - he needs a strong show of grassroots support right now.

Not later or when it's easy. Right now, _when it counts_.

**[Will you step up today and become one of Kurt Alme's first supporters?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=573fe91acd37482eae95291bba19046e&_e=sKeUy5nmQUta66OaxNGEYK-zI0o3ba6Y46O7lAWk-9eD5ekfAu5AkL_W0f1ZMos0L_UjBm5Mtq11ohK_DEsYMNXrYh8mm5_lB6ljpDj2sFxDZQJV88oGmLnh05HPZm91Sm0x-61-jNfS0MvcNN7oX5kJ2QQJQMNfaOAmpec0CAuIS_537H3bFCVW5SZouHZGCj9QSBMFY4wGLTzGoeqviHCdCVZkIBvliT7-s38AU4tloJ99OVJ9Y3Xte3yYJtEns7fIxNvJ7iE5drx2JUbBQlXCa5BJMqRVw4qi1hboITAfOvttQRNkTo15Zq5FbeUVKkRcIcC1SYCOE_H16vz4TmfqRVEJOrXOWE2ZQMyz8Ni7MKH4aC80RreBe4ojd7pRn79ydTPbiWXG7ASJHL1lK4U81HZ5DB0Iy_BXlQhW2Ts-cvNuo2p5cbrJ61S8nib-IG1Ybns7FIB3a71I7xJWwgHQCLeAsDOIAgm2FoLkg9QBthRwi-ZY194gR1NTiFggj4aNnd1HGTpX-jpkHXcH9ZKH0MHZ4ks-aXvvGLa9JC2Cz4qxmSB2RiYvj4CVNMUjwDP6mOlbzXKmZxf7HHlvkoVIfEbYr5blQHil0Pvp0vu1nh5Gjcsc1ElfrjEnjmdhab23gIYmtAL04En_e5qu2iuPUhjqHxPWwwKQLOyV7xSBbi8frbo33_NMPzgHedWc)**

Your early contribution will help him build the foundation he needs to take on the Left, get his message out, and prove that Montana is not for sale.

We know what we're up against.

**[Let's get Kurt off to a strong start.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=573fe91acd37482eae95291bba19046e&_e=sKeUy5nmQUta66OaxNGEYK-zI0o3ba6Y46O7lAWk-9eD5ekfAu5AkL_W0f1ZMos0L_UjBm5Mtq11ohK_DEsYMNXrYh8mm5_lB6ljpDj2sFxDZQJV88oGmLnh05HPZm91Sm0x-61-jNfS0MvcNN7oX5kJ2QQJQMNfaOAmpec0CAuIS_537H3bFCVW5SZouHZGCj9QSBMFY4wGLTzGoeqviHCdCVZkIBvliT7-s38AU4ubxZM9ea41v2dLVF3NbTN2Oeh8rlfYd81cQiTjEI1e6fmt0nnEH1UtEUz_CkayXUVzYtWVHwrXVOsuUJnFGyB0sO83EGRgPLQQiqsTV0ctV7ACD8bRZqjElacreFJtC4CQGT5-lzV1uBvvRRy0HH8iDxKTEFbH_TtTo49Rt7JFDAYvFGEk8eipifYovz0miheCiK2ebNDlJrCP7aVuWy6D9yUzNCA_oJ68jlR-l6hwUsHECE2n1YR3j3scjppCn_O9MLAo-lKlcpFoqPtVqJCCyevNzwJaI5X9x3PrkirJjXTtr2SNhsfb7HqrnDZk3CdP7zpEHyntK4AEh-0KnP-O5skAanrSYeZP4KRH4Y-NuGq0uZntMC67jM4-io7GUAXXC7b5d84ZQg148M8As_PUiJ68ZfRcw0OGT8NYfEX--nRz_goqAwR9n4VsNujLmQhiiRL6m7_ntvhvBmKgntsf)**

clean_body: I know firsthand what the Left will throw at him. | Peter, I faced one of the toughest Senate races in 2024. We were outraised, outspent, and up against the full force of the Left. They poured everything they had into Montana. But we still fought back. We won because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when it mattered most. Kurt Alme is just entering this race, and that means he's starting from behind. The other side already has its network, its donors, and its attacks lined up. Kurt doesn't have that luxury yet. What he does have is a real Montana story, a record of service, and the kind of leadership we need in the Senate. I've seen firsthand how critical these early days are. If Kurt is going to build a winning campaign - one that can stand up to the millions that will come flooding into this race - he needs a strong show of grassroots support right now. Not later or when it's easy. Right now, when it counts. Your early contribution will help him build the foundation he needs to take on the Left, get his message out, and prove that Montana is not for sale. We know what we're up against. But I also know what's possible when people like you get involved early and refuse to back down. For Montana, Tim Sheehy FOLLOW KURT ALME ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Alme for Senate Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Utility RELIEF bill update
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)
Peter, good news: **We’re taking action to lower skyrocketing electric bills.**
Last week, Wes and Maryland legislative leaders announced the Utility RELIEF Act -- bipartisan legislation that will save Marylanders at least $150 on their energy bills each year.
The bill also holds utility companies accountable, modernizes our grid, and invests in clean energy sources, too. So costs will _keep_ coming down each year.
While the White House is focused on foreign wars, ballrooms, and the Masters, we in Maryland have spent these past weeks laser-focused on the single most important thing: **_making life more affordable for our people._**
Washington isn’t coming to save us. So we’re doing it ourselves. **[And we need your help to keep Wes in this fight. Can you chip in $10 to help us keep delivering for Maryland?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260419-1.5T4zyA&refcode=em-20260419-1&t=2&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260419-1.5T4zyA&amount=5&refcode=em-20260419-1&t=21&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)**
Thank you,
Wes Moore for Maryland

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260419-1&t=22&refcode2=1295_1086043_77VaKq&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)**
**[Volunteer »](https://support.wesmoore.com/a/volunteer?source=em-20260419-1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1295%2E1086043%2E77VaKq)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Making sure you saw my message about AIPAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260419-6153-footer&t=1001&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,

I wanted to be sure you saw my message about AIPAC.

Although they’re spending big and using shady tactics to try and stop
progressives from winning Democratic primaries, last week we got some good
news.

Analilia Mejia, a proud progressive and outspoken opponent of AIPAC and
the right-wing billionaires who fund them, won her special election in New
Jersey!

It’s proof that when we come together, our people-powered movement can
overcome billionaire money and build a government that puts working people
first.

But there are more primaries, more elections, and more fights coming up in
the next few months. I’m counting on this grassroots community to help me
support progressive candidates across the country.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&refcode=em20260419-6153&amount=3&t=1002&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]Can I count on you to pitch in $3 or anything you can
today to help me keep building our movement?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&amount=3&refcode=em20260419-6153&t=1021&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal

-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Subject: AIPAC is trying to hide their influence

Hi Peter,

AIPAC continues to spend millions of dollars in Democratic primaries to
take down progressive candidates. Just like they tried to do to me. Just
like they did to my sister.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&refcode=em20260419-6153&t=1022&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ][IMG]

They disguise their strong armed influence through PACs with generic names
and target progressive leaders who dare to actually do their jobs. AIPAC
is exploiting campaign finance loopholes while doing everything they can
do to drown out progressive voices.

That’s why it’s so critical our people-powered movement has the resources
necessary to fight back against these attacks. We don’t have to match them
dollar for dollar, but we do need the resources to respond, stay
competitive, and keep progressive campaigns on track so they can focus on
winning and standing up for their communities.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&refcode=em20260419-6153&amount=3&t=1023&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]If you want to help, will you pitch in $3 or any amount
today to help me fight back against AIPAC and the far-right billionaires
who want to take our movement down?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&amount=3&refcode=em20260419-6153&t=1024&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]Contribute $3

Even this year, we’ve already seen the kind of damage AIPAC can do. They
dumped $22 million into four primary races in Illinois, and won half of
them.

They then came at me directly:

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&refcode=em20260419-6153&t=1025&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ][IMG]

It’s clear that no progressive candidate is safe from their massive
warchest. That they are willing to weaponize their slush fund against our
democracy.

But listen — I've faced this before, and I’m not about to back down now.
I’ve been an AIPAC target for years. They spent millions trying to defeat
progressives like me, my sister, and others who refuse to be bought.

When that kind of money crashes into a race, it distorts the entire
election. It buries people-powered campaigns under an avalanche of attack
ads, and forces candidates to spend time defending themselves instead of
focusing on the issues that working people really care about.

We can’t stand by while AIPAC tries to dictate the
primaries,
Peter. The billionaire donors
fueling them are the same ones who bankrolled Trump’s return to office,
and they have no business deciding which candidates Democrats nominate in
our primaries.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&refcode=em20260419-6153&amount=3&t=1026&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $3 or whatever
you can today to help me fight back and send a message to AIPAC loud and
clear: Our democracy is not for sale.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260419.Pp8wvG&amount=3&refcode=em20260419-6153&t=1045&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS ]Contribute $3

Together, we can make sure the people — not right-wing billionaires — have
the power to pick our leadership.

In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260419-6153-footer&t=1046&refcode2=6153_420207_IpiIwS&akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6153%2E420207%2EIpiIwS

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: DNC Research Report
subject: What we learned from YOU:
body:
---
We asked, and you answered, Derek. Our team closely monitors the responses we receive through our emails, website, and surveys. Last month we asked for your input on the DNC’s strategic focus areas as we scale up our work ahead of November. Today, we wanted to share some of your most common responses: You said we should focus on:
1. Continuing to register new Democratic voters.
2. Using social media and online platforms to spread our message to younger audiences.
3. Continuing to fight Donald Trump in court.

**We’re already acting on that feedback.** Through our When We Count program, we’re registering more than 250,000 new Democratic voters in key battleground states. We have a network of 500 creators where daily messaging and clips are sent to a combined audience of more than 75 million followers. And we’re holding Trump accountable in court. We just filed a new lawsuit to stop Trump from illegally restricting vote-by-mail, and our legal team is using every tool at their disposal to defend Americans’ voting rights. [**Whether you’re concerned about the midterms, voting rights, or how Democrats can reach more people, we’re all in this fight together. We’re building something rooted in community, and you’re an instrumental part of this work. Rush a $7 contribution to the DNC today and help us continue to build, organize, and fight back _together →_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260419_6771_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6771_22930333_NzJqBQ&akid=6771%2E22930333%2ENzJqBQ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260419_6771_fr&refcode2=6771_22930333_NzJqBQ&akid=6771%2E22930333%2ENzJqBQ)**

The Democrats

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: Public health is a joke to RFK, Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260418em-stem-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260418em-stem-rs]
I had to read this twice to believe it.
Donald Trump’s Health and Human Services Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., admitted publicly that he “is not afraid of a germ” because he used to “snort cocaine off of toilet seats.”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260419em-rfk-new [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260419em-rfk-new]
Let that sink in. This is the person currently in charge of our nation’s public health system.
But this isn’t just about someone’s past. This is about judgment, responsibility, and fitness to lead.
Because right now, RFK Jr. isn’t just telling stories on a podcast — he’s also:
❌ Undermining vaccines
❌ Sidelining scientists
❌ Rewriting public health policy based on ideology instead of evidence
As a microbiologist and public health professional, I can tell you: Germs matter. Science matters. Facts matter. And the person leading our country’s health policy should understand that, not joke about it.
Chip in now to send a scientist to Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260419em-rfk-new]
We are living through a moment where the stakes couldn’t be higher. We’ve already seen the consequences of RFK’s leadership, including a weakened public health system, rising misinformation, and outbreaks that should have never happened.
This is not normal. And it is exactly why I’m running for Congress — because we cannot afford leadership that treats public health like a punchline.
If you agree that we need serious, science-driven leadership, not chaos and recklessness, I’m asking you to step up right now. We need a surge of grassroots support to show that we’re ready to take on this fight. Can you chip in $10, $25, or anything you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260419em-rfk-new]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260419em-rfk-new]
When we let science lead, people thrive. Let’s put facts back in charge — and build a Congress that reflects reason, reality, and hope.
Thank you,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

body:
This is the most corrupt administration in history
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779047/615511502/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThkOWNhNy0yMTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDSTT4yw594RJNYzFSJMFV-wXL9dzQVUe3MJNOrjaFY=)
There’s truly no low that Pete Hegseth won’t sink to.
**Just weeks before the bombing of Iran began, he tried to invest millions in defense companies — _so that he could get rich at the very same time that American troops were being put in harm’s way._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779048/615511503/789508428?refcode=260419_RG_hegseth-disgrace&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThkOWNhNy0yMTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDSTT4yw594RJNYzFSJMFV-wXL9dzQVUe3MJNOrjaFY=)
I’m the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, and I can tell you this clearly:
**We are launching an investigation into what appears to be one of the most dangerous corruption scandals we’ve ever seen — because no one, no matter how powerful, should be allowed to profit off war.**
But here’s the truth: Holding this administration accountable isn’t easy. They have the power, the money, and the willingness to stonewall.
_What we have is you._
**[That’s why I’m asking you personally to rush in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us keep up the fight for accountability and transparency. This is the most corrupt administration in history, and I can’t do this without you.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779049/615511504/-309737922?refcode=260419_RG_hegseth-disgrace&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThkOWNhNy0yMTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDSTT4yw594RJNYzFSJMFV-wXL9dzQVUe3MJNOrjaFY=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779050/615511505/-309737922?refcode=260419_RG_hegseth-disgrace&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThkOWNhNy0yMTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDSTT4yw594RJNYzFSJMFV-wXL9dzQVUe3MJNOrjaFY=)
We need subpoenas. We need investigators. We need to follow the money — wherever it leads.
I’m not backing down from this fight — but I need you with me.
**[Chip in now to help us hold them accountable and keep the pressure on.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779051/615511506/-309737922?refcode=260419_RG_hegseth-disgrace&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThkOWNhNy0yMTNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDSTT4yw594RJNYzFSJMFV-wXL9dzQVUe3MJNOrjaFY=)**

Robert Garcia

_How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard._

Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. Hello,
**My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.**
I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council.
But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again.
**I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.**
Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. We can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.
Our campaign has set a goal to raise another $20,000 before our deadline at midnight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:**

Friend, Rep. Valadao can’t be trusted to be our representative.

**But instead, he’s been in lockstep with Donald Trump — _even if it means breaking the very promises he ran on._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129779840/615514762/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260419_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzk2NjY2NjUtMjIzYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jg1JDYbzYkbpYn5ps2JwNUuK5dwbloVPi1WkdU4jbzA=) Time and time again, he has _refused_ to stand up to Trump and House Republicans’ extremist agenda.

During Trump’s first term, he appointed several conservative Supreme Court Justices – Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett – aiming to skew American law in his favor for decades.

We’re already seeing the devastating consequences of these appointments:

– Overturning long-standing precedents like Roe v. Wade
– The use of emergency orders to benefit the Trump administration
– Currently being on the verge of dismantling the Voting Rights Act

Reports revealed conservative Justice accepting undisclosed luxury trips, private jet flights, and gifts from GOP donors as well as refusals to recuse themselves from cases where there are clear conflicts of interest.

We need to know where the American people stand, that’s why we’re reaching out to top Democratic supporters from every state and we need your input.

**Please, will you take our quick poll now? It should only take about a minute, and it makes a huge difference in the fight to defend democracy.**

name: Christian Urrutia
subject: "Being hung in public is better than you deserve."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Below is the death threat I just received, sent by the Libertarian Party of New Hampshire to me and then amplified to their account of 100,000 followers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
It’s clear what they want to do — incite someone to hurt me or my family.
I’m Christian Urrutia, the Democrat running for Congress in NH-01, America's most vulnerable open blue seat. I'm an economic populist and a first-generation Mexican-American son of immigrants. An Army officer. And someone who still believes in this country enough to fight for it.
To the far-right someone like me attaining elected office is an existential threat.
These type of extremists showed up to an event I spoke at waving Nazi flags trying to stop me from speaking (I gave my speech anyways). They send me messages telling me that my life may “abruptly come to an end.” They send me pictures of nooses.
Because they hate me, they hate us, and they hate our vision.
This isn’t just about me. It’s about whether we let hate and political violence take root here in America. Or whether we stand up and say no. You know where I stand. But I can’t do this alone.
If you can, please make a donation to help us beef up security for my staff and I so we can continue rolling with the punches. Whether it's $50, $20, or even just $10 it will have an outsized impact. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
DONATE TODAY!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
Thank you in advance for your support at this inflection point for our campaign.
Christian Urrutia
Democrat for NH-01
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: I debated sending this... until now
body:
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2a9aad8bd53045529c2b699d667fd84c&_e=u_-8JfNRvC-ErLmj2NiTj1hCG_QZkwGvPxqEtG6KekjVHLT1pnuZx8H8W35vRLrMUhCia7eNylEY6SMxP0pDO3v0KfFeP450Krpln_1b5SMLNs3RNXuAfm467rB3pl8hmJ3KzbkXZSFchzDexKo3h8ZViPqrCti4BWACRfaUA_XB7YLfhcTKkIcO0TAPT6_sWVHdqCgDhC3IWepfRLm8Q7AVgtvuVwC4gBYNNN2FwkRxkaQGB8t0eqkmqYuIa5RUcmeSzOCTvvzMyt2b4P3mJ72n0TsxFInTX_TAa0Es4QgLByXrU_HOlcjFzzc6GYkOuphJ_xEEW9pDQBqgLnk9K3R-p8FQx0eR0PRgJuHKmJGQnX2RCLQzAOtabDyM75yVGw7-RBRoUK1l96cjf_1JCX2tv5dmXxqZUczZ2alAqtL5vq-vPTXHp7eOh41ACo2sSStOJy1TMDUiMaVKlD6Pa5pqOadh8Eeuc4-NyBBzA2o93zJFyJBu43Xe9s26w6GQKaO1u5vwC7BkjkJE0jYfkjFkeHCAGzmlLwqIEkROiSpXeyDMH9y0LPKfCfn97EEs8sqkBvpqrZdUWRG0qy5X-fukB3_wAtXcUcIx3EeHBjKQ6t0vCcwgv9RJlycL1v6B0FkRgaGJwOYyT_BQAlRQczU5_sDNyhPpbjdm-rYMGUTc6arE-pyfHNtxPnHfiQlqUMOw9Wx2ZUGdaKa0bXweZg%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2a9aad8bd53045529c2b699d667fd84c&_e=u_-8JfNRvC-ErLmj2NiTj1hCG_QZkwGvPxqEtG6KekjVHLT1pnuZx8H8W35vRLrMUhCia7eNylEY6SMxP0pDO3v0KfFeP450Krpln_1b5SMLNs3RNXuAfm467rB3pl8hmJ3KzbkXZSFchzDexKo3h8ZViPqrCti4BWACRfaUA_XB7YLfhcTKkIcO0TAPT6_sWVHdqCgDhC3IWepfRLm8Q7AVgtvuVwC4gBYNNN2FwkRxkaQGB8t0eqkmqYuIa5RUfTaG1hjYVp2Pao5eIdCs29gys3CUZFsIdWJQty-TWhLMifs5pHWpKA1QvG4OMeaqTt6zL_Cltdw5zE_QEcy2_jwBNvEXcYxu0IP7pvi5UJJZfjYNfL519RhYFUFkav85NDT6GeFEUkyMrEoGcXpVk3t5lcjbIcieBIBOUBpaB8S7nDGpwqKzWX4su_XPLj0sEyu_oMs5BscFiaJxW1gVXEaQ0KmYYMu790OHqFL8tou0e-6Gn9-42YvAZCaiHHFH_KcoxpGYDCKR0eWg9KLecFf5k2wCDsmtrbT0TMGWLR9RWQpAuNSQ2ZJO3xag7vMaKw94a0ESyCV8MlXvSAfF5xtUHliPz9TUGRrjV4bUZNOdEdTVNoesq_UG8DPWDSrpFQpIrtSj4TmRyx8hxF-SmUvmGmqPeEOZVJLHXqOsuPrZFiHUp_lKq7USqf10GYbGdxVoSrSI3qCUPKliwGDxEA%3D%3D)
---
**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2a9aad8bd53045529c2b699d667fd84c&_e=u_-8JfNRvC-ErLmj2NiTj1hCG_QZkwGvPxqEtG6KekjVHLT1pnuZx8H8W35vRLrMUhCia7eNylEY6SMxP0pDO3v0KfFeP450Krpln_1b5SMLNs3RNXuAfm467rB3pl8hmJ3KzbkXZSFchzDexKo3h8ZViPqrCti4BWACRfaUA_XB7YLfhcTKkIcO0TAPT6_sWVHdqCgDhC3IWepfRLm8Q7AVgtvuVwC4gBYNNN2FwkRxkaQGB8t0eqkmqYuIa5RUOtzKqYBe1Qa6AK2gaHhzQCTXiUZr3FldzlqsnkyIa8r_-0SONkEiZiFiOucdBIyh9o4bVR8HGSGgagBzvm7iA_gYbipFjr_nucN1D9sWe4pGGckMIxZs-JscY7umMxkxMqhE56sRmUz_J8R6vlAsGXFjuOeObMqVD8wrhrmJevHIHfOLzric4LcHUgz-Zp29DkQKDV3tOyMnhEu6FAb0pEr1fDl8JrjxxHSHFx7Ltw9U-uiozY6nRtKCjUgaVRx9uP_xBMfInb2U8nmyCxsd_ipF8h8iQgPLpgBIPUxz-cokGPYjteGQ9SAxLDxos3XZC1qmAQuB4N0LRWEmmW1a_8lEyxbdu1QYS5t2YDu79okuuqE0SOQAhf9tjNP2dQKIZtv3t5CKJPT2E8f1eOcc0chv9ifHkFyEYET9fE7dL89lijSdJjc5soNd25H96s6M7KrLO_Nxar0rNRgJoOi1ng%3D%3D)
---
And every time one of those students raises their hand...

We have a choice.

Back them. _Or leave them on their own. _

**Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. **

Everything they need to actually stand their ground.

Not symbolically. For real.

They've already made the decision to lead.

All they're waiting on... is you and me.

**Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. **

$25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school.

$25 to put real tools in their hands.

$25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time.

**[And Patriot, I’m asking you to send backup to these brave students on the frontlines with your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2a9aad8bd53045529c2b699d667fd84c&_e=u_-8JfNRvC-ErLmj2NiTj1hCG_QZkwGvPxqEtG6KekjVHLT1pnuZx8H8W35vRLrMUhCia7eNylEY6SMxP0pDO3v0KfFeP450Krpln_1b5SMLNs3RNXuAfm467rB3pl8hmJ3KzbkXZSFchzDexKo3h8ZViPqrCti4BWACRfaUA_XB7YLfhcTKkIcO0TAPT6_sWVHdqCgDhC3IWepfRLm8Q7AVgtvuVwC4gBYNNN2FwkRxkaQGB8t0eqkmqYuIa5RUv52vz3Y19n8jfkrXMwUZ2Uhb8dghRXhwQfMZhCgKLR9_O57F-se6-vsN5g6ZBs4F-A6gZZ9ZunTULgufwS7zCMyayjvL928dYrCX2I_UYKou4dG9ThOeQv9bFbAX_pj5rLRPXbjepyorCEMxhFf9RFbFKikw6D4T--OgkhgvLpO05bQU0f5zo6swiqPtnaE6wG1S4mHvH5jICJ2OOCUfAt7LvTiLFYFcidbhca8416DwsQbAm5sDaYoI-X2CsJbABNVOlMfOePnzJEo14glI3oKSVeNGiEblgz1g9m0g_O5lOzF7nsJ1Ba_70ag76nIzEUcMsfmUKiux4DvFDkvQ8Erw9ramKPQh198vAjG15RYtpoijP9srHqZi5pf4vdOmLvt-NtEpN8QeyHmqDhpVv8BJiScCR9l_QGTksKEYPKL1rKwy18Ew8Oi4DIxFWQiiDmKfR5eBjdMCkpB5Z2Akog%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, I'm going to be blunt with you. We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit. Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way." Right now. And the scariest part? It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms. High schools. Colleges. Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped. If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: " What happened to this country?" You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly. Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything... The other side is doing something far more dangerous. They're raising the next generation. Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places. That's how countries are lost. Slowly. Then all at once. But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope... There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged. And it shouldn 't even exist. Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That alone felt like a miracle. Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have. Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down. And yet... They stepped up anyway. About that time, Charlie called me. He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent. "Andrew, we've got to move faster." I told him we were. He stopped me. "No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I actually laughed. "Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said. "How many are there?" "About 27,000." And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000." I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet. But Charlie wasn't fazed. " We'll figure it out." That was him. He didn't wait for perfect conditions. Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... we lose everything. And now? Less than a year later... We 're in 3,300 schools. Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. That shouldn 't be possible. Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day. And yet... it's still happening. But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: This is not a victory. It's a foothold. Because in the other 87% of schools? There is no resistance. None. Just one-sided propaganda from the Left. One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them. That's the reality. The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are. The question is whether it's enough. Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America... They're not the majority. They 're the exception. They're the ones willing to take the heat. The ones willing to stand alone. The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: " I love this country." And every time one of those students raises their hand... We have a choice. Back them. Or leave them on their own. Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. Everything they need to actually stand their ground. Not symbolically. For real. They've already made the decision to lead. All they're waiting on... is you and me. Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. $25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school. $25 to put real tools in their hands. $25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time. But here's what gives me hope, Patriot... Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating. Because every day, more students are stepping forward. Not because it's easy or popular... But because they know what 's at stake. They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to. They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged. They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform. And they're not alone. They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day. * * *
* * *
## **Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/4717e95d-6823-4212-8b84-47e376fe9c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/4717e95d-6823-4212-8b84-47e376fe9c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Over the next ten years, innovations in Artificial Intelligence are expected to catalyze GDP growth, potentially adding 15% to global economic output by 2035, according to a 2025 PwC report. This campaign equates to roughly adding 1% to annual GDP growth rates, an optimistic forecast for sure, that is comparable to the economic impact of the Industrial Revolution of the nineteenth century. In many ways, the economy of 2020s America parallels that other great age in our nation's history of growth and innovation. Led by trillion-dollar technology behemoths like Nvidia, Alphabet, and Meta, the groundswell of AI innovation is poised to have widespread repercussions throughout society, like the effects of Standard Oil and Carnegie Steel, affecting everything from healthcare to robotics to transportation along the way.
AI's impact has been fueled by favorable policies in the second Trump administration that has accelerated its society-wide adoption. Yet its social impact, though already sweeping, is still just in the nascent stages. The MAG7 - or magic seven stock companies, consisting of the three aforementioned companies, plus Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, and Tesla - capture one-third of the entire S&P 500's total market value. Their share of the market is at an all-time high, up from about 9.8% in 2015.
* * *
* * *
**Together with[Kalshi](https://substack.com/redirect/cab188a9-57d5-4cfc-a3da-df90cc4f9c7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cab188a9-57d5-4cfc-a3da-df90cc4f9c7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Must Be 21+. Gambling problem call 1-800-GAMBLER or 1-800-MY-RESET**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/cab188a9-57d5-4cfc-a3da-df90cc4f9c7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
The accelerated growth of these companies demonstrates just how much potential AI has in reshaping the overall economy, and how much of an impact it has already had, even in its still-early stages. Investors stand to gain significantly, even indirectly, from the upsurge. Anyone now invested in a broad-market index fund, like Vanguard's S&P 500 index, will enjoy the fruits of AI's enormous impact in the years to come, so long as these investors remain in the market and consistently invest in the years to come. Thus, even without an AI company in tow, even retail investors have opportunities to experience the net benefits of AI's deeper impact on economic growth in the United States.
The impact though being felt at the investment stage, is just getting started. AI is contributing to GDP now, though today's contributions based on many forecast models pale to what is to come. Most of the AI-driven growth so far has been through massive capital expenditures, through investments in data centers, electrical and power systems, cooling systems, and chips: the building blocks of the infrastructure that will power the economy long into the future. Thus, the direct effects of AI on economy-wide output are not really being felt yet. It will take time for AI to permeate the economy at large. Over the next five years, as AI gets integrated into more systems, its direct effects on GDP will compound.
At some point likely in the early 2030s, technological breakthroughs will be evident in industries as diverse as healthcare, with the potential for revolutionary drug and medical innovations, to transportation, with the looming prospect of autonomous vehicles. It will be at this point where the real impacts on the economy by AI will be felt. Though AI will have some negative effects - those will be dramatically outweighed by the positive. For example, potential job losses due to automation will be more than offset by job creation in emerging markets, from the need to hire specialists in AI and machine learning, to new opportunities for application and software developers, to new regulatory oversight roles that will be required to navigate the ethical guardrails of this new technology. Beyond just that, AI relies upon infrastructure - including physical infrastructure in the form of data centers and power plants - that will have to be built, maintained, and managed - creating potentially millions of new jobs along the way.
* * *
* * *
### **Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/4717e95d-6823-4212-8b84-47e376fe9c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/4717e95d-6823-4212-8b84-47e376fe9c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
The skilled professions will be safe - and indeed largely enhanced by the use of AI. No longer will high-skilled laborers, a rapidly growing sector of the overall job market with an influx of professional degrees in the market, be forced to handle menial tasks. The low-hanging fruit type roles found across every industry, which requires repetitive or structured tasks, will be increasingly automated - allowing brain power to be better allocated towards creative and mentally stimulating tasks. In this vein, AI will not destroy jobs but augment the dignity of work by automating tasks that otherwise do not require a significant amount of mental stamina and shifting the focus to higher responsibilities that tap into the full talents of individuals with a professional degree in particular. This will allow such people to spend less time on mind-numbing tasks, and more time flexing their creative muscles - which will mitigate boredom, enhance creativity, and engender more fulfilling vocations overall. The future, AI-enhanced workforce significantly reduces time wasted on machine-like tasks and instead reroutes that mental energy towards higher functions. The net result of this will not only dramatically increase job satisfaction but will allow professionals to better use their time working towards innovative solutions and solving problems, which should have an overall benefit on economic productivity at a macro level.
On a government level, AI integration into existing systems will help eliminate information silos, increase efficiencies, and reduce unnecessary labor spent on tasks that could otherwise be done by a computer, saving potentially millions of dollars along the way for taxpayers. The future is at our doorstep: AI is set to revolutionize the American economy. We are on the precipice of what is primed to be a seismic transformation in society and human life, with the hope that it will enhance, rather than quell, human dignity in the workplace - while opening doors for tremendous opportunities in growth and innovation - from life-extending drugs to robotic window cleaners - which were thought mere fantasy or science fiction up until recently, but could soon be part of everyday life in another five or ten years.
* * *

Investors stand to gain significantly, even indirectly, from the upsurge. | | | Apr 19| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism. Over the next ten years, innovations in Artificial Intelligence are expected to catalyze GDP growth, potentially adding 15% to global economic output by 2035, according to a 2025 PwC report. This campaign equates to roughly adding 1% to annual GDP growth rates, an optimistic forecast for sure, that is comparable to the economic impact of the Industrial Revolution of the nineteenth century. In many ways, the economy of 2020s America parallels that other great age in our nation's history of growth and innovation. Led by trillion-dollar technology behemoths like Nvidia, Alphabet, and Meta, the groundswell of AI innovation is poised to have widespread repercussions throughout society, like the effects of Standard Oil and Carnegie Steel, affecting everything from healthcare to robotics to transportation along the way. AI's impact has been fueled by favorable policies in the second Trump administration that has accelerated its society-wide adoption. Yet its social impact, though already sweeping, is still just in the nascent stages. The MAG7 - or magic seven stock companies, consisting of the three aforementioned companies, plus Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, and Tesla - capture one-third of the entire S&P 500's total market value. Their share of the market is at an all-time high, up from about 9.8% in 2015. Together with | | ---|---|--- Must Be 21+. Gambling problem call 1-800-GAMBLER or 1-800-MY-RESET The accelerated growth of these companies demonstrates just how much potential AI has in reshaping the overall economy, and how much of an impact it has already had, even in its still-early stages. Investors stand to gain significantly, even indirectly, from the upsurge. Anyone now invested in a broad-market index fund, like Vanguard's S&P 500 index, will enjoy the fruits of AI's enormous impact in the years to come, so long as these investors remain in the market and consistently invest in the years to come. Thus, even without an AI company in tow, even retail investors have opportunities to experience the net benefits of AI's deeper impact on economic growth in the United States. The impact though being felt at the investment stage, is just getting started. AI is contributing to GDP now, though today's contributions based on many forecast models pale to what is to come. Most of the AI-driven growth so far has been through massive capital expenditures, through investments in data centers, electrical and power systems, cooling systems, and chips: the building blocks of the infrastructure that will power the economy long into the future. Thus, the direct effects of AI on economy-wide output are not really being felt yet. It will take time for AI to permeate the economy at large. Over the next five years, as AI gets integrated into more systems, its direct effects on GDP will compound. At some point likely in the early 2030s, technological breakthroughs will be evident in industries as diverse as healthcare, with the potential for revolutionary drug and medical innovations, to transportation, with the looming prospect of autonomous vehicles. It will be at this point where the real impacts on the economy by AI will be felt. Though AI will have some negative effects - those will be dramatically outweighed by the positive. For example, potential job losses due to automation will be more than offset by job creation in emerging markets, from the need to hire specialists in AI and machine learning, to new opportunities for application and software developers, to new regulatory oversight roles that will be required to navigate the ethical guardrails of this new technology. Beyond just that, AI relies upon infrastructure - including physical infrastructure in the form of data centers and power plants - that will have to be built, maintained, and managed - creating potentially millions of new jobs along the way. Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism. The skilled professions will be safe - and indeed largely enhanced by the use of AI. No longer will high-skilled laborers, a rapidly growing sector of the overall job market with an influx of professional degrees in the market, be forced to handle menial tasks. This will allow such people to spend less time on mind-numbing tasks, and more time flexing their creative muscles - which will mitigate boredom, enhance creativity, and engender more fulfilling vocations overall. On a government level, AI integration into existing systems will help eliminate information silos, increase efficiencies, and reduce unnecessary labor spent on tasks that could otherwise be done by a computer, saving potentially millions of dollars along the way for taxpayers. The future is at our doorstep: AI is set to revolutionize the American economy.
