name: Mark Kelly
subject: This wasn’t the plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
Derek, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life.
But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be threatened with a court-martial by the Secretary of Defense, or to have the President of the United States calling for my execution.
Look, I don’t want you to worry about me. I’ve been through a lot in my life, and things like this don’t intimidate me all that much.
I do worry that Trump might succeed at intimidating others, though. Like people just beginning to get involved, or thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a town hall. I worry Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him.
But then I see millions of people meeting this moment with the courage and resolve it demands of them. People like my friend Adam Schiff. It makes me hopeful, sure. But more than that, it makes me incredibly proud.
We’re ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:
[**Split a donation between me and Adam Schiff. $10 or anything you can afford.**_](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6436?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TAN_AC90_20260419_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=3&akid=9737%2E5257348%2EINCQbM)

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Every tool we have.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Every means necessary.

| |
---
Team, Donald Trump has been a criminal his entire life. That's not new. What's new is that he's now using the United States military to carry out crimes in the name of this country. Our country. And I will not be complicit in that. I joined the Marines to fight people like this and to defend the Constitution against enemies foreign and domestic. I didn't serve four tours, so a draft-dodging president could order American troops to do his dirty work while Congress sits on its hands. We are a nation of laws. Trump is creating two Americas: one that abides by the rules, and one that doesn’t feel they have to. That is not who we are. Before he does more damage and before more people die, we need to use every tool at our disposal to make sure this doesn’t become permanent. Impeachment, the 25th Amendment, and every legal means necessary. Recently, my daughter told me that her daddy helps the world by stopping bad people. She's right. That is my job. And right now, stopping the bad people means stopping the Commander-in-Chief of the United States. **[Sign my petition calling on Congress to begin impeachment proceedings immediately:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129780338/615516435/1634781553?refcode=260419_sm_impeach2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5NDc1Zi0yNDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhrO6WEeKQiTUH_pV0OySBV1xCln5_WqBdhU4-Oysr0=&emci=4c595003-623a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9a09475f-243c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=194769)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129780339/615516436/1634781553?refcode=260419_sm_impeach2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5NDc1Zi0yNDNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhrO6WEeKQiTUH_pV0OySBV1xCln5_WqBdhU4-Oysr0=&emci=4c595003-623a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9a09475f-243c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=194769)

clean_body: Every means necessary. | | Team, Donald Trump has been a criminal his entire life. That's not new. What's new is that he's now using the United States military to carry out crimes in the name of this country. Our country. And I will not be complicit in that. I joined the Marines to fight people like this and to defend the Constitution against enemies foreign and domestic. I didn't serve four tours, so a draft-dodging president could order American troops to do his dirty work while Congress sits on its hands. We are a nation of laws. Trump is creating two Americas: one that abides by the rules, and one that doesn’t feel they have to. That is not who we are. Before he does more damage and before more people die, we need to use every tool at our disposal to make sure this doesn’t become permanent. Impeachment, the 25th Amendment, and every legal means necessary. Recently, my daughter told me that her daddy helps the world by stopping bad people. She's right. That is my job. And right now, stopping the bad people means stopping the Commander-in-Chief of the United States. | This can't wait. — Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a Marine and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. Peter,

I’m reaching out to you today for the very first time to ask for your personal endorsement as I run for the Republican nomination for the United States Senate in Minnesota.

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran who answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to defend the freedoms and way of life we hold dear. As a SEAL, I learned to thrive in the toughest environments — and that same grit and determination is exactly what I’m bringing to this race.

Unlike my progressive, far-left Democrat opponents, I’m not cosplaying as a Somali Muslim to win over the votes of a leftist base who want nothing more out of the midterms than impeaching Donald Trump.

_[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aedb6915c7924de0bcd01e6f7993adf6&_e=Ymi9R963JQVqDcV6Bt2bn9vlcE36rZSLcxW9yJP1UyTM1A8b0AuiZJU8jqihsymx-qcySElDmY3Lo_3rJnz-DjzyAMHx6DnOmF9FvYsGnEtvKthKCtVl6wbOv3WUsKFv_dOgmjAi1A6BGLLJMvKBZ2vw5yliFRQd2cgTFJ9qCtHyimY3dO6z5kktq7K9mteel9ZMO0C_LWVTDwmxGmpxIeDV65pB4acan30B81OeD8txbOIynSTHGFqYjF-dk3g4yHIeJdhl0exl_FtdUleEJkGsvNm_S6hEzqB1LF180c2ZS-Dn9qzonk51kThZFgAB3iLc6Bp-3B4fbv4_JcMb5M1fDy0VZTLdG4Pxom4MY6R0UpPpq7rDYEukSy-8PUcyrV1eE6dNHLopn3XTYwkCBw49x6jOaObsj0a1RWkpAwE1Y3qBrwfzbM_EEX2JjhL-fU1m2bG-5R4MCJA00CnvHg0ngVhAS09coKp0dhaU6xeVmwGds1kfCBHE5fdvHFobPWpfANs5W4LBYGbQSFqGCS17pjjMf01vWtqgKWfcr-A5VjJ_GIjOIaQIQonaqWuoLA2n7XgjQ4NKYRdigJj4Ws6rHmVkHwqvM8R2PHxRfsAabo_dBjgwRkF10sa4w4RnP7mLZi1TievkNN7ecW0ySIVIts9XdrE62B5KHHojYdHpxeuV3XqVqwKiJklcfXjRYpNbXtXqXJt4YOGjlnLDUJ0SLCjiqBlfmzLPGgCncqdM0Yck85F0OJwt1fobMR15)_
My team and I have been driving from county to county to introduce my campaign to folks who may have never heard of me. We’re doing the hard work now - long days, tons of events - so we can meet as many potential voters as possible.

**I’m especially proud that in recent months I have won nearly all of the straw polls conducted by local Republican organizations across Minnesota.** These early victories show that conservatives are ready for a battle-tested leader who will take the fight to Washington and deliver real results for our state.

We are on track to win the endorsement of the delegates to the Minnesota Republican Party in May but we need to expand our support now to win in November. We’ve set an ambitious goal of securing **20,000 more conservative endorsements** to demonstrate the size and strength of this grassroots movement heading into my August primary. If you can spare just a few moments right now to add your name to my official endorsement list, **[I would be most grateful.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aedb6915c7924de0bcd01e6f7993adf6&_e=Ymi9R963JQVqDcV6Bt2bn9vlcE36rZSLcxW9yJP1UyTM1A8b0AuiZJU8jqihsymx-qcySElDmY3Lo_3rJnz-DjzyAMHx6DnOmF9FvYsGnEtvKthKCtVl6wbOv3WUsKFv_dOgmjAi1A6BGLLJMvKBZ2vw5yliFRQd2cgTFJ9qCtHyimY3dO6z5kktq7K9mteel9ZMO0C_LWVTDwmxGmpxIeDV65pB4acan30B81OeD8txbOIynSTHGFqYjF-dk3g4yHIeJdhl0exl_FtdUleEJqj_xBxYTnRudb6sMujMhv9RoAAh2zNWt9D-mmsMZHpkdgsdQavPg99XDAT8Y0HnQ5qaJOnF3SBsMTL1JSYjcg4Z4g-X4EgQIbW8nBOVzd4PEkdLRgCtMnZVtNamHHiqx_Wv0WJVNW8IhFgoTDiwlQr_ho3XmAmH-bhFcdlDXU6uJ1trkvYKtSttlUfSh3P41CJEBvFvmgrbpS-I-AEwlKs6DwW2Cd6a7SJhn2B_mrmkPArj9vXQqd8Sjk_zhE3pmBQh1MymK5zjuce_cHoEdoE5pybpOg-ps1beaQRtIat0XO_yaI5sktfY7LdUFrmSDNWxNEFZZNKGOuUNKSUebDleF0CsvhmhwgACgpo-BYbuvVRdBOiQadlf06YfRIf_7s_GFkXjw46BJ2aYw1pxNnVmnsed8sAgNEKb473SUPuWcgkhbmm0wKHdwOdzgYoR_49wmlS-xOm47JqFUtbedy1Tr38HC4P1wsTEPXjMTlxQ)**

I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey in Minnesota and has never backed down when our nation needed me.

In the Senate, I will fight for President Trump’s America First agenda: requiring photo identification to vote in every state, returning to bold budget cutting to save taxpayer dollars, going after corrupt politicians, and restoring law and order. Minnesota deserves a Senator with real courage and proven leadership — not another career politician.

name: Tobias Read
subject: The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs]
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
It's unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Let me be clear: I did not and will never hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies want to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.
Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 to demonstrate our response to this abuse of power.
Can you help ensure my campaign is ready for this fight and send a donation now to defend Oregon and have my back? I will continue communicating directly about protecting our elections, and that takes resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260419em-sued-rs]
Trump’s DOJ lost this last round and we await their next step. But we know they won’t stop meddling in our elections.
Thank you,
Tobias Read

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Ken Paxton is trying to shut us down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240801%2E444211%2E7CMoin)
Last fall, Ken Paxton launched a baseless investigation into Powered by People and even threatened to jail me.
His lawsuit was never really about the law. It was about trying to scare us out of organizing, out of speaking up, out of doing the work it takes to build power in Texas.
We’re now back in court making sure that we present the facts and stand up for freedom of speech in Texas. Paxton, on the other hand, is getting called out by judges for what they’ve described as “unprofessional conduct.” I’m grateful for the progress we’ve made, but have to acknowledget the real cost to standing up to his abuse of power.
**We’ve now spent more than $500,000 in legal fees fighting Paxton’s frivolous lawsuits.**
Every dollar, every hour, every resource we’re forced to spend fighting him in court is a dollar, an hour, a resource we can’t put into the work that actually gets people registered and turned out to vote.
That’s the point of Paxton's attacks. To drain us, slow us down, and make the relational organizing work we do that much harder.
This week we exhausted the initial retainer we set aside to defend ourselves. If we’re going to beat him in court and keep organizing across Texas, we need your help.
[**If you’re able, chip in $3 today to help us keep fighting back against Ken Paxton and continue the work it will take to win in Texas this November.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260419.wyL-wF&refcode=ema20260419-240801&t=3&akid=240801%2E444211%2E7CMoin)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260419.wyL-wF&refcode=ema20260419-240801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240801%2E444211%2E7CMoin)**
Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Team Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Final stretch update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260419-537&t=1&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_2.RBtw2p&amount=3&refcode=20260419-537&t=2&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)
We’re in the final stretch, and the opposition just escalated things to the next level.
Anti-redistricting groups backed by MAGA Republicans have increased their ad spending nearly overnight. What we are seeing now is a full-scale, last-minute blitz designed to overwhelm voters with misleading information before Election Day.
[**Can you rush a donation to the YES campaign now to help us fight back against the NO campaign’s increased ad spend?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_2.RBtw2p&amount=3&refcode=20260419-537&t=3&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)
**This is their playbook.**
They surge late, they flood the Commonwealth with misinformation that dominates the airwaves, and they try to create just enough confusion to tip the outcome.
We have built real momentum across Virginia. Last Saturday we completed our biggest day of organizing yet, our volunteers talked to voters in every corner of the Commonwealth, and it’s clear that the opposition is paying attention.
If the NO campaign outspends us in these final days, they could still chip away at our narrow lead to flip the scales.
It’s critical that we don’t let that happen.
Every dollar we raise right now goes directly to reaching undecided voters, countering misinformation, and making sure people understand what is at stake in this crucial race.
[**Can we depend on your contribution right now**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_2.RBtw2p&amount=3&refcode=20260419-537&t=4&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)**[?](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_2.RBtw2p&amount=3&refcode=20260419-537&t=5&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC) **
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_2.RBtw2p&amount=3&refcode=20260419-537&t=24&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)**
Onwards,
Team Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=25&refcode2=537_12592_X3O7sC&akid=537%2E12592%2EX3O7sC)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Xavier Becerra
subject: What’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becerra for Governor 2026**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129780628/615517396/-744584339?refcode=em260418-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFjODI5OTYtMjczYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zQeTr1ShNgibJu4ntbDdn0iuzNN3jbYj4Wjo5EJI5-I=&emci=9527f185-1f3c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=6ac82996-273c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8078851)
---
Team, it’s Xavier. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first — or next — donation to my campaign to become California’s next Governor, this is it. Let me explain: If we lose this primary election, there’s a real chance California voters could be left with two Republicans on the ballot in November. And we would be virtually guaranteed to have a Republican Governor. I know, that’s a chilling thought, but it’s what’s at stake. In 2027, having a Republican Governor of California bowing down to Trump. It would put everything we care about at risk — from protecting our rights and our environment, to making life more affordable for Californians. And you can bet that a Republican governor in 2027 wouldn’t be standing up for everyday Californians. They’d become a puppet for the same corporations, wealthy donors, and special interests who back Trump and are already trying to buy this election. We’ve built real momentum. But we have a way to go. With less than two months until the primary, if we don’t continue scaling up momentum now, our nightmare scenario could become a reality. [**So I need to ask. Can you please rush $3 to my campaign today? Every dollar will help power us to victory!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129780629/615517397/-1978189107?refcode=em260418-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFjODI5OTYtMjczYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zQeTr1ShNgibJu4ntbDdn0iuzNN3jbYj4Wjo5EJI5-I=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129780630/615517398/-1978189107?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em260418-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFjODI5OTYtMjczYy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zQeTr1ShNgibJu4ntbDdn0iuzNN3jbYj4Wjo5EJI5-I=)

clean_body: | Team, it’s Xavier. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first — or next — donation to my campaign to become California’s next Governor, this is it. Let me explain: If we lose this primary election, there’s a real chance California voters could be left with two Republicans on the ballot in November. And we would be virtually guaranteed to have a Republican Governor. I know, that’s a chilling thought, but it’s what’s at stake. In 2027, having a Republican Governor of California bowing down to Trump. It would put everything we care about at risk — from protecting our rights and our environment, to making life more affordable for Californians. And you can bet that a Republican governor in 2027 wouldn’t be standing up for everyday Californians. They’d become a puppet for the same corporations, wealthy donors, and special interests who back Trump and are already trying to buy this election. We’ve built real momentum. But we have a way to go. With less than two months until the primary, if we don’t continue scaling up momentum now, our nightmare scenario could become a reality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Xavier Becerra | = Becerra for Governor 2026 330 N Brand Blvd Suite 700 Glendale, CA 91203 United States mailto:info@xavierbecerra2026.com | Paid for by Becerra for Governor 2026

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: You’re an invaluable part of our plan
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF ]Chris Pappas for Senate

We know you get a lot of emails from us — [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260419_1.LX_feG&amount=5&refcode=em20260419-1&t=1003&akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF ]but let us explain why your
grassroots donation, even just $5, is so important.

We know you’re not an ATM, and we won’t treat you like one.

Grassroots donors are a key part of this team and our plan to elect Chris
Pappas and keep New Hampshire blue. We don’t use alarmist tactics or fake
matches. Every goal is real, and every contribution directly powers our
work on the ground here in the Granite State.

And since Chris has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, this campaign
relies on this grassroots team to get things done.

We’ve won four tough races in one of the “swingiest” districts in the
country, which was only possible with the power of a grassroots team like
the one we’re building right here.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260419_1.LX_feG&amount=5&refcode=em20260419-1&t=1004&akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF ]So,
when we email you to ask for your donation, it’s because your support
truly matters. It helps us organize, advertise, and build a movement
that’s powerful enough to stand up to Donald Trump, national Republicans,
corporate PACs, and everyone else who’s trying to flip New Hampshire red
this November. With that in mind, we hope you’ll chip in today.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260419_1.LX_feG&amount=5&refcode=em20260419-1&t=1023&akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF ]Donate $5 »

Thank you for your support,

Chris Pappas for Senate

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6205%2E582294%2E_II5oF

Peter,

**[BREAKING: Barack Obama and Chuck Schumer are trying to KILL the SAVE America Act](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1092694fedee41dfb9faffbed5a5a33e&_e=eGCciNQCMXK4P8xH-8JTagdXAs2fLghcNryXrAszy5z2GmB1VfAmopv0cq9n1xPcpRSC5dJGPbCUvAbCkEKZl5yvLAIW9bfJV4zYLFMj1tqCmb19RBV0CZR-yDc76aHUEA3DDExyoxT1tfh-B4Nh46XSac-98z3lPqx19ON5kQrpLDUSEPOdV4q4Ig1XNNCAloJLJOvahGo4w1ruR_b9FEGJ8M6L4qVULs31Hiq1_Dg6vRMZNJxXuOHK0yRFCsPCpmqslOjNkrvUxoW0j94Laqu4Gx34Smovh02XaqC9mr43jySZFKunnN7hZAsbyQXRwHszSkpFC3Y7b7hqB-8LAlx47g690kBVAt0jtPnp6dCzvnsdIVHdDBEf36OhIJGDD7F2LbcoSGGyhoFo3QD3KfPl2BMqbQh90ahTsAwVZRzeVzs4wXhWBjunoRJtsMPkIau61cV-fiq8pd1E5WocLzNmXQ7ZeIrKxSPRgaHUcfFSMWcRvG--MfX5z3tx5AyFM7q86YH73-kQ-ibLL8oi0SVhzKyoT66LJRRHJ1RopTo%3D)**
**Republicans are fighting to require a photo ID to vote, ensuring the INTEGRITY of federal elections and protecting the voice of every American citizen.**

_And Obama and Schumer are doing everything they can to stop it._

Let’s call it what it is.

_**When politicians fight against basic safeguards for our elections, when they oppose proof of citizenship, when they try to manipulate the ballot box...**_

_ANY opposing argument is simply_ **ELECTION INTERFERENCE.**

THIS IS THE FIGHT OF OUR LIVES.
**If we can’t have secure elections, what kind of country are we living in?**

The SAVE America Act is common sense. It protects our democracy, defends the Constitution, and puts Americans FIRST.

**[I need your help bringing the SAVE America Act to Life.](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1092694fedee41dfb9faffbed5a5a33e&_e=eGCciNQCMXK4P8xH-8JTagdXAs2fLghcNryXrAszy5z2GmB1VfAmopv0cq9n1xPcpRSC5dJGPbCUvAbCkEKZl5yvLAIW9bfJV4zYLFMj1tqCmb19RBV0CZR-yDc76aHUEA3DDExyoxT1tfh-B4Nh43fqnXh9UyrhJMZmrxut6BH_pBWiI1uB6t-zafMGgk3F8CZS2pDum31CJgWikZa7kzzwMpapLy9JFyO_x1ZrU7FMlcjU1Zql7KACfyzTzfQ7hnVGe_aDv_Gs5Hkl1h6di9PmYGdZBtHPUf-zrAvGbZfNmYY1ZVWcUHWB-LFYRCNq4Onb2QZCuFuY7lcPJOn_RzRsc5fqcets6yK9bl3jyvznZF7uhubnskTRxU_MUFZhNMhgpPQ8n4ngJxiUxepcxLqU-17e11FmVDqQmnjO95wZcreeGXHrTsirL2ksXjQWT4AIUdBDjE-1qzq60KH37vVP9EhYvvk1Gxgbqxc6907uBHh_k8iUzMlBAXzoGtM0yBhJa7flCKsd2m_fA91eaH6OAR8-NSV12RpOfetOVOnTfOJHAlw81rMqaR70-TDJ)**

What if I told you that election year is officially here and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if I told you that there are now three Republicans running to flip New Mexico and several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state, making it clear that we'll need a surge of grassroots support to stay ahead?
What if I told you that now more than ever, Democratic Governors are essential to serve as a backstop when the federal government abuses its resources and undermines civil liberties?
**And what if I told you that national Republicans are already eyeing this race and watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win?**
Friend, I know we've got what it takes to win — but I can only get there if committed grassroots supporters like you help me reach every single goal from now through Election Day, including this one.
**_[Will you step up with a split donation of $5 or anything at all between Jacky Rosen’s and my campaign to help me reach my $15k midnight goal, win in New Mexico, and keep our state blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129781271/615519657/-1293128627?refcode=&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWM0N2YxMC0yYjNjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xN2PedugpwPqOPGKfCXmGIlehU2Q6uduDBguD3_2fDI=)_**

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e8828289/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTk/LbmNsbXBMdUI0cA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzUxJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMjAxOC0yMDI2MDQxOQ/gaeU55Q/sci2ce4c93c) [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e8828289/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTk/LbmNsbXBMdUI0cA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzUxJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMjAxOC0yMDI2MDQxOQ/gaeU55Q/sci2ce4c93c)

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: I am ready to roll!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I never thought I’d be here...

| | | | | [](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)
---
⤊Honestly, Peter, this race is about our great nation, America, and what makes our country the best in the world!⤊
⤋This was more my scene back in the day!⤋
---
[](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._w)
---
But if there’s one thing that being a mother of four AMAZING kids will do, it’s inspire you to do ALL you can to build a better nation and a better future for the next generation.
You see, serving the American people has always been my #1 passion in this world.
Whether I was flying a H-46 helicopter and completing two tours in the Persian Gulf or working right here in the homeland as a geriatric nurse practitioner trying to serve our seniors in any way possible, I’ve always worked to put the American people first.
But the more I sat on the sidelines and watched our elected officials, the more frustrated I became with their inability to do the same.
So, I decided to do more to serve! Because America doesn’t need more career-politicians who have become so out of touch that they can’t recognize what’s important to everyday families.
We need more Moms who are concerned about the country we are leaving for our children. We need veterans, nurses, and Americans who are out in their communities every day, finding ways to make them better.
And I’m proud to say, Peter, that I’ve been doing just that since Day 1!
---
| [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS >>](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)
---
Now, here’s the catch, Peter:
Since Election Day, when YOU and Conservative patriots from across the country helped propel my campaign to the halls of Congress, the Democrats have taken notice of our fight...
They know that my narrow victory in 2024 can easily be flipped the other way in 2026 if we’re not careful. And they’ve been pulling out ALL the stops to make it happen!
FIRST, they lined my opponent’s pockets with MILLIONS!
THEN, they introduced new legislation to REDISTRICT Virginia and plummet my chance of re-election!
NOW, they’re spending MILLIONS more on an ad campaign with Barack Obama to encourage Americans to let the Left re-draw the maps and sink my campaign!
---
[](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._taKg)
---
Peter, this isn’t normal behavior!
The Democrats don’t just spend MILLIONS of dollars and join forces with a former United States President for just any race. But they know if they’re able to flip my seat BLUE, our GOP Majority will follow suit soon after.
We CANNOT allow that to happen, Peter!
So, I’m writing this message to you today, not as some “politician” who’s lost focus on what truly matters,
But as a Veteran, Healthcare Provider, and Mother of four, who just wants to see our country thrive for Americans today and for the decades to come.
[Please, chip in anything you can spare to my fight today, and help me get the support necessary to defeat my radical opponent and stop the Democrats’ scheme in its tracks:](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)
---
| [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS >>](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.__s2QuZiw)
---
Your support means the absolute WORLD to me, Peter..!
Thank you and God Bless,
Jen Kiggans
---
---

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: First Fire, Then Ice
body:
While inflation is today's worry, deflation may be tomorrow's

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..LsDHRMbF9puvzt2H6l0ijWDrozaardKuzr3ThRTQ_MI?) for more
---
[](https://substack..l3gO7PTFx6kDnY2MRjntTNatqXsy63UrLARx8Nw2in8?)
---
# [First Fire, Then Ice](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=194364946&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0MzY0OTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzY2MzA3MTYsImV4cCI6MTc3OTIyMjcxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LKTh_XXODZ2ZL51Lh0wbmc9UIzW5hHenPvyKmseTB2M)
### While inflation is today's worry, deflation may be tomorrow's
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Apr 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=194364946&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0MzY0OTQ2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjYzMDcxNiwiZXhwIjoxNzc5MjIyNzE2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b_yaCIlDDy95_qSs8imsyYeFvCaCqlg0_MD4MAGLSFc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=194364946&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0MzY0OTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzY2MzA3MTYsImV4cCI6MTc3OTIyMjcxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LKTh_XXODZ2ZL51Lh0wbmc9UIzW5hHenPvyKmseTB2M&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=194364946&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0MzY0OTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzY2MzA3MTYsImV4cCI6MTc3OTIyMjcxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LKTh_XXODZ2ZL51Lh0wbmc9UIzW5hHenPvyKmseTB2M)
---
| | [](https://substack..JtUI16Fa-LRia3gKSPFJSxTatOzwu6RbnxhXtkEkmZI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/first-fire-then-ice?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22c59b26-527e-459b-b85f-91e78ccd5ede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every conversation I have with business owners, investors, and fellow executives lately seems to begin the same way: prices keep going up, and there doesn't seem to be any reason for the trend to stop. Oil, food, housing, and labor costs all appear to be on a one way path. At Goodwell Foods, the frozen pizza manufacturer I run in New Hampshire, I see it daily. Freight has skyrocketed on the back of higher fuel prices. Labor in rural New England remains stubbornly tight. Even whey prices, which we use in our high-protein offerings, seem to only go in one direction.
In other words, inflation is real, self-reinforcing, and disruptive. For the next one-to-three years, it deserves to be prominent on boardroom agendas. Politicians are probably on-point to worry that "affordability" is a galvanizing, anti-incumbent driver that will impact the future elections.
* * *
## [Forget Inflation; Deflation Is A Bigger Risk ](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3f2a23-11b2-479c-99dc-c6a302c36dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| August 15, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3f2a23-11b2-479c-99dc-c6a302c36dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Inflation has been a big topic of late, and with good reason. Rapidly rising prices around the world have compounded inequality, driven labor unrest that has disrupted companies and industries, and caused a banking crisis in the United States. Further, as I've written elsewhere,](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3f2a23-11b2-479c-99dc-c6a302c36dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3f2a23-11b2-479c-99dc-c6a302c36dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Those of us who spend our time looking around corners tend to ask some other questions: What comes next? After the inflation subsides, what will follow? After all, we all want to skate to where the puck is going, not where it is. My answer, increasingly, is that while inflation is (and should be) the focus of our near-term economic worries, deflation is a greater risk over the long term. That's right, instead of being concerned about rising prices, we might need to worry about falling ones. Investors, policymakers, and business leaders who prepare only for the first act of this economic drama may find themselves poorly positioned for the second.
As I've often said, every perspective is limited, biased, and incomplete. So why only use one? And when I apply this approach to navigating uncertainty to price levels, the analysis points to higher prices in the short run, and lower prices in the long run.
### Inflation Today
For years now, I've been speaking, writing, and advising that the world is splitting into two global economic ecosystems driven, in large part, by the US China conflict. Trade wars, tariffs, and shifting supply chains are the visible manifestation of hyper-globalization unwinding.
While the world fragments, supply chain strategists are increasingly shifting their focus from just-in-time efficiency to just-in-case resilience. Re-shoring, on-shoring, friend-shoring, and tariffs, even if they are one-time adjustments, all raise cost and therefore prices. Once a new pattern of trade emerges, prices should stabilize (assuming no other changes).
* * *
## [The Global Split Accelerates ](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab603d2-cd3a-41e5-ab90-a62895149758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| April 26, 2025
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab603d2-cd3a-41e5-ab90-a62895149758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I have long been thought the world is in the process of bifurcating into two economic ecosystems, one led by America and the other by China. As is now obvious to the world, the split is accelerating as China's global ambition runs headlong into President Trump's 21](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab603d2-cd3a-41e5-ab90-a62895149758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab603d2-cd3a-41e5-ab90-a62895149758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
There are other indicators pointing to inflationary pressures. The voracious energy demands of the AI infrastructure boom suggest electricity prices may be headed higher, and geopolitical disruptions to the oil industry threaten to spread upward price pressure to everything that is transported.
Let's not forget that the labor market, in many industries and geographies, remains uncomfortably tight. Political policies have exacerbated the shortage as the appetite for immigration has cratered. Further, baby boomers are retiring at a steady rate compounding the problem. In the short run, a tight labor market suggests higher wages. The worry, of course, is that higher wages lead to more demand, which in turn leads to higher prices, driving workers to demand even higher wages. (Knowns as a wage-price spiral, this dynamic is something that keeps central bankers up at night.)
* * *
## [AI Infrastructure: Boom or Bust?](https://substack.com/redirect/ee3d036d-713d-4cd9-8761-4c82aeb9e7e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 29
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ee3d036d-713d-4cd9-8761-4c82aeb9e7e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[In the late 1990s, Lucent Technologies was America's most widely held stock -- a "picks and shovels" play on the internet revolution. The company lent billions to its own customers so they could buy more Lucent equipment. On paper, revenue soared. In reality, Lucent was financing its own demand. When the customers went bust, Lucent nearly followed. The p...](https://substack.com/redirect/ee3d036d-713d-4cd9-8761-4c82aeb9e7e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/ee3d036d-713d-4cd9-8761-4c82aeb9e7e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
And of course, there's also housing. America is facing a housing shortage of approximately 3-5 million homes. Combined with elevated interest rates, the cost of home ownership has risen. Rental housing is also facing upward pressure, compounding what is a pre-existing and significant affordability crisis. It's worth remembering that shelter-oriented inflation has been notoriously sticky.
Add these dynamics up and it sure seems like the near-term direction is clear: higher cost of goods, higher cost of capital, higher cost of labor. These are forces that won't dissipate in 12 months.
### Deflation Tomorrow
Look past the next 24-36 months and three powerful deflationary forces come into focus that, in my view, dwarf today's inflationary ones. It's only by adopting a generalist approach to zooming out that these dynamics come into relief.
I've written about both the promise and perils of **Artificial Intelligence**. What gets far less attention is AI's enormous deflationary firepower. Just think about the ability to AI to destroy white-collar jobs. Entry-level jobs in accounting, law, finance, customer service, radiology, engineering, and many other fields are being replaced by AI at an accelerating rate. The cost of knowledge work is plunging. This is a massive and sustained deflationary force with few historical parallels.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k0n-619kF6GA37LfBuKxyVE_Jia1Y48Bkbi1RzlepWA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=194364946)
I'm living this in real time at Goodwell Foods. Work that once required outside counsel or a contract analyst now gets a first draft from Claude within minutes. Multiply that by every service business in the developed world and you can begin to see the potential disruption to the legal field. Similar dynamics are at work in finance, HR, strategy, marketing and other functions.
* * *
## [AI-Generated Unemployment](https://substack.com/redirect/fe501b5d-4985-4b22-951f-c9c3115ff06a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 23
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fe501b5d-4985-4b22-951f-c9c3115ff06a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[There has been a lot written lately about AI's impact on the economy, specifically how many jobs it will eliminate. And that's really only one of the many risks that will accompany the massive advancements in information processing capabilities that AI is empowering.](https://substack.com/redirect/fe501b5d-4985-4b22-951f-c9c3115ff06a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/fe501b5d-4985-4b22-951f-c9c3115ff06a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Another lens that points to deflation is **demographics**. The developed world is aging, and the emerging world is getting older faster than most realize. China's working-age population peaked and is now shrinking. South Korea, Italy, Japan, and Germany are all seeing their populations decline. Older societies consume less, borrow less, take fewer risks, and save more. Japan, which has been living this way for 30 years, has spent the entirety of that period trying (and mostly failing) to manufacture inflation. Do we really think the rest of the developed world will escape this gravity? All else equal, an older population spends less which means less demand...and less demand should lead to lower prices.
* * *
## [Income Isn't Everything](https://substack.com/redirect/a61ad4fc-508d-4292-9e16-6f4e7a8870bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| August 31, 2016
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a61ad4fc-508d-4292-9e16-6f4e7a8870bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Many business executives live by the creed of "What gets measured gets managed." The metrics we use channel our attention and efforts. And when it comes to global economics, no indicator monopolizes our mindshare more than gross domestic product ("GDP"). While the measure is useful, it also has some serious shortcomings. Putting too much emphasis on GDP...](https://substack.com/redirect/a61ad4fc-508d-4292-9e16-6f4e7a8870bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/a61ad4fc-508d-4292-9e16-6f4e7a8870bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Finally, there's **debt**. Global debt-to-GDP ratios are at levels that have historically preceded periods of default, restructuring, or balance-sheet repair. Each new dollar of debt now generates materially less incremental GDP than it did twenty years ago. The marginal productivity of debt is collpasing and government spending that fueled the post-COVID inflation is bumping up against both political and bond-market constraints. When governments can no longer spend their way to reflate, the gravity of deflation will reassert itself.
### So What?
Those navigating today's "Fire Then Ice" sequence should embrace uncertainty. Consider the plight of investors. The ideal assets to own in the short-run may the wrong ones to hold in the long-run. For instance, real assets and commodities should perform well in times of inflation...while they may not do very well in a deflationary environment. Likewise, long-duration Treasury bonds may be ideal during deflation, but will struggle in times of inflationary pressures.
The critical skill for the next decade is not going to be predicting which force wins, but understanding that both inflationary pressures and deflationary dynamics are real. They assert themselves at different times and in different ways. Revel in the uncertainty, closely monitor developments, and when you observe road signs suggesting you're on the path to deflation, adjust accordingly.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k0n-619kF6GA37LfBuKxyVE_Jia1Y48Bkbi1RzlepWA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=194364946)
I would never bet against the long-run deflationary power of human ingenuity, technological innovation, or demographic arithmetic. But I would also never bet against the short-run inflation that flows from geopolitical fragmentation and political impatience.
Act one is warm. Act two is chilly. The independent thinker prepares a wardrobe for both environments.

Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/f6963a67-f089-4802-b252-4703f69de1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/8b117b46-d234-42c8-9d1d-69799bbe8def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/c0ed0e45-3a8e-4c67-966f-48453b32836d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. clean_body: While inflation is today's worry, deflation may be tomorrow's | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? While inflation is today's worry, deflation may be tomorrow's | | | Apr 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Every conversation I have with business owners, investors, and fellow executives lately seems to begin the same way: prices keep going up, and there doesn't seem to be any reason for the trend to stop. Oil, food, housing, and labor costs all appear to be on a one way path. At Goodwell Foods, the frozen pizza manufacturer I run in New Hampshire, I see it daily. Freight has skyrocketed on the back of higher fuel prices. Labor in rural New England remains stubbornly tight. Even whey prices, which we use in our high-protein offerings, seem to only go in one direction. In other words, inflation is real, self-reinforcing, and disruptive. For the next one-to-three years, it deserves to be prominent on boardroom agendas. Politicians are probably on-point to worry that "affordability" is a galvanizing, anti-incumbent driver that will impact the future elections. | | | | ---|---|--- | August 15, 2023 | Those of us who spend our time looking around corners tend to ask some other questions: What comes next? After the inflation subsides, what will follow? After all, we all want to skate to where the puck is going, not where it is. My answer, increasingly, is that while inflation is (and should be) the focus of our near-term economic worries, deflation is a greater risk over the long term. That's right, instead of being concerned about rising prices, we might need to worry about falling ones. Investors, policymakers, and business leaders who prepare only for the first act of this economic drama may find themselves poorly positioned for the second. As I've often said, every perspective is limited, biased, and incomplete. So why only use one? And when I apply this approach to navigating uncertainty to price levels, the analysis points to higher prices in the short run, and lower prices in the long run. Inflation Today For years now, I've been speaking, writing, and advising that the world is splitting into two global economic ecosystems driven, in large part, by the US China conflict. Trade wars, tariffs, and shifting supply chains are the visible manifestation of hyper-globalization unwinding. While the world fragments, supply chain strategists are increasingly shifting their focus from just-in-time efficiency to just-in-case resilience. Re-shoring, on-shoring, friend-shoring, and tariffs, even if they are one-time adjustments, all raise cost and therefore prices. Once a new pattern of trade emerges, prices should stabilize (assuming no other changes). | | | | ---|---|--- | April 26, 2025 | There are other indicators pointing to inflationary pressures. The voracious energy demands of the AI infrastructure boom suggest electricity prices may be headed higher, and geopolitical disruptions to the oil industry threaten to spread upward price pressure to everything that is transported. Let's not forget that the labor market, in many industries and geographies, remains uncomfortably tight. Political policies have exacerbated the shortage as the appetite for immigration has cratered. Further, baby boomers are retiring at a steady rate compounding the problem. In the short run, a tight labor market suggests higher wages. The worry, of course, is that higher wages lead to more demand, which in turn leads to higher prices, driving workers to demand even higher wages. (Knowns as a wage-price spiral, this dynamic is something that keeps central bankers up at night.) | | | | ---|---|--- | Mar 29 | And of course, there's also housing. America is facing a housing shortage of approximately 3-5 million homes. Combined with elevated interest rates, the cost of home ownership has risen. Rental housing is also facing upward pressure, compounding what is a pre-existing and significant affordability crisis. It's worth remembering that shelter-oriented inflation has been notoriously sticky. Add these dynamics up and it sure seems like the near-term direction is clear: higher cost of goods, higher cost of capital, higher cost of labor. These are forces that won't dissipate in 12 months. Deflation Tomorrow Look past the next 24-36 months and three powerful deflationary forces come into focus that, in my view, dwarf today's inflationary ones. It's only by adopting a generalist approach to zooming out that these dynamics come into relief. I've written about both the promise and perils of Artificial Intelligence. What gets far less attention is AI's enormous deflationary firepower. Just think about the ability to AI to destroy white-collar jobs. Entry-level jobs in accounting, law, finance, customer service, radiology, engineering, and many other fields are being replaced by AI at an accelerating rate. The cost of knowledge work is plunging. This is a massive and sustained deflationary force with few historical parallels. I'm living this in real time at Goodwell Foods. Work that once required outside counsel or a contract analyst now gets a first draft from Claude within minutes. Multiply that by every service business in the developed world and you can begin to see the potential disruption to the legal field. Similar dynamics are at work in finance, HR, strategy, marketing and other functions. | | | | ---|---|--- | Mar 23 | Another lens that points to deflation is demographics. The developed world is aging, and the emerging world is getting older faster than most realize. China's working-age population peaked and is now shrinking. South Korea, Italy, Japan, and Germany are all seeing their populations decline. Older societies consume less, borrow less, take fewer risks, and save more. Japan, which has been living this way for 30 years, has spent the entirety of that period trying (and mostly failing) to manufacture inflation. Do we really think the rest of the developed world will escape this gravity? All else equal, an older population spends less which means less demand...and less demand should lead to lower prices. | | | | ---|---|--- | August 31, 2016 | Finally, there's debt. Global debt-to-GDP ratios are at levels that have historically preceded periods of default, restructuring, or balance-sheet repair. Each new dollar of debt now generates materially less incremental GDP than it did twenty years ago. The marginal productivity of debt is collpasing and government spending that fueled the post-COVID inflation is bumping up against both political and bond-market constraints. When governments can no longer spend their way to reflate, the gravity of deflation will reassert itself. So What? Those navigating today's "Fire Then Ice" sequence should embrace uncertainty. Consider the plight of investors. The ideal assets to own in the short-run may the wrong ones to hold in the long-run. For instance, real assets and commodities should perform well in times of inflation...while they may not do very well in a deflationary environment. Likewise, long-duration Treasury bonds may be ideal during deflation, but will struggle in times of inflationary pressures. The critical skill for the next decade is not going to be predicting which force wins, but understanding that both inflationary pressures and deflationary dynamics are real. They assert themselves at different times and in different ways. Revel in the uncertainty, closely monitor developments, and when you observe road signs suggesting you're on the path to deflation, adjust accordingly. I would never bet against the long-run deflationary power of human ingenuity, technological innovation, or demographic arithmetic. But I would also never bet against the short-run inflation that flows from geopolitical fragmentation and political impatience. Act one is warm. Act two is chilly. The independent thinker prepares a wardrobe for both environments. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. name: James O'Keefe
subject: The New York Times said this doesn't happen. We filmed it 28 times.
body:
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth

| | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkb1urDAQhZ_GdCBjew0ULq6E6Pa2KdFgD2At_pFtssrbR2y0VaqUc-abI32aj_t8B3tYv_0HhyqVdU55Ljt6fH6F9CjWYc5gTdltNmFmlMmairodLo5VRhltoNUVqrbrpORUDqLalUTTsp4aCkIvMAxskK1GijgY3gP2lVVXFRXtwChvOW_o0iFd-HoDLcStN0RQODCVJmE8l8Nq8AXyYw1JY6ODqw61lxIz4f8ImwibMuozYQMeTSgXQdgUHogrOjQWthTOeEVuq03A7Eu9Q4zoa7fUMUQgfDqLm3M4k0bCx18gYfICrrbTET6-jn4yDS6C3Tzh41vrvQm-oC-Ej6mshElw4XyN7FYlZeLTHofNsiOCbg7s8VIrf3_Ep2LfAQAA__9MRpqM "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260419&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")

---
| Dear Patriot,
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth — **a real voter's identity.** “Sign his name,” the man said. “Just write what I tell you to write.”**[**We filmed the whole thing.**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkb1urDAQhZ_GdCBjew0ULq6E6Pa2KdFgD2At_pFtssrbR2y0VaqUc-abI32aj_t8B3tYv_0HhyqVdU55Ljt6fH6F9CjWYc5gTdltNmFmlMmairodLo5VRhltoNUVqrbrpORUDqLalUTTsp4aCkIvMAxskK1GijgY3gP2lVVXFRXtwChvOW_o0iFd-HoDLcStN0RQODCVJmE8l8Nq8AXyYw1JY6ODqw61lxIz4f8ImwibMuozYQMeTSgXQdgUHogrOjQWthTOeEVuq03A7Eu9Q4zoa7fUMUQgfDqLm3M4k0bCx18gYfICrrbTET6-jn4yDS6C3Tzh41vrvQm-oC-Ej6mshElw4XyN7FYlZeLTHofNsiOCbg7s8VIrf3_Ep2LfAQAA__9MRpqM)

**[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkb1urDAQhZ_GdCBjew0ULq6E6Pa2KdFgD2At_pFtssrbR2y0VaqUc-abI32aj_t8B3tYv_0HhyqVdU55Ljt6fH6F9CjWYc5gTdltNmFmlMmairodLo5VRhltoNUVqrbrpORUDqLalUTTsp4aCkIvMAxskK1GijgY3gP2lVVXFRXtwChvOW_o0iFd-HoDLcStN0RQODCVJmE8l8Nq8AXyYw1JY6ODqw61lxIz4f8ImwibMuozYQMeTSgXQdgUHogrOjQWthTOeEVuq03A7Eu9Q4zoa7fUMUQgfDqLm3M4k0bCx18gYfICrrbTET6-jn4yDS6C3Tzh41vrvQm-oC-Ej6mshElw4XyN7FYlZeLTHofNsiOCbg7s8VIrf3_Ep2LfAQAA__9MRpqM)What you're about to see is the most explosive hidden-camera footage my team has ever captured. Not speculation. Not anonymous sources.**Actual election crimes committed on camera — in broad daylight — on the streets of Los Angeles.** Over the course of several days, my undercover journalists documented petition circulators handing post-it notes with real voters' names and addresses to homeless individuals, paying them cash — one to three dollars per signature — and instructing them to forge those voters' signatures on official petitions and voter registration forms.We captured it **twenty-eight times.** That's twenty-eight documented instances in just a few days of filming. Which means across Los Angeles County, this is happening **tens of thousands of times.**[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkb1urDAQhZ_GdCBjew0ULq6E6Pa2KdFgD2At_pFtssrbR2y0VaqUc-abI32aj_t8B3tYv_0HhyqVdU55Ljt6fH6F9CjWYc5gTdltNmFmlMmairodLo5VRhltoNUVqrbrpORUDqLalUTTsp4aCkIvMAxskK1GijgY3gP2lVVXFRXtwChvOW_o0iFd-HoDLcStN0RQODCVJmE8l8Nq8AXyYw1JY6ODqw61lxIz4f8ImwibMuozYQMeTSgXQdgUHogrOjQWthTOeEVuq03A7Eu9Q4zoa7fUMUQgfDqLm3M4k0bCx18gYfICrrbTET6-jn4yDS6C3Tzh41vrvQm-oC-Ej6mshElw4XyN7FYlZeLTHofNsiOCbg7s8VIrf3_Ep2LfAQAA__9MRpqM "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260419&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")****| [▶ WATCH THE HIDDEN-CAMERA FOOTAGE AND CHIP IN $35](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkb1urDAQhZ_GdCBjew0ULq6E6Pa2KdFgD2At_pFtssrbR2y0VaqUc-abI32aj_t8B3tYv_0HhyqVdU55Ljt6fH6F9CjWYc5gTdltNmFmlMmairodLo5VRhltoNUVqrbrpORUDqLalUTTsp4aCkIvMAxskK1GijgY3gP2lVVXFRXtwChvOW_o0iFd-HoDLcStN0RQODCVJmE8l8Nq8AXyYw1JY6ODqw61lxIz4f8ImwibMuozYQMeTSgXQdgUHogrOjQWthTOeEVuq03A7Eu9Q4zoa7fUMUQgfDqLm3M4k0bCx18gYfICrrbTET6-jn4yDS6C3Tzh41vrvQm-oC-Ej6mshElw4XyN7FYlZeLTHofNsiOCbg7s8VIrf3_Ep2LfAQAA__9MRpqM "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260419&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")
---
Let me walk you through what our cameras caught.
A voter named Vicky Walker. A voter named Paulson. A voter named Joseph Albright. Real people. Real identities. In each case, a petition coordinator handed a homeless person a sticky note bearing that voter's information and told them to sign as if they were that person.
One coordinator was caught on camera admitting they get paid seven to ten dollars per signature. They're turning around and paying homeless people a fraction of that — a dollar, sometimes three — to commit federal crimes on their behalf.
Let me be clear about what we're talking about: **it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration.** What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically.
The New York Times told America this doesn't happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. **We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape.**
And here's what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called it “astounding.” NBC News covered it. The story is breaking through.
**But investigations like this are not free.**
Every dollar you give goes directly to fieldwork: $35 covers a day of undercover equipment costs. $50 covers the background research we do to identify real voters whose identities are being stolen. $100 funds a full day of field operations. $250 helps cover the legal costs of protecting our journalists when powerful people try to shut us down.

On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth | | | "" | Dear Patriot, A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth — a real voter's identity. “Sign his name,” the man said. “Just write what I tell you to write.” you're about to see is the most explosive hidden-camera footage my team has ever captured. Not speculation. Not anonymous sources.Actual election crimes committed on camera — in broad daylight — on the streets of Los Angeles. Over the course of several days, my undercover journalists documented petition circulators handing post-it notes with real voters' names and addresses to homeless individuals, paying them cash — one to three dollars per signature — and instructing them to forge those voters' signatures on official petitions and voter registration forms.We captured it twenty-eight times. That's twenty-eight documented instances in just a few days of filming. Which means across Los Angeles County, this is happening tens of thousands of times. ""**| "" Let me walk you through what our cameras caught. A voter named Vicky Walker. A voter named Paulson. A voter named Joseph Albright. Real people. Real identities. In each case, a petition coordinator handed a homeless person a sticky note bearing that voter's information and told them to sign as if they were that person. One coordinator was caught on camera admitting they get paid seven to ten dollars per signature. They're turning around and paying homeless people a fraction of that — a dollar, sometimes three — to commit federal crimes on their behalf. Let me be clear about what we're talking about: it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration. What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically. The New York Times told America this doesn't happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape. And here's what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. **I’ve been clear on this:** This is a fundamental violation of the Jersey Values we talk about. _If you work hard, you shouldn't be squeezed dry by unfair costs._

My "all-of-the-above" energy strategy is designed to bring these prices back down to earth by expanding production through natural gas, nuclear, and renewable energy projects. By speeding up permitting and overhauling our regional power system, we can increase supply and stop the price gouging that has left our families broke.

clean_body: | | Hi there, I want to talk to you about something that is hitting every single family and small business in our state right where it hurts. Recent reports have confirmed New Jersey electricity bills are up a staggering 45% in just two years. This affordability crisis is stretching household budgets to the breaking point. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’ve been clear on this: This is a fundamental violation of the Jersey Values we talk about. If you work hard, you shouldn't be squeezed dry by unfair costs. My "all-of-the-above" energy strategy is designed to bring these prices back down to earth by expanding production through natural gas, nuclear, and renewable energy projects. By speeding up permitting and overhauling our regional power system, we can increase supply and stop the price gouging that has left our families broke. = | = Thanks for believing in this mission and for your continued support. Let’s get to work. — Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

Fellow Conservative,

The Q1 numbers are in. I'm not going to sugarcoat them.

**Democrats are outraising us — badly — in Senate races across the country.**

In Texas, a Democratic state legislator just hauled in **$27 million in a single quarter.** That's the largest first-quarter total by any Senate candidate in American history. They're targeting states we cannot afford to lose.

**In Alaska, our incumbent Republican senator was outraised 4-to-1 by his Democratic challenger.** _Four to one._ Outside liberal groups have already flooded the state with ads and are calling it a top priority.

| [**RUSH AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION NOW**
](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=04f46abf10bb43e7902c003375a915b0&_e=IndviSK-SoxW0jabPCFY27_VpiKhK0WUHI0ZQn6_yeafUPfkjm7-BqWeuZhSCt7M6NTJxGa-TJrWDWdM-JVU8tJlNsQmn-4lLHAorKTUW7HXUl5sg9ujcyFvVGd_2hLqRIAFQmDUbS8hr33YmQ7DD-TULJg3l8OycksQk6iTeDNW14gEelnvM5dIFsUFK7gGMOl-0ACeBHom9-HKCeOyGWiRpXGG8LBpYVphHpQPkrnm5RI6aCplSdjd7MP13Jv1lCd5KC8n05CXmPbLTs0luvOmEPmAk0XYp9IANQwJx3cwpRDbl3GltsV7aeW1I8O3E7_MtjmxOQIQDK8QlfCH54946GF6Qx-EyHLH3BeaNi-X5wm7cBVN-l9lIQaILsFEm58OG1O9VxZzNhFeJH_u5LJmuI5G3OC-ifTToosyQYhQa_GghlSiO9sYi5rQKSvABNLKEmmob6dw4YKGy0onNLXKwrpYS2aBqAe_qfzph1LU__CFlBErLWGtpjKLH0ADjpvsc5-szpJw14Umlfv5kqkPzMhkGg-3wDtXD-J5z-0y5pI_7-3OHnb2ELeqBkQ2dWX1HuSEzd6YLr7YIq-foXws5QAMfZbpT867mE-cb17ST2PemBAVi-zin63kZV-ZaWOTeypWbbV6kwpyeqWajneH8EoYITR61V44QpIix10%3D)

This is the map we're defending. And right now, the other side has the momentum.

Democrats need to flip four seats to take the Senate majority. They've recruited top-tier candidates, activated their donor network, and their outside spending groups are already on the air. They believe 2026 is their year.

[**I believe it's ours — but only if we respond.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=04f46abf10bb43e7902c003375a915b0&_e=IndviSK-SoxW0jabPCFY27_VpiKhK0WUHI0ZQn6_yeafUPfkjm7-BqWeuZhSCt7M6NTJxGa-TJrWDWdM-JVU8tJlNsQmn-4lLHAorKTUW7HXUl5sg9ujcyFvVGd_2hLqRIAFQmDUbS8hr33YmQ7DD-TULJg3l8OycksQk6iTeDNW14gEelnvM5dIFsUFK7gGMOl-0ACeBHom9-HKCeOyGWiRpXGG8LBpYVphHpQPkrlPTJ5q5Y-Z_aBbuKaUn1IJAhxZKbEhFqfRnZi10IQHuQ_At5ZC91h-ptXQOexXyo_S12DeZ9Cbvk3c_mHcKy6EwsR3DsdjVy1fe3hbuVArYTYsWX91Ck9bNy5aQ76GZYCBUXAGdwmCp-GzXiuXnG1gmHsFJ4EdM26lOq5XHsPaSMWPtJQSDe6Kv-attDIwKHYzfkJRlrw9MhEMdyxRycg-kPzEUE2rWzZ-o7YMHeETsEy-Nxaqg24V7AGvjD3xxa6i2_NLYCGJKveDH32MV_41X2BNT1aNqt0bm-Qa-uRtI9RLarBZB7DJWxhyGYBwpOpi-PG5pMZ88w2T7Ip8cr1DM8lRANrPT6hdBjxeBmgnZcpJyFaEjxLUqFDpTGjeRUlIRBfj_MTwaLFAvPUqudBziXBhUgaBxEMzpbaTuP1X7khUksuFQDE2_PYPJJBPmho%3D)

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, The Q1 numbers are in. I'm not going to sugarcoat them. Democrats are outraising us — badly — in Senate races across the country. In Texas, a Democratic state legislator just hauled in $27 million in a single quarter. That's the largest first-quarter total by any Senate candidate in American history. They're targeting states we cannot afford to lose. In Alaska, our incumbent Republican senator was outraised 4-to-1 by his Democratic challenger. Four to one. Outside liberal groups have already flooded the state with ads and are calling it a top priority. | This is the map we're defending. And right now, the other side has the momentum. Democrats need to flip four seats to take the Senate majority. They've recruited top-tier candidates, activated their donor network, and their outside spending groups are already on the air. They believe 2026 is their year. For South Dakota and for the Senate, Senator Mike Rounds P.S. — A Texas Democrat just set a national fundraising record. Our Alaska incumbent was outraised 4-to-1. FOLLOW MIKE ON SOCIAL MEDIA: | | Paid for by Rounds for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We'd hate to see you go, but you can .

And finally, they foot you with the bill on Tax Day.

clean_body: Someone tell Amy Acton: Money does NOT grow on trees. | This is how bad ideas get sold, Peter: First, they promise Then, they increase spending to fund their liberal pet projects. And finally, they foot you with the bill on Tax Day. Liberal Amy Acton's big-government proposals would dump an additional in wasteful spending onto the backs of Ohio families. To pay for it, she'd have to your state income tax. If we lose this race, that's exactly what's coming next: Peter, it all comes to one choice: We're looking for a handful of Patriots to step up and endorse Vivek today in his campaign to stop Liberal Amy Acton and her cronies from flipping Ohio and bankrupting our neighbors. clean_body: | | | The Freedom Caucus Fund held a top-level meeting at Mar-a-Lago. I want to tell you what happened inside that room, because not everyone gets to know. When the Freedom Caucus gathered at Mar-a-Lago , it wasn't a photo opportunity. It was a war council. And one issue dominated the room above everything else: The SAVE America Act. This isn't just another bill moving through Congress. This is the Freedom Caucus's number one priority , championed by HFC Policy Chair Chip Roy and backed by every single member of the House Freedom Caucus. Now I'm asking you to match that commitment. Will you rush an emergency contribution to the Freedom Caucus Fund today, so we can take what started at Mar-a-Lago all the way to the Senate floor and into law? Conviction alone doesn't win Senate fights. Resources do. The moment our members walked out of Mar-a-Lago , committed to this battle, the Radical Left's dark money machine started mobilizing. Lobbyists are being activated. Attack ads are being written. They are betting that the energy from that room fades before it reaches the Senate floor. Peter , what was decided at Mar-a-Lago deserves to be backed up with everything we've got. The Freedom Caucus showed up at the home of MAGA and made a promise to fight for election integrity with everything they have. We are sending this exclusive update to our top 12% of supporters because you’ve been in the trenches with us since the beginning of the SAVE America Act. I’m asking you to respond with a donation of $5, $15, $25, or even more today to fuel our fight to get the SAVE America Act all the way to President Trump’s desk. Peter, can I count on you today? | | | About Freedom Caucus Fund: Freedom Caucus Fund is committed to equipping the strongest conservative fighters in America with the resources they need to win. We support candidates who defend the Constitution, champion limited government, and stand unapologetically for the liberty, safety, and prosperity of the American people. With the support of grassroots patriots, Freedom Caucus Fund helps elect leaders who are willing to challenge the status quo in Washington and fight for the principles that built this nation. | | PAID FOR BY FREEDOM CAUCUS FUND: NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE | | PO Box 96006Washington DC 20090-6006 | |

name: Jamie Davis
subject: Are you really surprised by this!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jamie Davis for U
body:
Politico just reported Trump's endorsement isn't helping in Louisiana. Shocking absolutely no one who's been paying attention.
| | | | | [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BvBMvEa2wrId3ak-szbTK9R7cO_TYZREqBwptP8lVsoT5_EaGj45xGaWVb_J5voGBLp756raT-3cDpFH5kXY-cRkm7KKPdNmkRit9iXVfZqGwYYCwhFmNNdW9867n84z6Bk-jm9-rQyz-Dcv_VwJf56dqtcnWu9E3gunphDSj1Hk1FPfb8GVmxv8NjsahmgHYnF6hvAfYqMLbatMir7XerJtvFpnSejC&c=s20vcbxnPf_GRYPrgr-w5942vRU5hS-Lfe4qGMy8j7ac_u4K_h1q5Q==&ch=Xc9SJF3y7eyJQDHEIzeJnNJaDKcbVRLC9oEcdnhSoE17XqMNXbDZiw==)
---
Peter, Somebody just sent me this article from Politico, and when I read the headline my first thought was: "Is it really a surprise!?"
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BvBMvEa2wrId3ak-szbTK9R7cO_TYZREqBwptP8lVsoT5_EaGj45xGaWVb_J5voGBLp756raT-3cDpFH5kXY-cRkm7KKPdNmkRit9iXVfZqGwYYCwhFmNNdW9867n84z6Bk-jm9-rQyz-Dcv_VwJf56dqtcnWu9E3gunphDSj1Hk1FPfb8GVmxv8NjsahmgHYnF6hvAfYqOCA9KnWGNpmq2p7TWMNaZ9&c=s20vcbxnPf_GRYPrgr-w5942vRU5hS-Lfe4qGMy8j7ac_u4K_h1q5Q==&ch=Xc9SJF3y7eyJQDHEIzeJnNJaDKcbVRLC9oEcdnhSoE17XqMNXbDZiw==)
---
Trump's endorsement isn't moving the needle in Louisiana's Republican Senate primary. His chosen candidate isn't running away with it. The MAGA civil war continues.
And frankly? Of course it does.
Because Trump's popularity is PLUMMETING across the country. Right here in Louisiana, we're seeing historic shifts toward Democrats in special elections -- results that make it crystal clear this U.S. Senate seat IS in play.
Trump's endorsement isn't doing anything because Trump's administration isn't doing a thing to help the people of this state.
Expensive, unpopular wars that he can't even tell you the cost of. Rapidly rising prices at the pump and the grocery store. Constant embarrassments -- I mean seriously, did you see that AI photo he posted of himself as Jesus Christ!? And a complete failure to back up our allies abroad.
It's no big surprise that Trump's endorsement has become more of an albatross than a boon.
Louisianans are done. They're done with the chaos. They're done with the empty promises. They're done with a president who serves billionaires and starts wars while working families struggle to get by.
Trump isn't the political force he used to be. Not when gas is $4.50 a gallon. Not when we're fighting another Middle East war nobody wants. Not when his own budget director can't even give a ballpark estimate of what this ridiculous war is costing us.
The emperor has no clothes! And Louisiana voters are starting to notice.
This is OUR moment. While MAGA tears itself apart and Trump's endorsement fails to settle their primary, we're building a movement that can actually win in November.
But only if we have the resources to compete when they finally turn their attention our way.
[Will you chip in $50, $20, or $10 to help us take advantage of Trump's weakness and flip this seat?](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BvBMvEa2wrId3ak-szbTK9R7cO_TYZREqBwptP8lVsoT5_EaGj45xGaWVb_J5voGOldXuA_OyRwQYvgEDmUhFoPjY3Jb1ugfBxaAqzQnCI0m0QEpYQN9bKEIsNIZf0nc6O1zD2Ng0UL2cPB-jGWWN8_BK-eqe-9C-eYFvyu3wtU_yRptoygeWODKMNsm1MIvk5GUFlcxSFnC4HLGn5yMohBeq-4SuKDkKjsgzpuH7Co=&c=s20vcbxnPf_GRYPrgr-w5942vRU5hS-Lfe4qGMy8j7ac_u4K_h1q5Q==&ch=Xc9SJF3y7eyJQDHEIzeJnNJaDKcbVRLC9oEcdnhSoE17XqMNXbDZiw==)
