If everyone reading this email chipped in just $15, we’d have the resources to take on their dark money. We’d be able to get Mandela’s positive message out to voters across the state. But the harsh truth is, not everyone donates. Less than 1% of people who get this email will chip in. We’re hoping you’re part of that 1%.

Team,
ICE leadership is melting down.
First , we led the calls to investigate and impeach Kristi Noem.
Then , Trump fired her.
Now , ICE Director Todd Lyons quit.
Why? Because we’re keeping up the pressure on Trump’s cruel regime, and holding officials accountable for what happens inside ICE facilities.
I won’t stop demanding justice for our communities and our neighbors who were kidnapped by their own government.

name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Speaker Johnson, nearly 500 days into this Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Friend: GOP Leader Mike Johnson is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. He was reelected Speaker for the 119th Congress after securing Donald Trump's support, promising to push through his radical Project 2025/Agenda 47 plans to reshape our country.
In the nearly 500 days since, the House of Representatives has only passed one bill -- Trump's deeply unpopular, job-killing "One Big, Beautiful Bill" that slashes support for American citizens across the country. He's also supported the DOGE efforts to gut the federal government. And despite using the government shutdown to delay any votes, he was forced into allowing consideration and passage of a bill related to the Epstein files.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about the job Speaker Johnson has done so far. Please take our tracking survey:
Team: Do you think Mike Johnson is an effective Speaker?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=041926_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=041926_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041926_1&amount=20]

name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Impeaching Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You might not know me, but your support in this race matters more than you’ll ever know. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjo_MH9THr6X_kDoIJDLtr-cPpSnkPmos0SWWYQNrecbEq_wPRt_cZeYzEMMphFzdAktYwU-_6FaRMkKvFMlB0ASbJejz7PAnOuCWutpolt4dXbnH5aP6WNrjpkSNFTYJeEUq7oSWYJ95RLYZCHoTQQUDifzjlJm80YtzasA1sO87DS4iOf3NhLvJomukxxQOqNy83uyUTyofkIJ78u5H84j53V1bUukyPu61hw3zTZDYsfetk7-vY-qlGmYtZCaQxiea58yiRQnwXsMRrXiBn1y2W6yOkcl75DQlW2nGmGt1_C8RP0t4jrsDVhtHEXWsgRXrnKqTrfpwelmKm3addlq9wVPY_UB1__jt1kpmvzh3d2FolyYecaMwlvpwfyFacd81xpnh5k7EXG_VlBmUiKenz8dEz9apBa_Jc4qkrrRuHy7zQQk3jQukAfvhfqWWUUYRGl1KL_yw-Q3qWvzit9Jr_UAe0143Gwh0LNMF3fhi)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m reaching out to you today for the very first time to ask for your personal endorsement as I run for the Republican nomination for the United States Senate in Minnesota.

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran who answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to defend the freedoms and way of life we hold dear. As a SEAL, I learned to thrive in the toughest environments — and that same grit and determination is exactly what I’m bringing to this race.

Unlike my progressive, far-left Democrat opponents, I’m not cosplaying as a Somali Muslim to win over the votes of a leftist base who want nothing more out of the midterms than impeaching Donald Trump.

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjm-vLGuyxTAVCexI87Feptx2-fTiRv1Q-Qvg1U4dd8FdEtqkRb0Y76kXnHHV-OHNimc1UCykJJzMm36uJHzA-Har4A_Mm1CSpPjX8zVoOwjdoDuAFoegmQeRbBcWXjUPXZ-QypXafBIwV8El5nJSnCCIIZ5vsEgupsD0Pmhz1IktvC-ob3mp4IIlVHK2GC4OUxqtzVtOuyQzOfPT58pGUdf93SkgjDBr0KaSEqVdie63eYenNVeciJTeO9Cn8oRyKvv6HhHXFXH4CuPyWmhufhw-BCvGP_b0osVfddHWApr7iTAnpHrbTiKnI7uZ5uV-YP1rTBOYEHWp_hs5gPbUBSWUwG-9b7S3XCaHc6HhEf3BF7Xhvj4-T7rAcRpymEkffyS8Uxfp7bLBzoTWG8iiKpbWTC_QUfYVEHOV_fNFDOTrsR6_xb5rf5HFva197TZ3mlz1dri6frPiS5LCZWOtPszBUVlN1S5BpnG-LBbVffCB)_
My team and I have been driving from county to county to introduce my campaign to folks who may have never heard of me. We’re doing the hard work now - long days, tons of events - so we can meet as many potential voters as possible.

**I’m especially proud that in recent months I have won nearly all of the straw polls conducted by local Republican organizations across Minnesota.** These early victories show that conservatives are ready for a battle-tested leader who will take the fight to Washington and deliver real results for our state.

We are on track to win the endorsement of the delegates to the Minnesota Republican Party in May but we need to expand our support now to win in November. We’ve set an ambitious goal of securing **20,000 more conservative endorsements** to demonstrate the size and strength of this grassroots movement heading into my August primary. If you can spare just a few moments right now to add your name to my official endorsement list, **[I would be most grateful.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjiRWJeRs7IMMKwwkt1T3Q-wIVg5EHXIb1Gvsm8mgMikXLa24sW2d0jVybURtVTnghHQ5ytMddcGUfJlCHfSsP36fVi5nbjaXXrwQCGhTttlAk_uQI_lgignjew-O6xBcaD-bpepI8WiH1NZfcY2bma2NJ4MuV68it3A2MVRwzAyuLh9klDY0JBw47a38i6Si6nkmj13bvDmK-tFgMjl7aPWKDjl9PUk25BPGzy87EbjfNz3OsQlz8aTa1WhTXoBRBBpTRJ8lQaifeSxKfvIE0dwe8GCJrUk_yAmU0WYG3ogquBPkzy9t8pYHyvoPKM8mTCjQQf_xjTdDD7MmK1jQYFGz_AZkwzqdvJgpJMSkaBvLtywYymtn4Qb03-KMGtzAQDCbB9BDCEr5wRmOafIf2-4XJfwpgFAbuQelsH6ILIDoslEQCdvXDExpY6mFRazA5_A4ssoA7MQhSyNHf0f7sjUBrC6BTgKDfCmK8LjrJdAO)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME - PERSONALLY ENDORSE NAVY SEAL ADAM SCHWARZE FOR SENATE
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjh6oBYZG2lkz2lleJEQRkSusO-MHm4yeEl4iRGzGlCo5BBoW7E_FAz9XNr6E5kzBx4ogXAy3NC0svc0E1Z92pWLLinCM1hgE9wzk7FIw0S7Hg7KO2_YKzaeizW8S5zwX6FNY3syn4Upj8DGohxOixzf_AP60b5ZfTK48hRWhjimss7xH9xuMtDZE1zV2CdbL7sEYXIYwOV8oqbRbm-FC_SO0XmZzKPVQ1upK1ExsrVWzAqA1spYdP3JSGvUEzbi5YRR_XhsI8_Vr29qvx2RIO5QbUOi6LB77p2fVNAmcB1VjB1S8Iq-jtdKhu_Ke36M6mRGlAPBBFtgaD1j2MnqiC8trEMxJlrMuNnYBSVtylZc23V_RMJiaOB6eTOO77jnf76JYgCit3r5tvGoJu-DIhmch02t-YWeAmlwxz0-d9g9JVkdUroncYnkJkjOO9S1uusJ_tVxXXWI1vT5PfcadbRGoPWe2rv5kwljIb0iBzQtn)
I hold a Master’s degree from Harvard, advanced training from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA — but my proudest credential remains my service to this country. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey in Minnesota and has never backed down when our nation needed me.

In the Senate, I will fight for President Trump’s America First agenda: requiring photo identification to vote in every state, returning to bold budget cutting to save taxpayer dollars, going after corrupt politicians, and restoring law and order. Minnesota deserves a Senator with real courage and proven leadership — not another career politician.

_**[If you agree that we need a Navy SEAL in the United States Senate — someone who has faced far worse odds overseas and is ready to fight for Minnesota and America — then please send me a powerful sign of support by adding your name to the growing list of conservatives who have officially endorsed me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjm5myLzAkPOEMcY0jF5PbiTLRrtY7lDUeT5cK2RTwtQjzrPkQGWcsjmiBgYZWfDFwXeqQBTEoFgI4hznHQVafvag-MGDLhuaG6tn3BJWIYRi0EdD4BGhcT6jvmAlmNhuSqWhtm8wm7mTvXoCOctUXtRAUU9wuz8gw5-N1dDg8RXL4e6RIy4W_2XIDWtdnhwhQziD3R1LGwFeL21UFMT3Hh2JZRNasXzbFnFxneGqzBOSqcqoHz0wNdDY-T_Q5-LeyQDuijZ2HXeQY601jyiCUP97m7iK6PM6ZbqkwXMZPp2YY1kkDKXMYJ0yCpbav-3RZ0HmDRmPZxZE-a9A6LrO4jxPib919jb-hS9IcVQVAvXKJX3WgBcECGaxh6gjo9mXzwKpw8Ivyur7uMVigUX8-SIbegzES7bNaicCq1wD5pE4aqEyg9YxFRGfiZDgrCQ-YZbfqqeuR8zoLJfC17y7XZHqyhc71A9QdrUbpgF4-ZR2)**_

**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=37bb9fd78b6943ebb5fc85964f811935&_e=5YBtlxwf9B2jqihkJYthkqkYaVl-aTypLFlFHvmHH6oaCZtRzlE4PGQgxCjsCYwzxExMVpq7RADYhFIxiao67_4FIWGUcBMN_sE0zhZh9ZzhOZ7RvVF_pxAkiApmZbrUSeSKshmlzOGyQ4TpDua7J9clNcrhyh2-Vt9YX3ods3OwfplS76Oh1BlAi0l7Io9EGxpUgQavrFdR3ZdArp_l_iajKv0WFN7XzkgVN_UdN5auXNwm6Lb3PUdcLpGvt5Xe-WbdP8ibZQxxw6IWuXiEjj8Uf_8SdXq37LCRlRy7mYxNtMorT-Nu2IQpB19o6vt2odiaN8iVIUdcj3ADyMwUs1VH-1UitpMuBw4SfH-IXTfr3ykPnlxNGtVN_33h8f0fHLHaTyGpH0crYQIe6UdLsqzWEVfO248dr7SnuvWcr4LfqGMH1QyB4Y8eCPudfDp5EaX5q3QDDt4hML8nBXDBs01EH3E1UcEYkzJqIRCt_CIMQUUr1O7x4_a8jysG4Z9nzGuBMJXql3N42SFXZcRwQD9s0up1TkQ74Rj8Qb8KH2OLQLE2MqDivEKANzbnOi-_bV3kcLhj7cyqKiE7rFSRhclIOnH-XjP7Y8zaUBR7PaO3grJQQRfarzENu2kMu_dMq1Ms0HtIKP7lycaKMPO2cIWCIXusMG4wE6m-kjFxo7LzRFC7c6WRtdjxLEla94ppoB81WF4mJ4J2tesRHkp5VpbpyqaqTMB2aOtNCHXccg7ztvCf7SwBSRPtJYN0O0G3)

clean_body: You might not know me, but your support in this race matters more than you’ll ever know. | Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out to you today for the very first time to ask for your personal endorsement as I run for the Republican nomination for the United States Senate in Minnesota. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran who answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to defend the freedoms and way of life we hold dear. As a SEAL, I learned to thrive in the toughest environments — and that same grit and determination is exactly what I’m bringing to this race. Unlike my progressive, far-left Democrat opponents, I’m not cosplaying as a Somali Muslim to win over the votes of a leftist base who want nothing more out of the midterms than impeaching Donald Trump. My team and I have been driving from county to county to introduce my campaign to folks who may have never heard of me. We’re doing the hard work now - long days, tons of events - so we can meet as many potential voters as possible. I’m especially proud that in recent months I have won nearly all of the straw polls conducted by local Republican organizations across Minnesota. These early victories show that conservatives are ready for a battle-tested leader who will take the fight to Washington and deliver real results for our state. We are on track to win the endorsement of the delegates to the Minnesota Republican Party in May but we need to expand our support now to win in November. We’ve set an ambitious goal of securing 20,000 more conservative endorsements to demonstrate the size and strength of this grassroots movement heading into my August primary. If you can spare just a few moments right now to add your name to my official endorsement list, I hold a Master’s degree from Harvard, advanced training from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA — but my proudest credential remains my service to this country. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey in Minnesota and has never backed down when our nation needed me. In the Senate, I will fight for President Trump’s America First agenda: requiring photo identification to vote in every state, returning to bold budget cutting to save taxpayer dollars, going after corrupt politicians, and restoring law and order. Minnesota deserves a Senator with real courage and proven leadership — not another career politician. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter,
Poppy managed to score 3 bagels off the counter today while I was baking. While she’s in her carb coma, I’ve got a quick note for you.
**Trump endorsing Steve Hilton changes this race up big time.**
His endorsement comes with a surge of support from the very same MAGA allies who are working hard to bring his agenda to California.
We’re the top Democratic campaign in this race—and if we can’t stand up against Hilton’s spending, our worst-case scenario becomes a reality:
**TWO Republicans advancing to the general election, locking Democrats out and virtually flipping the state red.**
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever makes sense to you to sustain our fight and keep California blue?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260419_2_ak.AYwEM7&refcode=em20260419-41166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41166%2E3422442%2E_OE__n)**

name: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.electjon.com/go/4629?t=1&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU)

2028 is approaching.
**But the election that will determine whether our Republic reaches 2028 intact is in 2026.**
_Read that again._
I’m serious: These midterm elections will be the most consequential in modern history.
And my U.S. Senate reelection in Georgia will be the most critical and most expensive contest of all.
**I am the ONLY Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.**
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight for our Republic’s future — don’t wait until 2028.
Instead, rush $5 to my reelection campaign in Georgia today.
**Here’s the link to donate:**[**https://act.electjon.com/go/Donate**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260419-2-f&t=2&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU)
Consider the damage Trump has done in just one year:
* Infecting our government with cronyism and corruption at unprecedented scale.

* Stacking key agencies with loyalists — and directing them to target, investigate, intimidate, and prosecute critics and opponents.

* Waging an unprecedented campaign of fear, intimidation, and vengeance.

* Handing out million-dollar tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans, while canceling programs that help working families.

* Gutting Medicaid and rural health care, leaving millions unsure how — or where — they’ll get care next year.

* Illegally deploying federal troops on the streets of American cities.

* Threatening to undermine free and fair elections.

Only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this.
The only real solution is victory.
This is something you can do right now to fight back and make a difference: [**Make a contribution to my reelection campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260419-2-f&t=3&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
[**All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260419-2-f&t=4&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260419-2-f&t=5&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU)**
With gratitude,
Sen. Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=6&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2109%2E5691347%2EK7PrsU) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: $2 billion dollars a day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

President Trump’s speech on Iran left the American people with more questions than answers. We still do not know what the endgame is. There was no clear articulation of the “imminent” threat posed by Iran to the homeland and he failed to lay out a credible plan for what comes next.

We are already spending as much as $2 billion dollars a day in Iran. Now, Trump and his Republican allies are asking Congress to give him $100 billion more. At a time when California families are struggling to cover their basic expenses, this is the last thing we should be doing.

That’s why I’m focused on lowering your costs and protecting your healthcare, not fueling a conflict without an exit strategy.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, President Trump’s speech on Iran left the American people with more questions than answers. We still do not know what the endgame is. There was no clear articulation of the “imminent” threat posed by Iran to the homeland and he failed to lay out a credible plan for what comes next. We are already spending as much as $2 billion dollars a day in Iran. Now, Trump and his Republican allies are asking Congress to give him $100 billion more. At a time when California families are struggling to cover their basic expenses, this is the last thing we should be doing. That’s why I’m focused on lowering your costs and protecting your healthcare, not fueling a conflict without an exit strategy. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = Let’s continue to hold Trump accountable and deliver real results for the people of Sacramento, Placer, Nevada, and El Dorado Counties. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I cannot face this onslaught alone. I need people like you by my side.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
| | | |
---
Peter,

I’ve won some of the toughest political fights here in North Carolina, but right now, I’m worried.
This is the #1 Senate race in the country, and experts at Politico are saying that Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate without flipping this seat blue.
**That’s why Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me:** President Trump has publicly attacked me and endorsed my opponent, a right-wing group has made a seven-figure ad buy against me and JD Vance even came to North Carolina to double down on their lies.
**Unfortunately, their plan is working: A recent poll shows this race is statistically tied.**
**[Every new day brings a new GOP attack, and I cannot face this onslaught alone. I need people like you by my side. Will you chip in $5, or whatever amount you can, to help me flip North Carolina blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9335?t=8&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9301?t=9&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9302?t=10&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9303?t=11&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9300?t=12&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
---
Thank you,

Roy
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1083%2E124072%2EZdnckw)_**

name: Evan Hunt
subject: I have a kid in college and another on the way: the mathisn’t mathing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Evan Hunt
body:
Introducing my Serve and Succeed Act | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYE5U9NTRbOMLNsSMiwuHsSrn4JnyYtk1EREaCYHldIw2Es-lCsKe-k7RYeRErCjUmpL6YWg0aqprxBCSlqaUKjL6uf8EDq6vQVEaFZEFWaTvOKtPnFc2PEalY2SnM4_7RP3vwv12mvUY7fCbVwFgP3QETtqqbBnqtlSW_Sza8__1fPx31BxeEInzXE251mha-Wx49s8UFeYasXnoTYcPAHLevngs0MLEGXancrSY3Aa2kABKiBiG8A3uFxrEZgAG5LLfm7lDiwkf3hI29vCfZ4/4px/UZy6q4EiR1CP1_PzbyZpQg/h0/h001.0hv1HcHpeAp6ttIt9DA2q4arQmFWLmDetvIpaO27vyk)
---
Peter, I have one kid in college and another on the way, so when I say the math on college costs is broken I am speaking from my own kitchen table.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt8_PvzZKNNhr9Kxd_oFogMk03MxJcWyXrPzxu_KezLRkU9DzGNNRot8HsmeAUJdhw7qoKkGNs9z4v5sR0Y7GfWB3ZbxQp9dGZHQ2m0ncXTU6FO1-Q9JTkR4Jq-DvbhJnHkU3ULtJqYOlUZqaPMQt0gVwRM-s4aJWEpzCgh7wBRIqBL88XvEuwpIlljVIMxEm7Y-kh8G2YrAgPwBsZbdhVko9rNiXhLfb_GaHx311LKKqvdZRMNtumBiTmrsWNYrCAQSluYHMoVXF3rre_2mqD8_u5zteOV2fEurknw0grJN723OG2khv15RPyTe0xD1qy8g/4px/UZy6q4EiR1CP1_PzbyZpQg/h1/h001.3_S4YQPr2GXuia50nzN-fuI3K8x8hH8dXyq9960twAo)
---
For a public in-state school you are looking at roughly $27,000 to $30,000 a year right now. The maximum Pell Grant is about $7,395 and first-year federal loans cap at $5,500. **The gap between those numbers and what families actually owe does not magically close on its own.** In TX-03, median income families earning around $100,000 a year are getting squeezed from both sides - too much income for meaningful aid, not enough to actually afford college without long-term debt. That leads to painful conversations about whether to go to college at all. [**Every dollar behind this campaign right now is an investment in sending someone to Congress who will fight for the families getting squeezed instead of the institutions crushing them.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt8_PvzZKNNhr9Kxd_oFogMk03MxJcWyXrPzxu_KezLRkUcCsrg34FmH4sw7MGxAP6dr8dW6860e1kyDLljAYhp-gv-Po2qAMXRV0azNwrgUYUKbi_nm1SNA5hwzTw-ay7mc4K4U56mrpwX-XmhMIDoTjo8ZgSskX4loGhDSJXQ7a8VN0mGZHSKaHHcdwz9WB21g5N-bH30Mq12v3D40Gbo6PD6lLwYvvxoH4rx89sUhgidGzT7AveVg1GTO3zxEMl3xXFVOQWlJro0yRece10qpg8-VE_rrg8QGiyF5wu8hfVki1ouCwLfSH6jSrrGCg4wA/4px/UZy6q4EiR1CP1_PzbyZpQg/h2/h001.kTwt91vTJ4mRD23gX2vi-ajEf_6KU0IZKiwCzFy33oM) Student loan debt in this country is now over $1.7 trillion and climbing. When the Biden administration finally put meaningful relief on the table, Keith Self and his MAGA colleagues went to court to kill it. **When I get to Congress I will introduce the Serve and Succeed Act, where a few years of national service translate directly into meaningful tuition support or accelerated student loan forgiveness. ** We're talking teaching, healthcare, infrastructure, disaster response, and jobs in community service. Universities with multi-billion dollar endowments that grow year over year while tuition climbs faster than inflation and administrative costs balloon are not prioritizing their students. **They are prioritizing their portfolios.** **The Serve and Succeed Act** would also put pressure on the universities themselves, requiring schools that want to participate to match the program's commitment with actual tuition reductions. In exchange they would receive a Serve and Succeed Qualified designation. Under this bill, students serve their communities, schools lower their costs, and families stop being left alone to bridge a gap. As AI reshapes entry-level jobs and the old pathways to a middle class life keep narrowing, young people deserve a government that meets them where they are and gives them a way forward. clean_body: Introducing my Serve and Succeed Act | | Peter, I have one kid in college and another on the way, so when I say the math on college costs is broken I am speaking from my own kitchen table. | For a public in-state school you are looking at roughly $27,000 to $30,000 a year right now. The maximum Pell Grant is about $7,395 and first-year federal loans cap at $5,500. The gap between those numbers and what families actually owe does not magically close on its own. In TX-03, median income families earning around $100,000 a year are getting squeezed from both sides - too much income for meaningful aid, not enough to actually afford college without long-term debt. That leads to painful conversations about whether to go to college at all. Student loan debt in this country is now over $1.7 trillion and climbing. When the Biden administration finally put meaningful relief on the table, Keith Self and his MAGA colleagues went to court to kill it. When I get to Congress I will introduce the Serve and Succeed Act, where a few years of national service translate directly into meaningful tuition support or accelerated student loan forgiveness. We're talking teaching, healthcare, infrastructure, disaster response, and jobs in community service. Universities with multi-billion dollar endowments that grow year over year while tuition climbs faster than inflation and administrative costs balloon are not prioritizing their students. They are prioritizing their portfolios. The Serve and Succeed Act would also put pressure on the universities themselves, requiring schools that want to participate to match the program's commitment with actual tuition reductions. In exchange they would receive a Serve and Succeed Qualified designation. Under this bill, students serve their communities, schools lower their costs, and families stop being left alone to bridge a gap. As AI reshapes entry-level jobs and the old pathways to a middle class life keep narrowing, young people deserve a government that meets them where they are and gives them a way forward. Very respectfully, Evan Hunt Democratic Nominee TX-03 | | | Evan Hunt is a combat aviator and veteran, a community and business leader, and a Texas family man, running against MAGA Rep. Keith Self in TX-03. We need all hands on deck to flip this seat. # ['The Noise is Blinding' by Booker Scott](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=194724234&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0NzI0MjM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NzY2MzY0NTMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTIyODQ1MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-FgIP9BQYskZHQM3665DZlM_WoVRZ86VRQHfTjbKYUA)
### What if the biggest political weapon right now is not policy failure -- but distraction?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Apr 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b2849b8-6d9f-4a45-945a-eb67354d3935?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Amid an ever-evolving Iranian conflict and all the opinions that accompany it, the sound is deafening, the noise is blinding. As the world waits to see if the cease-fire will hold and gas prices come down, we seem to have forgotten the other noise that blinded us before.

The Epstein files, multiple government shutdowns, the Save Act, No Kings, Bondi, and Noem removed...there are constant distractions, a low-level noise that can obscure the accomplishments of the current Trump administration. If efforts to put Trump in prison, pose financial hardships or threaten his safety are unsuccessful, opponents are focusing on derailing his second term. That seems to be the objective.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=194724234&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0NzI0MjM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NzY2MzY0NTMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTIyODQ1MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-FgIP9BQYskZHQM3665DZlM_WoVRZ86VRQHfTjbKYUA)

The 24-hour news cycle brings another self-made psyop every day. It prevents most from seeing that the things they said were important are being silently accomplished. A wide-open southern border has faded from memory. Record-breaking inflation during the 4-year Biden term and the highest gas prices in American history have been replaced with a 'boots on the ground' debate.

Prior to the 2024 presidential election, the top two issues for the American people were immigration and affordability. Biden's wide-open border allowed anywhere from 8 million to 15 million illegal immigrants to invade the nation. Between 1 million and 2 million 'got aways' entered the country. No one knows who they were, where they came from, or where they went.
Democrats may have differing perspectives, but there have been incidents where undocumented immigrants were involved in serious crimes. Some point to crime statistics indicating Hispanics commit fewer crimes than other groups. Many people feel that even one such incident is too many for individuals not lawfully present in the country.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ea49820-344e-4ae0-a901-19c694822964?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Blinded by the noise, we forget that Trump shut down the open border in 2025. According to the US Customs and Border Patrol, US-Mexico border crossings dropped to a 55-year low in fiscal year 2025. At the peak of Biden's organized illegal invasion, there were 2.2 million apprehensions in FY 2022. In 2025, monthly border apprehensions fell to under 9,000 a month, and for seven months in a row, zero illegals were released into America.

Blinded by the noise, we forget the Trump administration has deported between 2 and 2.5 million. Many self-deported, but about 600,000 have been captured, held, adjudicated, and removed. Over half of those 600,000 were convicted criminals or awaiting trial for violent offenses.

A crackdown on crime in American cities by the Trump administration resulted in the lowest murder rate in 100 years, but other violent crime was down too. The Council on Criminal Justice report tracked by the Real-Time Crime Index shows aggravated assaults, gun assaults, and sexual assaults all fell in 2025. Even shoplifting and burglaries declined, but blinded by the noise, many are unable to see success.

The daily distraction of contrails and alien beings keeps people from seeing the economic progress that was made before the Democrats shut down the government last fall. Wage growth was steady; GDP was around 3%, and inflation was consistently around 2.8%. Compare those numbers to the Biden years, where cumulative inflation was near 20%, and Americans' wages couldn't keep up, making almost everything unaffordable.

All of that was before the Trump Administration deregulation positively impacted sectors of the economy, but that is coming. The One Big Beautiful Bill is increasing tax refunds right now. As of late March, the average tax refund is $3,521.00, up 11.1% from 2025's $3170.00. No tax on tips or overtime, and a social security tax deduction is making a difference in Americans' bank accounts.

The shutdown may have momentarily slowed America's economic engine, but if you turn down the noise that blinds you daily, you will hear the humming of a future with prosperity and new opportunities for all. The economy, safety and security, the southern border...that's what mattered on election day 2024. It's just as important today.

Republican Clay Fuller won the Special Election for the seat previously occupied by Marjorie Taylor Greene on Tuesday night. Many pundits are saying the margin of victory was concerning, but I prefer to listen to the words of Fuller in his acceptance speech when he said, "When we stay together, we can do anything."

Don't be blinded by the noise. Focus on what really matters. Stay positive and help make a difference in the 2026 midterm election by accentuating the accomplishments that were promised and made and how they are being kept or get out of the way.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

clean_body: What if the biggest political weapon right now is not policy failure -- but distraction? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What if the biggest political weapon right now is not policy failure -- but distraction? | | | Apr 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Amid an ever-evolving Iranian conflict and all the opinions that accompany it, the sound is deafening, the noise is blinding. As the world waits to see if the cease-fire will hold and gas prices come down, we seem to have forgotten the other noise that blinded us before. The Epstein files, multiple government shutdowns, the Save Act, No Kings, Bondi, and Noem removed...there are constant distractions, a low-level noise that can obscure the accomplishments of the current Trump administration. If efforts to put Trump in prison, pose financial hardships or threaten his safety are unsuccessful, opponents are focusing on derailing his second term. That seems to be the objective. The 24-hour news cycle brings another self-made psyop every day. It prevents most from seeing that the things they said were important are being silently accomplished. A wide-open southern border has faded from memory. Record-breaking inflation during the 4-year Biden term and the highest gas prices in American history have been replaced with a 'boots on the ground' debate. Prior to the 2024 presidential election, the top two issues for the American people were immigration and affordability. Biden's wide-open border allowed anywhere from 8 million to 15 million illegal immigrants to invade the nation. Between 1 million and 2 million 'got aways' entered the country. No one knows who they were, where they came from, or where they went. Democrats may have differing perspectives, but there have been incidents where undocumented immigrants were involved in serious crimes. Some point to crime statistics indicating Hispanics commit fewer crimes than other groups. Many people feel that even one such incident is too many for individuals not lawfully present in the country. | | ---|---|--- Blinded by the noise, we forget that Trump shut down the open border in 2025. According to the US Customs and Border Patrol, US-Mexico border crossings dropped to a 55-year low in fiscal year 2025. At the peak of Biden's organized illegal invasion, there were 2.2 million apprehensions in FY 2022. In 2025, monthly border apprehensions fell to under 9,000 a month, and for seven months in a row, zero illegals were released into America. Blinded by the noise, we forget the Trump administration has deported between 2 and 2.5 million. Many self-deported, but about 600,000 have been captured, held, adjudicated, and removed. Over half of those 600,000 were convicted criminals or awaiting trial for violent offenses. A crackdown on crime in American cities by the Trump administration resulted in the lowest murder rate in 100 years, but other violent crime was down too. The Council on Criminal Justice report tracked by the Real-Time Crime Index shows aggravated assaults, gun assaults, and sexual assaults all fell in 2025. Even shoplifting and burglaries declined, but blinded by the noise, many are unable to see success. The daily distraction of contrails and alien beings keeps people from seeing the economic progress that was made before the Democrats shut down the government last fall. Wage growth was steady; GDP was around 3%, and inflation was consistently around 2.8%. Compare those numbers to the Biden years, where cumulative inflation was near 20%, and Americans' wages couldn't keep up, making almost everything unaffordable. All of that was before the Trump Administration deregulation positively impacted sectors of the economy, but that is coming. The One Big Beautiful Bill is increasing tax refunds right now. As of late March, the average tax refund is $3,521.00, up 11.1% from 2025's $3170.00. No tax on tips or overtime, and a social security tax deduction is making a difference in Americans' bank accounts. The shutdown may have momentarily slowed America's economic engine, but if you turn down the noise that blinds you daily, you will hear the humming of a future with prosperity and new opportunities for all. The economy, safety and security, the southern border...that's what mattered on election day 2024. It's just as important today. Republican Clay Fuller won the Special Election for the seat previously occupied by Marjorie Taylor Greene on Tuesday night. Many pundits are saying the margin of victory was concerning, but I prefer to listen to the words of Fuller in his acceptance speech when he said, "When we stay together, we can do anything." Don't be blinded by the noise. Focus on what really matters. Stay positive and help make a difference in the 2026 midterm election by accentuating the accomplishments that were promised and made and how they are being kept or get out of the way. Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. If you like what you read, please forward it to a friend. We only grow with your help, and thanks for doing it! | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Heartland Journal 99 E. name: Crow for Congress
subject: We can’t afford Trump’s war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team ,

This war of choice Donald Trump started with Iran has already cost taxpayers tens of billions of dollars.

That doesn’t even count the higher costs American families are facing at home. Inflation is rising at the highest rate in three years, and gas prices are through the roof — the national average is over $4 a gallon now.

While the administration is spending billions of dollars overseas, working families back home can’t afford health care, groceries, and housing. While all this is happening, Trump wants to give the Pentagon another $1.5 trillion next year, and do it by cutting everything else — housing, health care, education, food assistance...you name it.

Trump has dragged us into another Middle East quagmire, with no justification and no plan, at enormous cost to the nation. He expects you and your family to pay the price. No wonder the American people are pissed.

Jason served in combat, and he knows well that there is a time and place for America to use our strength, and to play a positive role in the world. This war is not it.

He also knows first hand the costs of war. He knows that Congress needs to focus on delivering for working families right here in this country, not starting more overseas wars.

That’s why Jason’s fighting hard to rein in this reckless president and elect a new Democratic Congress, so we can correct course. Can you pitch in to help his efforts today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr26]

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I don’t like wasting money
body:
This is how I’ve lived my whole life, and how I’ll lead as governor.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260419_2_thrifty.y-br3G&refcode=em20260419-943&amount=5&t=1&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)
Peter, I want to tell you a little about how this campaign actually operates — because it says a lot about how I’ll lead as governor.
I’ve never believed in wasting money. That’s not a campaign talking point; it’s how I’ve lived my whole life. When you grow up watching every dollar, you learn quickly that money represents someone’s time, sacrifice, and trust.
That mindset shapes every decision we make.
We’re building a campaign powered by people, not billionaires.
We focus on what helps us win: organizing communities, talking directly with voters, and showing up everywhere — not just where it’s convenient.
Sometimes that means long drives instead of flights. El Paso to Austin? No problem. It means reusing placards after events, meeting in libraries or community centers instead of expensive venues. Most of all, it means knowing we’re accountable for how we spend what supporters like you give.
I know how much a contribution can mean — especially right now. When someone decides to give, that’s an act of trust. I don’t take that lightly for a second.
**[Peter, if you’re able to pitch in $5 today, you’ll be helping us keep building a campaign that’s disciplined, people-powered, and strong enough to defeat Greg Abbott.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260419_2_thrifty.y-br3G&refcode=em20260419-943&amount=5&t=2&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260419_2_thrifty.y-br3G&amount=5&refcode=em20260419-943&t=21&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)
Thank you for standing with me. I’m truly grateful to be in this fight with you.
— Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260419-2&t=22&refcode2=943_299639_KxJfe7&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260419-2&recurring=1&t=23&refcode2=943_299639_KxJfe7&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=25&akid=943%2E299639%2EKxJfe7)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can I be real with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Things are bad, no doubt about it. I wish it had never gone this far.
#

Friends, can I be real with you?
Donald Trump and his family are making billions of dollars selling this country out. The fraud and grift is unlike anything I have ever seen.
That is a fact, and you shouldn’t let anyone tell you otherwise.
But some other things are true, too.
Millions and millions of people across this country are standing up against him. People from all walks of life, including Republicans — even people who voted for him multiple times.
Things are bad, no doubt about it. I wish it had never gone this far. But even now, you can start seeing the light at the end of the tunnel.
This is not the time to quit. I am going to continue fighting against Trump, and I sure as hell won’t let him shut me up.
From here on out, I’m going to need you with me.
I’m going to do everything in my power to help elect Democrats to the House and Senate this November, because that’s the thing Donald Trump is most afraid of. And he should be.
[**So, can I count on you to make a donation to make it happen? Our end-of-month deadline is coming up faster than I expected, and we’ve got a ways to go if we want to hit our goals.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr26.E0ZGh8&refcode=em260419-1-90&t=1&akid=6422%2E6688874%2EzqpxI-)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: three things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=9007%2E400544%2E0B-fkk)
---
Hi there, friend — it’s Deb. I know you’re busy, so I’ll keep this quick.

I'm sharing three reasons to chip in before midnight to help me become the next governor of New Mexico and keep our state blue. But if you already know what I am up against and are ready to give right now, thank you. **_[You can donate to my campaign right here:](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk587-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9007%2E400544%2E0B-fkk)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk587-fr-nd&t=3&akid=9007%2E400544%2E0B-fkk)
---
**1\. Fox News has named this seat a top pickup opportunity for Republicans** — which means Trump and MAGA billionaires are watching, ready to spend whatever it takes to flip our state red. With New Mexico's history of switching parties every eight years, they are also coming right on schedule to flip this seat!

**2\. The GOP knows that governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power.** Electing a Republican governor this November is their only hope to bring their extremist agenda here — _and we can't let them._ They know if I am elected, I will hold their feet to the fire and stop any decision that will hurt New Mexican families.

**3\. My weekly deadline is coming up quickly, and the strength of our grassroots support — today and every day — will determine how much we can organize in the months leading up to Election Day.**
**_[We’ve got a big $15,000 grassroots weekly goal to hit, and every dollar brings us closer to keeping our state blue. Will you chip in now to help me win this November?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk587-fr-nd&t=4&akid=9007%2E400544%2E0B-fkk)_**

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Asking you to personally endorse James for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Now that James is our Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas, it’s important for us to build the largest grassroots movement our state has ever seen.
It is going to take an unprecedented effort to take on whichever Republican wins their runoff.
**[So we want to send a message loud and clear that the people are behind James. Can you add your name to personally endorse James for U.S. Senate? This is our chance to demonstrate the depth of support for this movement.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/endorse-em-apr26?source=em260419-1-ak&refcode2=570.1347274.EbhXGr?refcode=em260419-1-ak&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/endorse-em-apr26?source=em260419-1-ak&refcode2=570.1347274.EbhXGr?refcode=em260419-1-ak&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr)
It may seem like a small action, but it can make an enormous difference.
National Republicans and their billionaire backers are doing everything they can to keep us divided. They know that is their best chance at clinging to their power.
Divide and conquer. It’s the oldest strategy in the world.
So we prove that they are no match for our people-powered movement. And one way we can do that is by building a list of all of the people who are part of this movement and have James’ back.
**[So please, add your name to personally endorse James Talarico for U.S. Senate today. It will send a powerful message that this movement is prepared to defeat whichever Republican wins the runoff.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/endorse-em-apr26?source=em260419-1-ak&refcode2=570.1347274.EbhXGr?refcode=em260419-1-ak&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/endorse-em-apr26?source=em260419-1-ak&refcode2=570.1347274.EbhXGr?refcode=em260419-1-ak&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr)
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=1&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=2&refcode2=570_1347274_EbhXGr&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=570%2E1347274%2EEbhXGr).

clean_body: | | | The Freedom Caucus Fund held a top-level meeting at Mar-a-Lago. I want to tell you what happened inside that room, because not everyone gets to know. When the Freedom Caucus gathered at Mar-a-Lago , it wasn't a photo opportunity. It was a war council. And one issue dominated the room above everything else: The SAVE America Act. This isn't just another bill moving through Congress. This is the Freedom Caucus's number one priority , championed by HFC Policy Chair Chip Roy and backed by every single member of the House Freedom Caucus. Now I'm asking you to match that commitment. Will you rush an emergency contribution to the Freedom Caucus Fund today, so we can take what started at Mar-a-Lago all the way to the Senate floor and into law? Conviction alone doesn't win Senate fights. Resources do. The moment our members walked out of Mar-a-Lago , committed to this battle, the Radical Left's dark money machine started mobilizing. Lobbyists are being activated. Attack ads are being written. They are betting that the energy from that room fades before it reaches the Senate floor. Peter , what was decided at Mar-a-Lago deserves to be backed up with everything we've got. The Freedom Caucus showed up at the home of MAGA and made a promise to fight for election integrity with everything they have. We are sending this exclusive update to our top 12% of supporters because you’ve been in the trenches with us since the beginning of the SAVE America Act. I’m asking you to respond with a donation of $5, $15, $25, or even more today to fuel our fight to get the SAVE America Act all the way to President Trump’s desk. Peter, can I count on you today? | | | About Freedom Caucus Fund: Freedom Caucus Fund is committed to equipping the strongest conservative fighters in America with the resources they need to win. We support candidates who defend the Constitution, champion limited government, and stand unapologetically for the liberty, safety, and prosperity of the American people. With the support of grassroots patriots, Freedom Caucus Fund helps elect leaders who are willing to challenge the status quo in Washington and fight for the principles that built this nation. | | PAID FOR BY FREEDOM CAUCUS FUND: NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE | | PO Box 96006Washington DC 20090-6006 | |

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Can you host a House Party for Granite Solutions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
| Can you host a house party in your neighborhood before the November elections? | | Derek, will you host a house party before November? As a fellow Granite Stater, you know how much our communities matter. We want a house party in every corner of the Granite State before the November elections — and that starts with neighbors like you opening your home. Why now: house parties are the best way to turn friends into volunteers, recruit reliable supporters, and build momentum in town-by-town races. With less than seven months until Election Day, every conversation we start now can decide a seat or hold a key margin. "A two-hour house party can recruit half a dozen volunteers and introduce our message to twenty neighbors." Hosting is easy — we’ll support you every step of the way. Our team will provide:
* Ready-made invitations and RSVP tracking
* A short, friendly script and talking points
* An online sign-up so guests can volunteer afterward
* Support to answer questions and follow up

Will you host one in your living room, at your community center, or a backyard cookout? We’re aiming for coverage across every county, and your home could be the place that sparks a whole neighborhood. [Yes — I'll host a house party](https://zzk9jmtg.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fdonorprospect.com%2Ft%2Fc%2Ffcb39c64-ea6f-439f-b176-9446d20dfc54%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Fgranitesolutions.org%252Fhost-house-party/1/0100019da7d4e742-891dd619-4add-4659-8909-65908858b7ac-000000/kablUw_sy2Yd2DsYIO8Qsi42qhU=473) Prefer to talk it through first? Reply to this email or write to us at [info@granitesolutions.org](mailto:info@granitesolutions.org) and we will be in touch! Thanks for stepping up. Small gatherings like yours build the kind of grassroots strength that wins in New Hampshire. In gratitude, Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions Preserving the New Hampshire Advantage
---
[Sign up to host a house party »](https://zzk9jmtg.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fdonorprospect.com%2Ft%2Fc%2Ffcb39c64-ea6f-439f-b176-9446d20dfc54%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Fgranitesolutions.org%252Fhost-house-party/2/0100019da7d4e742-891dd619-4add-4659-8909-65908858b7ac-000000/DvF9aTGVkThw39CsVkzprqrkZRk=473)

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ORDER NOW: $77 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22221170/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE4LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTk/LbmNsZEFCdTQ3RQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzI0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMTgzMC0yMDI2MDQxOQ/gaeVVtQ/s6ldc0aef92) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22221170/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE4LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTk/LbmNsZEFCdTQ3RQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzI0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMTgzMC0yMDI2MDQxOQ/gaeVVtQ/s6ldc0aef92)

"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_

* * *
Los Angeles continues to be the epitome of what happens when far-leftists and progressives are in complete control. Once seen as a first-class city with strong business ties and high quality of life, years of liberal policies have thrown the town into disarray.
With the entertainment industry as a shell of its former self, new reporting has shown how the metro's preference to allow homeless people rule the streets is costing taxpayers in more ways than one.
New reporting from ABC 7 shows that since 2020, there have been over 75,000 incidents of the Los Angeles Fire Department having to respond to "Homeless or Encampment Related" fires.
From January through mid-December last year, the number of encampment fires reached 16,982. Meaning firefighters were responding to an average of 46 such fires every day in Los Angeles.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_

# **[AI Frenzy Could Send'EarnPhone' Soaring](https://substack.com/redirect/a6cdcb51-17ad-4d61-a97b-3fcca248f983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a6cdcb51-17ad-4d61-a97b-3fcca248f983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The hidden fuel behind AI? Your phone.
Billions of data points -- from your clicks, swipes, scrolls, and searches -- are feeding the next wave of AI innovation.
Big Tech is harvesting it. Mode Mobile is giving it**back** to you.
They are creating a **user-powered data economy that shares the upside** , and 490M+ users have already generated $1B+ in earnings.
This isn't a theory... Mode's 32,481% revenue growth landed them the #1 spot on Deloitte's list of fastest growing companies in software, and they've **secured the Nasdaq ticker $MODE** ahead of a potential IPO. However, the offer is still open for early investors.
AI breakthroughs are everywhere, but these models need your data to survive.
**[Early investors get in at $0.50/share with up to 20% bonus.](https://substack.com/redirect/a6cdcb51-17ad-4d61-a97b-3fcca248f983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a6cdcb51-17ad-4d61-a97b-3fcca248f983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### **Disclosures**
###### _**Please read the[ offering circular](https://substack.com/redirect/d64f424e-2adf-4a26-8d58-7a74801a960e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and related risks at[ invest.modemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/1d76fbb3-6332-4b57-83ab-448f74550f57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This is a paid advertisement for Mode Mobile's Regulation A+ Offering.**_
###### _**Mode Mobile recently received their ticker reservation with Nasdaq ($MODE), indicating an intent to IPO in the next 24 months. An intent to IPO is no guarantee that an actual IPO will occur.**_
###### _**The Deloitte rankings are based on submitted applications and public company database research, with winners selected based on their fiscal-year revenue growth percentage over a three-year period.**_
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
While most fires can be quickly put out, the high frequency of the homeless-related flames not only puts the area at risk, but the issue has taken on a whole new meaning in the aftermath of **[the devastating wildfires in 2025.](https://substack.com/redirect/a3e5fc75-0a16-48c3-8030-31e0c84128d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The LAFD having to shoulder that consistent burden from the large homeless population comes as the department has been fighting for more funding.
And speaking of the homeless issue, more people have become aware of the significant problem dogs are facing by being trapped in Skid Row. In addition to the overbreeding that still persists since my report in February, the most pressing issue dog rescuers are confronting is simply providing water to dogs who are often chained in the sun with no shade or water now that the days are much warmer.
When KTLA **[reported on the problem](https://substack.com/redirect/01aec281-23bc-4c4b-a493-9b3290d22b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , it noted City Councilmember Isabel Jurado, whose district includes Skid Row, did not respond to them after asking multiple times for a comment.
Volunteer Joey Tuccio said when Jurado was running for the seat, she was enthusiastic about helping solve the issue. But by the time Jurado was elected, she had "ghosted" the dog rescuers.
Whether it's fires, crime, animal abuse, or quality of life, Democrats in Los Angeles seem determined to do nothing about it. As the saying goes, you get what you vote for.

And speaking of the homeless issue, more people have become aware of the significant problem dogs are facing by being trapped in Skid Row. In addition to the overbreeding that still persists since my report in February, the most pressing issue dog rescuers are confronting is simply providing water to dogs who are often chained in the sun with no shade or water now that the days are much warmer. When KTLA , it noted City Councilmember Isabel Jurado, whose district includes Skid Row, did not respond to them after asking multiple times for a comment. Volunteer Joey Tuccio said when Jurado was running for the seat, she was enthusiastic about helping solve the issue. But by the time Jurado was elected, she had "ghosted" the dog rescuers. Whether it's fires, crime, animal abuse, or quality of life, Democrats in Los Angeles seem determined to do nothing about it. As the saying goes, you get what you vote for. | A guest post by| reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media covering immigration, protests, and national flashpoints across the U.S. Subscribe for full podcast episodes, unfiltered interviews, and on-the-ground reporting you won't see on MSM. _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice. Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee: Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee: Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. name: Tom Leonard
subject: Reminder: Share your Energy Story Tomorrow
body:
[](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/vHK62w3S892V9ZAbADw0763W763A/7JxvuP7638B9763ZuonoGjTdlQ)
---
Friends,

Just a friendly reminder to join me at my energy town hall tomorrow.

Energy costs are rising. Reliability is uncertain. And, too many of your voices are being ignored. We're bringing the conversation back to you.

A chance to speak up, be heard, and share how energy issues are impacting your family, your business, and your future.
No scripts. No spin. Just real people and real stories.
**APRIL 20th
6:30-8:00PM
Big Boy Restaurant
(1408 US Old 27, St. Johns, MI 48879)**
---
Bring a friend and come be part of the conversation that should have been happening all along.
Your story matters - and we hope you'll share it.
RSVP today to: Kaylee at kaylee@tomformichigan.com
-Tom Leonard
Republican Candidate for Governor
To learn more, get involved, and donate visit [www.TomForMichigan.com](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/EeHxOeVvNUdb3gyA7SeB763g/7JxvuP7638B9763ZuonoGjTdlQ)

name: Alex for CO-03
subject: Stand with rural Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Western Colorado has been ignored for far too long, friend.
In too many rural communities, hospitals are at risk of closing. And when a hospital closes, it’s not just inconvenient—it can be life or death.
At the same time, families and small businesses are still struggling with limited broadband access. In today’s world, that means fewer opportunities to work, learn, and grow.
And too often, Washington just doesn’t pay attention.
I’m running for Congress to change that.
I will fight for:
* Expanding rural broadband so every community can stay connected
* Protecting rural hospitals so families can get the care they need
* Creating real opportunity in rural communities—not just promises
You deserve to be heard. You deserve leadership that shows up and fights for you.
If we’re going to win this race and bring real representation back to this district, we need the resources to compete—and we need them now. So I’m asking directly, will you step up and give whatever you can to help us reach more voters, stay on the road, and win this the right way? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Western Colorado shouldn’t be an afterthought.

subject: TAKE ACTION: Protect Public Lands!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM2NDMyOTYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQ0MDMxMzA0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Stop the Sell-Off!

Since Trump came back into office, his administration has been relentlessly
trying to sell off our nation’s most treasured public lands and parks to Big
Polluters for oil and gas drilling and mining. Trump and congressional
Republicans are taking steps to sell off Chaco Canyon, Grand Staircase-Escalante, AND the Arctic Refuge to the
highest bidder — it’s time to speak out.

These lands are irreplaceable. Let’s make sure they’re protected for future
generations, not exploited and polluted for Big Oil’s profits. We need to keep
the pressure up.

Tell Secretary Burgum: Don’t sell off our public lands. Not now, not ever. https://links.messages.lcv. Republicans are taking steps to sell off Chaco Canyon, Grand
Staircase-Escalante, and the Arctic Refuge — it’s time to speak out. Tell Secretary Burgum our public lands are not for sale. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdX~ Right now, the administration has its sights set on Chaco Canyon, the ancestral
home of the Pueblo people, and a site of deep cultural, archeological, and
historical significance to dozens of Tribal Nations throughout the Southwest.
The administration is trying to revoke the Greater Chaco mineral withdrawal,
which prohibits new oil and gas leasing on roughly 336,000 acres of federal
lands bordering Chaco Culture National Historical Park. If the Department of the
Interior moves forward with this proposal, new oil and gas drilling will be allowed within 10 miles of the park’s
boundaries, threatening irreplaceable cultural and environmental resources, and posing
serious health risks to local communities. Before that, MAGA lawmakers introduced a plan to gut protections for Grand
Staircase-Escalante by overturning its management plan. Current protections
cover nearly 1.9 million acresof canyons, ancient fossil beds, sacred cultural sites, and essential wildlife
habitat for endangered and protected species like the California condor and Bald
Eagle. This plan puts it all at risk. AND congressional Republicans are still going after one of our Earth's last wild places — the Arctic Refuge. If drilling ever were to occur, it would have disastrous consequences for the
Gwich'in people and other Indigenous communities, as well as for our climate. So
far, the environmental movement has been able to hold the line to keep Big Oil
out, but we must continue to speak up so they hear loud and clear. These are just a few of the irreplaceable public lands the administration has
gone after this year. So far, the environmental movement — thanks to opposition
from people like you — has kept them at bay. We can’t let up now. Don’t wait — tell Secretary Burgum to protect our public lands today. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6BP9y_ Thank you for taking action for people and our planet. America Fitzpatrick
