name: Team Hong
subject: "She recognized me"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
Sustainer Sunday
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260419-2734)
Peter,
It's Sunday — time for another story from a Wisconsinite backing Fran.
This week: Carrie Boettcher, who's driven across central Wisconsin twice now to hear Fran speak.
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&refcode=em20260419-2734&t=1&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)
* * *
_I have been following the democratic socialist movement for awhile, so when I saw Fran was coming to Wisconsin Rapids, I was excited to hear her speak. Her presence was one of a concerned friend. She wanted to know what was important to us, what our community was interested in hearing about. She didn't come and give a stump speech and shake a few hands and leave._
_Fast forward to a few weeks ago — I was thrilled to see she would be visiting Waupaca, so my husband and I went. She again showed the compassion of a true leader_ _with every question she answered. And when I asked mine, she recognized me from Wisconsin Rapids! That solidified to me how much she really is herself_ _— it's not just her public persona._
_Human rights are the most important thing to me, and Fran's platform hits the mark — expanding BadgerCare, universal childcare, fixing the public schools including rolling back voucher programs, helping Wisconsin farmers. The divide between the haves and the have-nots has grown alarmingly and someone needs to do something drastic to reverse the damage._
_What would I say to someone who's undecided or skeptical about Fran? Just read her policies, listen to her speak, ask her the burning questions. She isn't politics as usual. She's a breath of fresh air._
**_-__Carrie Boettcher, Wisconsin Rapids_**
* * *
Our opponents have the big donors. We have people like Carrie. We would't have it any other way.
The establishment doesn't think we can win. Let's prove them wrong. Because we make better possible.
[Chip in $10, $15, or $25 to help us take this campaign to the next level. ](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&refcode=em20260419-2734&t=2&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&amount=5&refcode=em20260419-2734&t=21&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)**
With gratitude,
Team Hong
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260419-2734&t=22&refcode2=2734_105371_YwpJtF&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2734%2E105371%2EYwpJtF)

What would I say to someone who's undecided or skeptical about Fran? Just read her policies, listen to her speak, ask her the burning questions. She isn't politics as usual. She's a breath of fresh air. -Carrie Boettcher, Wisconsin Rapids Our opponents have the big donors. We have people like Carrie. We would't have it any other way. The establishment doesn't think we can win. Let's prove them wrong. Because we make better possible. With gratitude, Team Hong Email us: mailto:info@francescahong.com

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: We’re closing the gap, but we can’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260419-540&t=1&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
We’re coming to you with an important tweet from the Editor and Founder of [**Bolts Magazine**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/1547?t=2&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_) here:
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_3.FHSWe5&amount=3&refcode=20260419-540&t=3&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
This race is going to be won by turnout and turnout is continuing to surge in bluer areas of the Commonwealth.
That means that we’re steadily closing in on the gap that the opposition built early on in this race. Our on-the-ground get out the vote organizing is working, and we’re making a difference in who’s motivated to show up at the polls.
Now is not the time to slow down, it’s the time to double down on what we know works: meeting voters where they’re at to talk about this election. Cutting through MAGA noise with our own literature and ads. Continuing to activate and train in-person volunteers.
[**Help us have the resources to push forward in the final days before Election Day on April 21****. We can pass this critical redistricting amendment, but it’s going to take all of us.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_3.FHSWe5&amount=3&refcode=20260419-540&t=4&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260419_3.FHSWe5&amount=3&refcode=20260419-540&t=23&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)**
Thank you for your support,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=24&refcode2=540_12592_xcNPW_&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=26&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=540%2E12592%2ExcNPW_)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

body:
Now, we’re seeing a surge of support for Democrats across the country. Will you help us take advantage of this unique moment, Peter?
#
Peter: MAGA supporters have more distrust in the GOP than ever before.
**FIRST –** Many GOP elected officials blindly supported deeply unpopular policies led by Donald Trump + the broader MAGA movement.

name: Royce White
subject: Michele Tafoya would be the most liberal GOP Senator in D.C.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

Derek, I need to fill you in. **National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and they’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to try to defeat me.** That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts. [**So I’m personally asking: Will you split $20 between my campaign and the DNC to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20260419_6748_fr&refcode2=6748_22930333_ni5xI3&akid=6748%2E22930333%2Eni5xI3) I don’t make requests like this lightly, Derek. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far. Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power. **But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.** This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. [**Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and the DNC so we can handle whatever comes next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20260419_6748_fr&refcode2=6748_22930333_ni5xI3&akid=6748%2E22930333%2Eni5xI3) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Sherrod Brown and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20260419_6748_fr&refcode2=6748_22930333_ni5xI3&akid=6748%2E22930333%2Eni5xI3)**
